_note: zone_key is the raw internal-name prefix; zone display names / level ranges / coordinates are server-side data pending ruling (see session-report 2026-07-22)

badges.name: BloodyBayTour1
badges.desc_hero: Spanky Rabinowitz's cousin Charlie 'Big Buck' Rabinowitz owned Big Bucks Casino. It is said much of Spanky's campaign money came from the take here.
badges.desc_villain: Spanky Rabinowitz's cousin Charlie 'Big Buck' Rabinowitz owned Big Bucks Casino. It is said much of Spanky's campaign money came from the take here.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour2
badges.desc_hero: The Shiva Shard fed on the dead here, causing the trees to grow larger and stronger around the old graveyard.
badges.desc_villain: The Shiva Shard fed on the dead here, causing the trees to grow larger and stronger around the old graveyard.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour3
badges.desc_hero: In this building the first of Cape Canaveral's scientists was infected and transformed by the Shiva Shard, eventually causing him to implode.
badges.desc_villain: In this building the first of Cape Canaveral's scientists was infected and transformed by the Shiva Shard, eventually causing him to implode.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour4
badges.desc_hero: The shards must be vibrating the very bones of the graves... you are almost sure you can hear scratching and clawing from the inside of the mausoleums.
badges.desc_villain: The shards must be vibrating the very bones of the graves... you are almost sure you can hear scratching and clawing from the inside of the mausoleums.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour5
badges.desc_hero: Though this beach looks peaceful, creatures resembling the Neo-Shivans have been sighted here. Best to proceed with caution.
badges.desc_villain: Though this beach looks peaceful, creatures resembling the Neo-Shivans have been sighted here. Best to proceed with caution.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour6
badges.desc_hero: Hero Burgers was once the best fast-food restaurant in Oceanview, before the island was evacuated and abandoned.
badges.desc_villain: Hero Burgers was once the best fast-food restaurant in Oceanview, before the island was evacuated and abandoned.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour7
badges.desc_hero: The Shiva fragments that crashed here created little collateral damage. This refinery is completely intact around the impact zone.
badges.desc_villain: The Shiva fragments that crashed here created little collateral damage. This refinery is completely intact around the impact zone.

badges.name: BloodyBayTour8
badges.desc_hero: Graveyards litter the Bay, but Shivans and Banished Pantheon alike keep mourners from visiting their passed loved ones.
badges.desc_villain: Graveyards litter the Bay, but Shivans and Banished Pantheon alike keep mourners from visiting their passed loved ones.

badges.name: CapauDiableTour1
badges.desc_hero: You've spent time wandering around in the Power Transport System at Mount Diable.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent time wandering around in the Power Transport System at Mount Diable.

badges.name: CapauDiableTour2
badges.desc_hero: The top of the WSPDR building is a great place to survey Recluse's media empire.
badges.desc_villain: The top of the WSPDR building is a great place to survey Recluse's media empire.

badges.name: CapauDiableTour3
badges.desc_hero: It's back to school for you. Aeon University is home to many of Dr. Aeon's brighter employees.
badges.desc_villain: It's back to school for you. Aeon University is home to many of Dr. Aeon's brighter employees.

badges.name: CapauDiableTour4
badges.desc_hero: Volcanic activity around Mount Diable causes a lot of steamy venting. Watch out or it's lobster time.
badges.desc_villain: Volcanic activity around Mount Diable causes a lot of steamy venting. Watch out or it's lobster time.

badges.name: CapauDiableTour5
badges.desc_hero: Lawrence Langston made his money investing in the things he personally was interested in.  His penchant for chocolate helped him to strike gold with Gold Brick candy bars.
badges.desc_villain: Lawrence Langston made his money investing in the things he personally was interested in.  His penchant for chocolate helped him to strike gold with Gold Brick candy bars.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour1
badges.desc_hero: You've visited the beach outside the Grandville city walls, where Lord Recluse viciously repelled an invasion of Longbow landing craft.
badges.desc_villain: You've visited the beach outside the Grandville city walls, where Lord Recluse viciously repelled an invasion of Longbow landing craft.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour2
badges.desc_hero: A new low, even for a villain. You've stumbled through very bottom of Grandville in the area known as 'The Gutter.'
badges.desc_villain: A new low, even for a villain. You've stumbled through very bottom of Grandville in the area known as 'The Gutter.'

badges.name: GrandvilleTour3
badges.desc_hero: Life at the bottom is rough, and after visiting Hobo Row in Grandville's Gutter you can agree.
badges.desc_villain: Life at the bottom is rough, and after visiting Hobo Row in Grandville's Gutter you can agree.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour4
badges.desc_hero: Top of the world! You have climbed to the top of the radio tower in Grandville.
badges.desc_villain: Top of the world! You have climbed to the top of the radio tower in Grandville.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour1
badges.desc_hero: Many would-be villains have drunk their fill from the cesspool in hopes that it might grant super power. Mostly they go insane.
badges.desc_villain: Many would-be villains have drunk their fill from the cesspool in hopes that it might grant super power. Mostly they go insane.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour2
badges.desc_hero: This is the main entrance to the Snakes' underground lair. You really don't want to go down there.
badges.desc_villain: This is the main entrance to the Snakes' underground lair. You really don't want to go down there.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour3
badges.desc_hero: Just when you thought it was safe...
badges.desc_villain: Just when you thought it was safe...

badges.name: MercyIslandTour4
badges.desc_hero: Arachnos built the wall around Mercy to keep it safe.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos built the wall around Mercy to keep it safe.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour5
badges.desc_hero: This is the good life. The higher up you get, the bigger you are.
badges.desc_villain: This is the good life. The higher up you get, the bigger you are.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour6
badges.desc_hero: They say that lonely tower is the home of Ghost Widow, Lord Recluse's phantom servant.
badges.desc_villain: They say that lonely tower is the home of Ghost Widow, Lord Recluse's phantom servant.

badges.name: NervaTour1
badges.desc_hero: A failed assassination attempt on Ms. Liberty was made from the top of this pillar.
badges.desc_villain: A failed assassination attempt on Ms. Liberty was made from the top of this pillar.

badges.name: NervaTour2
badges.desc_hero: This is the spot where many Longbow Agents have trained to take villains down.
badges.desc_villain: This is the spot where many Longbow Agents have trained to take you down.

badges.name: NervaTour3
badges.desc_hero: You have visited the famous Nerva Wreck. What strange creature might have caused this disaster?
badges.desc_villain: You have visited the famous Nerva Wreck. What strange creature might have caused this disaster?

badges.name: NervaTour4
badges.desc_hero: This is the spot of many battles between the Circle of Thorns and their age-old enemy, the Mu.
badges.desc_villain: This is the spot of many battles between the Circle of Thorns and their age-old enemy, the Mu.

badges.name: NervaTour5
badges.desc_hero: What mysterious purpose does this twisted old tree serve?
badges.desc_villain: What mysterious purpose does this twisted old tree serve?

badges.name: PortOakesTour1
badges.desc_hero: The owner of Blackbeard's pub is rumored to have sent more than one patron to Davey Jones' locker.
badges.desc_villain: The owner of Blackbeard's pub is rumored to have sent more than one patron to Davey Jones' locker.

badges.name: PortOakesTour2
badges.desc_hero: Emil Marcone's brother was found at low tide in this particular vehicle.
badges.desc_villain: Emil Marcone's brother was found at low tide in this particular vehicle.

badges.name: PortOakesTour3
badges.desc_hero: The last of the pirates died at this location defending the fort against Blackbeard.
badges.desc_villain: The last of the pirates died at this location defending the fort against Blackbeard.

badges.name: PortOakesTour4
badges.desc_hero: Three years ago, Ms. Liberty smashed the supervillain Thermonuke through the deck and into the volatile crude below. Thermonuke's devastating powers ignited the oil and cracked open the Cairo Queen like a pixie stick.
badges.desc_villain: Three years ago, Ms. Liberty smashed the supervillain Thermonuke through the deck and into the volatile crude below. Thermonuke's devastating powers ignited the oil and cracked open the Cairo Queen like a pixie stick.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour1
badges.desc_hero: Lord Recluse targeted the statue of Atlas first, knowing it was an important symbol to Paragon's 'heroes.'
badges.desc_villain: Lord Recluse targeted the statue of Atlas first, knowing it was an important symbol to Paragon's 'heroes.'

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour2
badges.desc_hero: Some say this battle will signal the end of civilization as we know it, and the beginning of a new history - written by Lord Recluse.
badges.desc_villain: Some say this battle will signal the end of civilization as we know it, and the beginning of a new history - written by Lord Recluse.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour3
badges.desc_hero: The Meinhoff Building was created in our current timeline to serve as an Arachnos base in this possible future.
badges.desc_villain: The Meinhoff Building was created in our current timeline to serve as an Arachnos base in this possible future.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour4
badges.desc_hero: Lee Towers may go down in history as the place where civilization fell to Lord Recluse.
badges.desc_villain: Lee Towers may go down in history as the place where civilization fell to Lord Recluse.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour5
badges.desc_hero: A strange fluctuation in the time stream keeps pulling victims of an old Rikti mutation drug to this point. Some temporal researchers believe that this connection with the Outbreak is responsible for keeping Recluse's Victory from taking hold, but don't know why.
badges.desc_villain: A strange fluctuation in the time stream keeps pulling victims of an old Rikti mutation drug to this point. Some temporal researchers believe that this connection with the Outbreak is responsible for keeping Recluse's Victory from taking hold, but don't know why.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour6
badges.desc_hero: Vanguard abandoned its Atlas Park outpost in this timeline, not willing to take sides between Freedom Corps and Arachnos. They continue to recruit metahumans of all alignments in their fight against alien threats.
badges.desc_villain: Vanguard abandoned its Atlas Park outpost in this timeline, not willing to take sides between Freedom Corps and Arachnos. They continue to recruit metahumans of all alignments in their fight against alien threats.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour7
badges.desc_hero: Several investigations into food poisoning at this restaurant found no problem with the food. It was eventually discovered that the frequent dimensional reversions caused by the nearby Temporal Anchor were to blame.
badges.desc_villain: Several investigations into food poisoning at this restaurant found no problem with the food. It was eventually discovered that the frequent dimensional reversions caused by the nearby Temporal Anchor were to blame.

badges.name: ReclusesVictoryTour8
badges.desc_hero: This tunnel leads directly to the Arachnos base. Freedom Corps used it as a staging area for surprise attacks until they were finally driven off and the tunnel entrance closed.
badges.desc_villain: This tunnel leads directly to the Arachnos base. Freedom Corps used it as a staging area for surprise attacks until they were finally driven off and the tunnel entrance closed.

badges.name: SharkheadTour1
badges.desc_hero: This is the spot where Mako paraded Scrapyard's body after he eviscerated him. Many of the locals have seen his ghost in this area.
badges.desc_villain: This is the spot where Mako paraded Scrapyard's body after he eviscerated him. Many of the locals have seen his ghost in this area.

badges.name: SharkheadTour2
badges.desc_hero: The Hell Forge is the largest aboveground furnace on the planet.
badges.desc_villain: The Hell Forge is the largest aboveground furnace on the planet.

badges.name: SharkheadTour3
badges.desc_hero: The Freakshow have managed to find utopia in this forsaken slag heap.
badges.desc_villain: The Freakshow have managed to find utopia in this forsaken slag heap.

badges.name: SharkheadTour4
badges.desc_hero: This hole is used by the locals as a makeshift arena for fighting and wagering.
badges.desc_villain: This hole is used by the locals as a makeshift arena for fighting and wagering.

badges.name: SirensCallTour1
badges.desc_hero: Randall's crew was captured and hanged on this spot. Randall himself escaped, along with most of his treasure, and was never seen again.
badges.desc_villain: Randall's crew was captured and hanged on this spot. Randall himself escaped, along with most of his treasure, and was never seen again.

badges.name: SirensCallTour2
badges.desc_hero: Councilman John Chard announced from this location that his island would be the front lines of defense against the Rikti invasion.
badges.desc_villain: Councilman John Chard announced from this location that his island would be the front lines of defense against the Rikti invasion.

badges.name: SirensCallTour3
badges.desc_hero: Talos spent a good part of his childhood here.
badges.desc_villain: Talos spent a good part of his childhood here.

badges.name: SirensCallTour4
badges.desc_hero: The dread pirate Randall set up this lighthouse to lure ships to their demise.
badges.desc_villain: The dread pirate Randall set up this lighthouse to lure ships to their demise.

badges.name: SirensCallTour5
badges.desc_hero: These rigs stand derelict still, waiting for the area to be secured and the great War Walls to be repaired.
badges.desc_villain: These rigs stand derelict still, waiting for the area to be secured and the great War Walls to be repaired.

badges.name: SirensCallTour6
badges.desc_hero: Although Nick has since set up shop at a new location on Talos Island, many former residents of Siren's Call still miss the atmosphere of the old stand.
badges.desc_villain: Although Nick has since set up shop at a new location on Talos Island, many former residents of Siren's Call still miss the atmosphere of the old stand.

badges.name: SirensCallTour7
badges.desc_hero: This building was shaken to its foundations, but it is still standing... and so are you.
badges.desc_villain: This building was shaken to its foundations, but it is still standing... and so are you.

badges.name: SirensCallTour8
badges.desc_hero: This refinery was already under investigation for its poor handling of explosive gases when the shockwave from the Sunburst incident created a chain reaction that leveled the entire complex.
badges.desc_villain: This refinery was already under investigation for its poor handling of explosive gases when the shockwave from the Sunburst incident created a chain reaction that leveled the entire complex.

badges.name: StMartialTour1
badges.desc_hero: Twos are wild, but not as wild as you!
badges.desc_villain: Twos are wild, but not as wild as you!

badges.name: StMartialTour2
badges.desc_hero: Most of Paragon City agrees that you've paid your debts to society. Most, but not all.
badges.desc_villain: The weeds of crime bear bitter fruit.

badges.name: StMartialTour3
badges.desc_hero: What strange purpose do these glyphs serve?
badges.desc_villain: What strange purpose do these glyphs serve?

badges.name: StMartialTour4
badges.desc_hero: You've finally done it! You've mastered the art of mixing the elusive 'Camel Snot.'
badges.desc_villain: You've finally done it! You've mastered the art of mixing the elusive 'Camel Snot.'

badges.name: TutorialTour3
badges.desc_hero: It is rumored around the Zig that the Bug Man escaped from this location.
badges.desc_villain: It is rumored around the Zig that the Bug Man escaped from this location.

badges.name: WarburgTour1
badges.desc_hero: Warburg is home to many a nefarious ploy. Recluse's VENOM rocket is one of the most blatant.
badges.desc_villain: Warburg is home to many a nefarious ploy. Recluse's VENOM rocket is one of the most blatant.

badges.name: WarburgTour2
badges.desc_hero: The various tunnels throughout the WEB are a nasty piece of work.
badges.desc_villain: The various tunnels throughout the WEB are a nasty piece of work.

badges.name: WarburgTour3
badges.desc_hero: The symbolism is hard to miss: whoever controls the Warburg rockets controls the world. Whether this is pure delusion or an ominous warning is a subject of much debate.
badges.desc_villain: The symbolism is hard to miss: whoever controls the Warburg rockets controls the world. Whether this is pure delusion or an ominous warning is a subject of much debate.

badges.name: WarburgTour4
badges.desc_hero: Whether intended or not, the structure in front of you looks like a 1980s novelty toy that has seen better days.
badges.desc_villain: Whether intended or not, the structure in front of you looks like a 1980s novelty toy that has seen better days.

badges.name: WarburgTour5
badges.desc_hero: Arachnos 'forcibly evicted' the Council from Warburg in the late 1960s. What remains of the Council's resources has been boxed up and left to collect dust for over fifty years.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos 'forcibly evicted' the Council from Warburg in the late 1960s. What remains of the Council's resources has been boxed up and left to collect dust for over fifty years.

badges.name: WarburgTour6
badges.desc_hero: From this vantage point you can observe Malta's Hercules Titans as they prepare for deployment.
badges.desc_villain: From this vantage point you can observe Malta's Hercules Titans as they prepare for deployment.

badges.name: WarburgTour7
badges.desc_hero: Warburg ceased manufacturing nuclear warheads when the treaty was signed in 1982, but not before producing an enormous stockpile.
badges.desc_villain: Warburg ceased manufacturing nuclear warheads when the treaty was signed in 1982, but not before producing an enormous stockpile.

badges.name: WarburgTour8
badges.desc_hero: This bunker was where the Council made their final stand against Arachnos. The battle for the bunker lasted two weeks, until Lord Recluse was forced to personally lead the final assault.
badges.desc_villain: This bunker was where the Council made their final stand against Arachnos. The battle for the bunker lasted two weeks, until Lord Recluse was forced to personally lead the final assault.

badges.name: MayhemMap1
badges.desc_hero: As a villain you struck at Atlas Park, the very heart of Paragon City, proving you must always be vigilant in its defense.
badges.desc_villain: You've struck at Atlas Park, the very heart of Paragon City, proving nowhere is safe from villainy!

badges.name: MayhemMap2
badges.desc_hero: This is the spot in Kings Row of a famous bloodbath where the Marcone made a vicious power play against the Verandi.
badges.desc_villain: This is the spot in Kings Row of a famous bloodbath where the Marcone made a vicious power play against the Verandi.

badges.name: MayhemMap3
badges.desc_hero: Hair pin risers like this road in Skyway City can incite rage even in pedestrians.
badges.desc_villain: Hair pin risers like this road in Skyway City can incite rage even in pedestrians.

badges.name: MayhemMap4
badges.desc_hero: Not even the hardened metal made in these factories of Steel Canyon was able to protect this city from determined villains. Good thing Paragon has you now to do it.
badges.desc_villain: Not even the hardened metal made in these factories of Steel Canyon can protect the city from you.

badges.name: MayhemMap5
badges.desc_hero: The Family doesn't make as many deals on the beach in Independence Port since you started working in Paragon.
badges.desc_villain: It isn't uncommon to see the Family taking associates for a walk with cement shoes at this beach in Independence Port.

badges.name: MayhemMap6
badges.desc_hero: You know all the possible places where criminals lurk to ambush people in Talos - knowledge that only someone from the other side could have.
badges.desc_villain: Back alleys in Talos Island like this one are perfect for waiting in ambush.

badges.name: MayhemMap7
badges.desc_hero: You have discovered an underground safe house in Brickstown kept right under the noses of the PPD.
badges.desc_villain: You have discovered an underground safe house in Brickstown kept right under the noses of the PPD.

badges.name: MayhemMap8
badges.desc_hero: It was here that the Devouring Earth nearly set off a biological bomb to infect the citizens of Founders' Falls.
badges.desc_villain: It was here that the Devouring Earth nearly set off a biological bomb to infect the citizens of Founders' Falls.

badges.name: MayhemMap9
badges.desc_hero: You'd hate to have to defend Portal Corps from the Arachnos Flyer should it ever return to Peregrine Island.
badges.desc_villain: Even this gateway to Portal Corps in Peregrine Island couldn't keep you out with the help of the Arachnos Flyer.

badges.name: SafeguardMap1
badges.desc_hero: Due to a glitch in the Paragon Nav System, Jose "Broken" Brogan stood here, but many heroes had trouble finding him.
badges.desc_villain: Due to a glitch in the Paragon Nav System, Jose "Broken" Brogan stood here, but many heroes had trouble finding him.

badges.name: SafeguardMap2
badges.desc_hero: The Clockwork Paladin, a menace to the city, was once spotted running around in this area.
badges.desc_villain: The Clockwork Paladin, a menace to the city, was once spotted running around in this area.

badges.name: SafeguardMap3
badges.desc_hero: The major highway that runs alongside this warehouse is frequently used by the "dyne-addled" Supa-Trolls.
badges.desc_villain: The major highway that runs alongside this warehouse is frequently used by the "dyne-addled" Supa-Trolls.

badges.name: SafeguardMap4
badges.desc_hero: The Hellions attempted to burn Steel Canyon to the ground. This block is where one of the first fires was started.
badges.desc_villain: The Hellions attempted to burn Steel Canyon to the ground. This block is where one of the first fires was started.

badges.name: SafeguardMap5
badges.desc_hero: Synapse has been seen speeding along the monorail tracks all throughout the city. Independence Port is one of his favorites.
badges.desc_villain: Synapse has been seen speeding along the monorail tracks all throughout the city. Independence Port is one of his favorites.

badges.name: SafeguardMap6
badges.desc_hero: Years ago, Rularuu tore down the barriers between our dimensions and sent one of many invasion forces to this block. Heroes from all over fought back the invaders.
badges.desc_villain: Years ago, Rularuu tore down the barriers between our dimensions and sent one of many invasion forces to this block. Heroes from all over fought back the invaders.

badges.name: SafeguardMap7
badges.desc_hero: The Freedom Phalanx and WISDOM stopped a massive Banished Pantheon attack in this area.
badges.desc_villain: The Freedom Phalanx and WISDOM stopped a massive Banished Pantheon attack in this area.

badges.name: SafeguardMap8
badges.desc_hero: After a hostile takeover by the Council, this was one of the last places the few 5th Column troops were seen retreating.
badges.desc_villain: After a hostile takeover by the Council, this was one of the last places the few 5th Column troops were seen retreating.

badges.name: SafeguardMap9
badges.desc_hero: The whimsical Gamester placed several presents all throughout Peregrine Island during the holidays. This block had a few of them.
badges.desc_villain: The whimsical Gamester placed several presents all throughout Peregrine Island during the holidays. This block had a few of them.

badges.name: CageFighter
badges.desc_hero: Fighting in a nice big arena is one thing, but fighting in a cage is completely... different. Only the strong survive a cage match.
badges.desc_villain: Fighting in a nice big arena is one thing, but fighting in a cage is completely... different. Only the strong survive a cage match.

badges.name: BigTime
badges.desc_hero: 'The Fambly', as Joe Young would call them, had been dipping their fingers into the RMFC for some time. As luck would have it, DJ Zero offered Joe and Cornelius a chance to expand their business venture. The Monkey Fight Club Arena and Pocket D are a one-two punch that will certainly be a knockout!
badges.desc_villain: 'The Fambly', as Joe Young would call them, had been dipping their fingers into the RMFC for some time. As luck would have it, DJ Zero offered Joe and Cornelius a chance to expand their business venture. The Monkey Fight Club Arena and Pocket D are a one-two punch that will certainly be a knockout!

badges.name: TruckerTour
badges.desc_hero: You've visited the floating truck in Pocket D.
badges.desc_villain: You've visited the floating truck in Pocket D.

badges.name: AbyssTour1
badges.desc_hero: You have located where the Devouring Earth have attempted to bring forth the Hamidon outside of the prying eyes of Paragon City.
badges.desc_villain: You have located where the Devouring Earth have attempted to bring forth the Hamidon outside of the prying eyes of Paragon City.

badges.name: AbyssTour2
badges.desc_hero: You have visited the infamous 'Site C', where genetic experiments took place before the Devouring Earth took over the Abyss.
badges.desc_villain: You have visited the infamous 'Site C', where genetic experiments took place before the Devouring Earth took over the Abyss.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour1
badges.desc_hero: You have entered the Vanguard base where all your efforts will now go towards fighting the Rikti. The Vanguard and your natural enemies are now your allies.
badges.desc_villain: You have entered the Vanguard base where all your efforts will now go towards fighting the Rikti. The Vanguard and your natural enemies are now your allies.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour2
badges.desc_hero: You have managed to get into the Crey base of operations. Nice work. Now how do you plan to get out?
badges.desc_villain: You have managed to get into the Crey base of operations. Nice work. Now how do you plan to get out?

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour3
badges.desc_hero: This power plant is the glue that holds the operation together. Without it, there would be chaos.
badges.desc_villain: This power plant is the glue that holds the operation together. Without it, there would be chaos.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour4
badges.desc_hero: The Rikti's continuous attacks on this hospital prompted Paragon City officials to shut it down.
badges.desc_villain: The Rikti's continuous attacks on this hospital prompted Paragon City officials to shut it down.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour5
badges.desc_hero: You just stepped into a major battle zone. Was this all that you signed up for?
badges.desc_villain: You just stepped into a major battle zone. Was this all that you signed up for?

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour6
badges.desc_hero: The Council has taken over this building as their base of operations. You might want to watch your back.
badges.desc_villain: The Council has taken over this building as their base of operations. You might want to watch your back.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour7
badges.desc_hero: This is the base Malta likes to call home. Your name wasn't exactly on the welcome mat.
badges.desc_villain: This is the base Malta likes to call home. Your name wasn't exactly on the welcome mat.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour8
badges.desc_hero: The Devouring Earth have chosen this spot to start bringing paradise back to a war-torn city.
badges.desc_villain: The Devouring Earth have chosen this spot to start bringing paradise back to a war-torn city.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour9
badges.desc_hero: This is where some military vehicles went to die.
badges.desc_villain: This is where some military vehicles went to die.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour10
badges.desc_hero: The Rikti mother ship ripped a path through this area when it crashed into the ground.
badges.desc_villain: The Rikti mother ship ripped a path through this area when it crashed into the ground.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour11
badges.desc_hero: This fort is a prime location for surveilling Rikti activity. Unfortunately, its close proximity to the crash site also makes it a big target for the Rikti.
badges.desc_villain: This fort is a prime location for surveilling Rikti activity. Unfortunately, its close proximity to the crash site also makes it a big target for the Rikti.

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour12
badges.desc_hero: If you've made it onto the Rikti Ship, under the defensive shields, you're either very brave or...
badges.desc_villain: If you've made it onto the Rikti Ship, under the defensive shields, you're either very brave or...

badges.name: RiktiWarZoneTour13
badges.desc_hero: This is an excellent vantage point for keeping an eye on the crash site.
badges.desc_villain: This is an excellent vantage point for keeping an eye on the crash site.

badges.name: OuroborosTour1
badges.desc_hero: Welcome to Ouroboros. You have a feeling that there is a lot of work that needs to be done.
badges.desc_villain: Welcome to Ouroboros. You have a feeling that there is a lot of work that needs to be done.

badges.name: CimeroraTour1
badges.desc_hero: You have traveled back in time to the Roman era. Here are the origins of all you have come to understand as heroic and villainous.
badges.desc_villain: You have traveled back in time to the Roman era. Here are the origins of all you have come to understand as heroic and villainous.

badges.name: BattleHardened
badges.desc_hero: The loyal legions of Cimerora have prevailed in battle against an enemy wielding unimaginable power.
badges.desc_villain: The loyal legions of Cimerora have prevailed in battle against an enemy wielding unimaginable power.

badges.name: CimeroraTour3
badges.desc_hero: The Temple of Phoebas offers refuge to wives and widows of Cimeroran soldiers, including those loyal to Romulus. Despite Imperious' concerns about enemy spies, Sister Solaris will only permit guards to remain at the gates as long as they are allowed entry.
badges.desc_villain: The Temple of Phoebas offers refuge to wives and widows of Cimeroran soldiers, including those loyal to Romulus. Despite Imperious' concerns about enemy spies, Sister Solaris will only permit guards to remain at the gates as long as they are allowed entry.

badges.name: CimeroraTour4
badges.desc_hero: Positioned toward the eastern sun from which it draws its power, the Altar of Phoebas is one of the most important monuments within Cimerora. The Oracle of the Seers has relied on its continued guidance in order to steer Cimerora through many of its darkest hours.
badges.desc_villain: Positioned toward the eastern sun from which it draws its power, the Altar of Phoebas is one of the most important monuments within Cimerora. The Oracle of the Seers has relied on its continued guidance in order to steer Cimerora through many of its darkest hours.

badges.name: CimeroraTour5
badges.desc_hero: The Cimeroran Traitors have kept Castellum Quarter under their control for years. The walls have proven to be nearly impossible to breach, successfully rendering the fortress unreachable to even the strongest warriors.
badges.desc_villain: The Cimeroran Traitors have kept Castellum Quarter under their control for years. The walls have proven to be nearly impossible to breach, successfully rendering the fortress unreachable to even the strongest warriors.

badges.name: CimeroraTour6
badges.desc_hero: Deep inside Castellum Quarter, soldiers once loyal to Imperious now plot his downfall. Despite alien and magical influence, it was just the basic nature of humanity to follow the strong, regardless of their morality, that helped swell Romulus' ranks.
badges.desc_villain: Deep inside Castellum Quarter, soldiers once loyal to Imperious now plot his downfall. Despite alien and magical influence, it was just the basic nature of humanity to follow the strong, regardless of their morality, that helped swell Romulus' ranks.

badges.name: CimeroraTour7
badges.desc_hero: Before proclaiming himself Emperor, Romulus Augustus was often seen visiting this rampart in the mountains. Always alone, he would spend hours staring out towards the open sea. Some claim this was the birthplace of his machinations to overthrow Imperious and conquer Cimerora.
badges.desc_villain: Before proclaiming himself Emperor, Romulus Augustus was often seen visiting this rampart in the mountains. Always alone, he would spend hours staring out towards the open sea. Some claim this was the birthplace of his machinations to overthrow Imperious and conquer Cimerora.

badges.name: CimeroraTour8
badges.desc_hero: The mighty beasts that roam the hills of Cimerora guard certain cave entrances fiercely. Rumours say that 'dark ones' are the source of their power, and entering those caves is the first step in walking the Path of the Dark.
badges.desc_villain: The mighty beasts that roam the hills of Cimerora guard certain cave entrances fiercely. Rumours say that 'dark ones' are the source of their power, and entering those caves is the first step in walking the Path of the Dark.

badges.name: MSClubTour1
badges.desc_hero: Within these walls rest the greatest minds of mystic, occult and arcane magics.
badges.desc_villain: Within these walls rest the greatest minds of mystic, occult and arcane magics.

badges.name: MissionArchitectTourism
badges.desc_hero: You're always looking for new forms of entertainment, and it's said that the Mission Architect technology is entertainment in its purest form.
badges.desc_villain: You're always looking for new forms of entertainment, and it's said that the Mission Architect technology is entertainment in its purest form.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour7
badges.desc_hero: The first rule of Infected Fight Club is that you don't talk about it. At least that's what the RIP told you after you walked in on one of their Infected Fighting Rings in Mercy.
badges.desc_villain: The first rule of Infected Fight Club is that you don't talk about it. At least that's what the RIP told you after you walked in on one of their Infected Fighting Rings in Mercy.

badges.name: MercyIslandTour8
badges.desc_hero: Larry's Tiki Lounge is known for its gambling, drinks, fun, and Tikis. And also for the occasional invasion by giant snake monsters.
badges.desc_villain: Larry's Tiki Lounge is known for its gambling, drinks, fun, and Tikis. And also for the occasional invasion by giant snake monsters.

badges.name: PortOakesTour5
badges.desc_hero: These long parking tunnels are the last thing that many who cross the Marcones see when they're asked to "come take a long walk." Those who live in Port Oakes know to steer clear - and that all of the cars in the lot belong to the Marcones.
badges.desc_villain: These long parking tunnels are the last thing that many who cross the Marcones see when they're asked to "come take a long walk." Those who live in Port Oakes know to steer clear - and that all of the cars in the lot belong to the Marcones.

badges.name: PortOakesTour6
badges.desc_hero: This towering skyscraper used to belong to the Marcones before Arachnos seized it for the purpose of "overseeing operations in Port Oakes." The Marcones have been bitter about it ever since.
badges.desc_villain: This towering skyscraper used to belong to the Marcones before Arachnos seized it for the purpose of "overseeing operations in Port Oakes." The Marcones have been bitter about it ever since.

badges.name: PortOakesTour7
badges.desc_hero: The Mount Diable Tunnel, destroyed following a turf war gone explosive, connected Port Oakes to Cap au Diable. Much to the chagrin of many commuters, no effort has been made to rebuild it.
badges.desc_villain: The Mount Diable Tunnel, destroyed following a turf war gone explosive, connected Port Oakes to Cap au Diable. Much to the chagrin of many commuters, no effort has been made to rebuild it.

badges.name: PortOakesTour8
badges.desc_hero: When things became heated between rival families, heads of the Marcones have been known to hide in this cabin, sometimes using the nearby submarine to escape to better grounds. Some say this may even be where the first monkey fight club was started.
badges.desc_villain: When things became heated between rival families, heads of the Marcones have been known to hide in this cabin, sometimes using the nearby submarine to escape to better grounds. Some say this may even be where the first monkey fight club was started.

badges.name: CapAuDiableTour6
badges.desc_hero: The Luddites have taken over this part of the forest and use it as their main gathering place to preach about the evil schemes of Dr. Aeon. Sometimes they just theorize on the significance of the orange pipes. Despite their attempts to malign his character, Dr. Aeon has yet to drive them out of the area.
badges.desc_villain: The Luddites have taken over this part of the forest and use it as their main gathering place to preach about the evil schemes of Dr. Aeon. Sometimes they just theorize on the significance of the orange pipes. Despite their attempts to malign his character, Dr. Aeon has yet to drive them out of the area.

badges.name: CapAuDiableTour7
badges.desc_hero: Dr. Aeon designed this giant globe of an atom to signify the advances that science has brought to Cap au Diable.
badges.desc_villain: Dr. Aeon designed this giant globe of an atom to signify the advances that science has brought to Cap au Diable.

badges.name: CapAuDiableTour8
badges.desc_hero: No one is quite sure about the purpose of these odd monuments. Some say that Dr. Aeon sent a squad of Arachnos to decimate them long ago and though his minions managed to destroy one, spirits haunted Dr. Aeon for weeks. The operation was inexplicably called off.
badges.desc_villain: No one is quite sure about the purpose of these odd monuments. Some say that Dr. Aeon sent a squad of Arachnos to decimate them long ago and though his minions managed to destroy one, spirits haunted Dr. Aeon for weeks. The operation was inexplicably called off.

badges.name: SharkheadTour5
badges.desc_hero: The Sky Raiders use this as one of their main bases. Some say that they received funding from Arachnos to build the base in Sharkhead, perhaps to serve as a balance against the Council base nearby.
badges.desc_villain: The Sky Raiders use this as one of their main bases. Some say that they received funding from Arachnos to build the base in Sharkhead, perhaps to serve as a balance against the Council base nearby.

badges.name: SharkheadTour6
badges.desc_hero: This Council base has managed to maintain its foothold within Sharkhead despite numerous attacks from several groups. These days, the biggest threats are the 5th Column raids and exposing sleeper agents among Council ranks.
badges.desc_villain: This Council base has managed to maintain its foothold within Sharkhead despite numerous attacks from several groups. These days, the biggest threats are the 5th Column raids and exposing sleeper agents among Council ranks.

badges.name: SharkheadTour7
badges.desc_hero: The Family's mansion in Villa Requin has played host to many higher ranking officials within the Sky Raiders. There are rumors that the two groups plot a potential take over of Sharkhead Isle within this mansion.
badges.desc_villain: The Family's mansion in Villa Requin has played host to many higher ranking officials within the Sky Raiders. There are rumors that the two groups plot a potential take over of Sharkhead Isle within this mansion.

badges.name: SharkheadTour8
badges.desc_hero: The Carpe Diem is the Family's 'flagship' for various overseas deals that they make. The ship is periodically grounded to deal with troublesome Scrapyarders.
badges.desc_villain: The Carpe Diem is the Family's 'flagship' for various overseas deals that they make. The ship is periodically grounded to deal with troublesome Scrapyarders.

badges.name: NervaTour6
badges.desc_hero: Crey Corporation has been known to invite tourist groups to see the experiments caged in these pens. They justify their actions by claiming the research is to better understand the various subjects contained here.
badges.desc_villain: Crey Corporation has been known to invite tourist groups to see the experiments caged in these pens. They justify their actions by claiming the research is to better understand the various subjects contained here.

badges.name: NervaTour7
badges.desc_hero: Longbow uses these state-of-the-art facilities to perform experiments on a small group of monsters they encounter. Longbow policy dictates that they turn their charges in to the proper authorities back in Paragon, but Agincourt officials routinely turn a blind eye to this facility's activities.
badges.desc_villain: Longbow uses these state-of-the-art facilities to perform experiments on a small group of monsters they encounter. Longbow policy dictates that they turn their charges in to the proper authorities back in Paragon, but Agincourt officials routinely turn a blind eye to this facility's activities.

badges.name: NervaTour8
badges.desc_hero: The area behind this waterfall is said to be a secret spot where Scirocco goes to meditate during periods of stress. Marks on the wall indicate a major brawl between Scirocco and Black Scorpion (most likely due to Black Scorpion making fun of Scirocco for meditating).
badges.desc_villain: The area behind this waterfall is said to be a secret spot where Scirocco goes to meditate during periods of stress. Marks on the wall indicate a major brawl between Scirocco and Black Scorpion (most likely due to Black Scorpion making fun of Scirocco for meditating).

badges.name: StMartialTour5
badges.desc_hero: This dead tree within St. Martial is said to be haunted by the ghost of a man who tried to chop it down. People say that if you look closely, you can see glimpses of the man's skeleton, waiting to be released from his torture...
badges.desc_villain: This dead tree within St. Martial is said to be haunted by the ghost of a man who tried to chop it down. People say that if you look closely, you can see glimpses of the man's skeleton, waiting to be released from his torture...

badges.name: StMartialTour6
badges.desc_hero: These slums are known to house people who have lost everything at the Golden Giza. These wanderers have become large enough in numbers to form their own community.
badges.desc_villain: These slums are known to house people who have lost everything at the Golden Giza. These wanderers have become large enough in numbers to form their own community.

badges.name: StMartialTour7
badges.desc_hero: This pile of rubble used to be one of the largest skyscrapers within St. Martial. When the Wailers appeared, a huge battle broke out among Wailers, Arachnos and the Family, which led to the utter destruction of this building and the spread of Wailers into St. Martial.
badges.desc_villain: This pile of rubble used to be one of the largest skyscrapers within St. Martial. When the Wailers appeared, a huge battle broke out among Wailers, Arachnos and the Family, which led to the utter destruction of this building and the spread of Wailers into St. Martial.

badges.name: StMartialTour8
badges.desc_hero: Hundreds of spectators have stood in this spot, transfixed by the eclectic performances of the Carnival of Shadows. Many of them are never seen again; some speculate that they've joined the troupe, while others fear they met more unpleasant fates.
badges.desc_villain: Hundreds of spectators have stood in this spot, transfixed by the eclectic performances of the Carnival of Shadows. Many of them are never seen again; some speculate that they've joined the troupe, while others fear they met more unpleasant fates.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour5
badges.desc_hero: These underground tunnels are the only relatively safe way to get into the Fab. They are used as both an emergency exit from the Fab and as a method of sending in reinforcements straight from Grandville proper, should Longbow try to launch an offensive attack.
badges.desc_villain: These underground tunnels are the only relatively safe way to get into the Fab. They are used as both an emergency exit from the Fab and as a method of sending in reinforcements straight from Grandville proper, should Longbow try to launch an offensive attack.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour6
badges.desc_hero: This large display screen fell off its holster after a particularly rough battle between Black Scorpion and Captain Mako. It was supposed to be fixed, but progress kept halting as workers became too distracted by the images on the screen.
badges.desc_villain: This large display screen fell off its holster after a particularly rough battle between Black Scorpion and Captain Mako. It was supposed to be fixed, but progress kept halting as workers became too distracted by the images on the screen.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour7
badges.desc_hero: Arachnos stationed here are the first line of defense against any Arachnoids trying to break out of the Gutter. Arachnoids foolish enough to attempt an attack from above ground never succeed, though it's well known that most Arachnoids utilize their own underground tunnels to travel.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos stationed here are the first line of defense against any Arachnoids trying to break out of the Gutter. Arachnoids foolish enough to attempt an attack from above ground never succeed, though it's well known that most Arachnoids utilize their own underground tunnels to travel.

badges.name: GrandvilleTour8
badges.desc_hero: These dangerous catwalks have resulted in a handful of Arachnos soldiers unwittingly falling into the depths of the Gutter, disappearing forever. At first, search and rescue missions were initiated to attempt to recover the missing soldiers, but were soon called off. Arachnos uses the disappearances as a valuable lesson on being alert during patrol.
badges.desc_villain: These dangerous catwalks have resulted in a handful of Arachnos soldiers unwittingly falling into the depths of the Gutter, disappearing forever. At first, search and rescue missions were initiated to attempt to recover the missing soldiers, but were soon called off. Arachnos uses the disappearances as a valuable lesson on being alert during patrol.

badges.name: HollowsTour6
badges.desc_hero: Longbow works side by side with the Legacy Chain to maintain this small outpost in the Hollows, using it to relay the activities of the Circle of Thorns in the nearby area. They have run into ongoing issues with the various gangs in the Hollows spray-painting the building with their logos.
badges.desc_villain: Longbow works side by side with the Legacy Chain to maintain this small outpost in the Hollows, using it to relay the activities of the Circle of Thorns in the nearby area. They have run into ongoing issues with the various gangs in the Hollows spray-painting the building with their logos.

badges.name: HollowsTour7
badges.desc_hero: The Legacy Chain has been seeking the purpose of these strange structures that have been created by the Circle. They have been working together with their Rogue Isles branch, who are investigating similar structures in Cap au Diable. Some theorize they're teleporters, while others suggest they're beacons for powerful demons in the underworld.
badges.desc_villain: The Legacy Chain has been seeking the purpose of these strange structures that have been created by the Circle. They have been working together with their Rogue Isles branch, who are investigating similar structures in Cap au Diable. Some theorize they're teleporters, while others suggest they're beacons for powerful demons in the underworld.

badges.name: HollowsTour8
badges.desc_hero: The Pinnacle Apartments were some of the most sought after apartments in Eastgate, until the Hollowing. Now all that's left to remember them is this billboard. Some say it's ironic that it would be the last thing still standing.
badges.desc_villain: The Pinnacle Apartments were some of the most sought after apartments in Eastgate, until the Hollowing. Now all that's left to remember them is this billboard. Some say it's ironic that it would be the last thing still standing.

badges.name: GalaxyCityTour6
badges.desc_hero: Galaxy Girl's sacrifice to save the people of Paragon City has not gone unnoticed, prompting this tremendous statue to be built in honor of her. Galaxy Girl's father visited the statue every day until he passed away at the age of 91.
badges.desc_villain: Galaxy Girl's sacrifice to save the people of Paragon City has not gone unnoticed, prompting this tremendous statue to be built in honor of her. Galaxy Girl's father visited the statue every day until he passed away at the age of 91.

badges.name: GalaxyCityTour7
badges.desc_hero: Gemini Park was once a popular gathering spot for people in the city, until the Hellions and Vahzilok took over. On some occasions many heroes could be seen relaxing in the area, daring the local gangs to try something. The people of Paragon would hold events on these days, happy to have their park wrested away from the hands of criminals.
badges.desc_villain: Gemini Park was once a popular gathering spot for people in the city, until the Hellions and Vahzilok took over. On some occasions many heroes could be seen relaxing in the area, daring the local gangs to try something. The people of Paragon would hold events on these days, happy to have their park wrested away from the hands of criminals.

badges.name: GalaxyCityTour8
badges.desc_hero: This statue commemorates the hero Orion, whom Orion Beltway was renamed after. During the first Rikti War, Orion fought valiantly against the Rikti, saving the people of this small district. He was remembered, in particular, as the hero with no real powers beyond his knowledge of martial arts.
badges.desc_villain: This statue commemorates the hero Orion, whom Orion Beltway was renamed after. During the first Rikti War, Orion fought valiantly against the Rikti, saving the people of this small district. He was remembered, in particular, as the hero with no real powers beyond his knowledge of martial arts.

badges.name: KingsRowTour6
badges.desc_hero: This area was slated to be the original site for the Wentworth's Consignments in Kings Row. Unfortunately, constant debates over who actually owns the site, as well as the neighborhood's concern over increased traffic, halted construction.
badges.desc_villain: This area was slated to be the original site for the Wentworth's Consignments in Kings Row. Unfortunately, constant debates over who actually owns the site, as well as the neighborhood's concern over increased traffic, halted construction.

badges.name: KingsRowTour7
badges.desc_hero: Locals in High Park have complained to the Pawn Store owner about fixing his sign, saying that it tends to draw the Freakshow to the neighborhood for laughs. The owner adamantly refuses to change the sign, insisting that it is "hilarious." He can be seen speaking with the residents in High Park while wearing a shirt with the word "LOLCOPTER" on it.
badges.desc_villain: Locals in High Park have complained to the Pawn Store owner about fixing his sign, saying that it tends to draw the Freakshow to the neighborhood for laughs. The owner adamantly refuses to change the sign, insisting that it is "hilarious." He can be seen speaking with the residents in High Park while wearing a shirt with the word "LOLCOPTER" on it.

badges.name: KingsRowTour8
badges.desc_hero: This is the wreckage of a warehouse owned by the Family. The man who killed Blue Steel's father was rumored to be taking shelter here. Blue Steel went to investigate, only to discover the Family had rigged the warehouse to explode. Blue Steel survived the explosion and has continued the hunt for his father's killer to this day.
badges.desc_villain: This is the wreckage of a warehouse owned by the Family. The man who killed Blue Steel's father was rumored to be taking shelter here. Blue Steel went to investigate, only to discover the Family had rigged the warehouse to explode. Blue Steel survived the explosion and has continued the hunt for his father's killer to this day.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour5
badges.desc_hero: Paragon Dance Party was a popular place for local heroes to go relax and have a good time. However, its popularity was almost instantly eclipsed when Pocket D was opened by the Dance Party's owner, DJ Zero. The Dance Party now has an almost underground vibe.
badges.desc_villain: Paragon Dance Party was a popular place for local heroes to go relax and have a good time. However, its popularity was almost instantly eclipsed when Pocket D was opened by the Dance Party's owner, DJ Zero. The Dance Party now has an almost underground vibe.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour6
badges.desc_hero: The statue of the heroine "The Night Hammer" has been the focus of two controversies. The first was Night Hammer's disgust at how the statue turned out. The second was the "mysterious" disappearance of the architect who designed the statue.
badges.desc_villain: The statue of the heroine "The Night Hammer" has been the focus of two controversies. The first was Night Hammer's disgust at how the statue turned out. The second was the "mysterious" disappearance of the architect who designed the statue.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour7
badges.desc_hero: Officials in Steel Canyon have kept secret what exactly they've been working on here. There have been many speculations as to what it could be. One of the crazier theories is that there is no true "purpose" to the construction - that all of this somehow just appeared one day and exists solely to distract the heroes of Paragon City.
badges.desc_villain: Officials in Steel Canyon have kept secret what exactly they've been working on here. There have been many speculations as to what it could be. One of the crazier theories is that there is no true "purpose" to the construction - that all of this somehow just appeared one day and exists solely to distract the heroes of Paragon City.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour8
badges.desc_hero: Platinum Lake is a popular spot for people in Paragon to sit back and relax. There has been a long legal battle for Chris Jenkins to take down the billboard that he put up there, many saying it spoils the view. Jenkins has won every single case and states that he only has it up to serve the people when the heroes of Paragon 'aren't doing their jobs.'
badges.desc_villain: Platinum Lake is a popular spot for people in Paragon to sit back and relax. There has been a long legal battle for Chris Jenkins to take down the billboard that he put up there, many saying it spoils the view. Jenkins has won every single case and states that he only has it up to serve the people when the heroes of Paragon 'aren't doing their jobs.'

badges.name: SkywayCityTour5
badges.desc_hero: This statue of the Red Tiger, aka Jake Montoya, was erected after he lost his leg fighting the Clockwork King. Hero Corps supplied Jake with a prosthetic limb afterwards, but he would never be able to fight crime again. Some of his friends worry that Jake spends too much time around this statue, obsessing over his better days.
badges.desc_villain: This statue of the Red Tiger, aka Jake Montoya, was erected after he lost his leg fighting the Clockwork King. Hero Corps supplied Jake with a prosthetic limb afterwards, but he would never be able to fight crime again. Some of his friends worry that Jake spends too much time around this statue, obsessing over his better days.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour6
badges.desc_hero: With Faultline gaining traffic, many people are calling for more apartments to be built in this area and for Longbow to move their Bloody Bay heli-pad to another location. Longbow refuses, however, stating this is the safest place for them to be, and that they are also keeping the Lost of the area in check.
badges.desc_villain: With Faultline gaining traffic, many people are calling for more apartments to be built in this area and for Longbow to move their Bloody Bay heli-pad to another location. Longbow refuses, however, stating this is the safest place for them to be, and that they are also keeping the Lost of the area in check.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour7
badges.desc_hero: Before the Rikti War, the Red Tiger, Jake Montoya, used this area to train fellow heroes. The people of Paragon would gather on the weekends to watch the exciting 'Hide Park Sparring Sessions'. After his mandatory retirement, the sparring sessions stopped altogether.
badges.desc_villain: Before the Rikti War, the Red Tiger, Jake Montoya, used this area to train fellow heroes. The people of Paragon would gather on the weekends to watch the exciting 'Hide Park Sparring Sessions'. After his mandatory retirement, the sparring sessions stopped altogether.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour8
badges.desc_hero: The construction of Skyway's next set of bridges was halted by the first Rikti War and remains on hold. Citizens walking nearby constantly look at this bridge with some fear, noticing that its foundations grow weaker by the day. It may be only a matter of time until this bridge collapses.
badges.desc_villain: The construction of Skyway's next set of bridges was halted by the first Rikti War and remains on hold. Citizens walking nearby constantly look at this bridge with some fear, noticing that its foundations grow weaker by the day. It may be only a matter of time until this bridge collapses.

badges.name: CroatoaTour4
badges.desc_hero: Croatoa's own little Stonehenge has been the site of several battles against the supernatural powers who seek to consume this small town. Each attack has been foiled, though nearby residents still can't help but look at this site with some unease.
badges.desc_villain: Croatoa's own little Stonehenge has been the site of several battles against the supernatural powers who seek to consume this small town. Each attack has been foiled, though nearby residents still can't help but look at this site with some unease.

badges.name: CroatoaTour5
badges.desc_hero: Students from Croatoa University frequent this beach when it isn't being used as a battleground by the Tuatha and Cabal. Armed with video cameras, the students are determined to get a good look at the mythical Sally. The pictures taken of Sally here have been used in many 'Save Sally!' posters.
badges.desc_villain: Students from Croatoa University frequent this beach when it isn't being used as a battleground by the Tuatha and Cabal. Armed with video cameras, the students are determined to get a good look at the mythical Sally. The pictures taken of Sally here have been used in many 'Save Sally!' posters.

badges.name: CroatoaTour6
badges.desc_hero: This path of destruction was made by Jack in Irons, who stormed all the way here from his throne deep in the forests of Croatoa. The witches of the Cabal were barely able to push Jack back, but not before he destroyed much of their territory.
badges.desc_villain: This path of destruction was made by Jack in Irons, who stormed all the way here from his throne deep in the forests of Croatoa. The witches of the Cabal were barely able to push Jack back, but not before he destroyed much of their territory.

badges.name: CroatoaTour7
badges.desc_hero: Waylon McCrane, an infamous adventurer in Croatoa, lives in this home. Mayor Bower has asked Waylon to stay within the town limits due to the Fir Bolg, but Waylon insists that 'no pumpkin-headed monster will tell ME where to live!'
badges.desc_villain: Waylon McCrane, an infamous adventurer in Croatoa, lives in this home. Mayor Bower has asked Waylon to stay within the town limits due to the Fir Bolg, but Waylon insists that 'no pumpkin-headed monster will tell ME where to live!'

badges.name: CroatoaTour8
badges.desc_hero: This bridge is the site where Mayor Bower and Buck Salinger last met; Bower informed Salinger that his trek into Red Cap territory was a suicide mission. Salinger ignored the warning and continued forward, insisting that his skills as a Midnighter would prevail. So far, Salinger's luck - and survival skills - haven't failed him.
badges.desc_villain: This bridge is the site where Mayor Bower and Buck Salinger last met; Bower informed Salinger that his trek into Red Cap territory was a suicide mission. Salinger ignored the warning and continued forward, insisting that his skills as a Midnighter would prevail. So far, Salinger's luck - and survival skills - haven't failed him.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour4
badges.desc_hero: During the Second Rikti War, this hill was used by heroes as a gathering point to fight off the Rikti in Talos. Despite the large Rikti numbers, the heroes managed to repel them time after time from this very spot, allowing the rest of Talos Island's citizens to get to safety.
badges.desc_villain: During the Second Rikti War, this hill was used by heroes as a gathering point to fight off the Rikti in Talos. Despite the large Rikti numbers, the heroes managed to repel them time after time from this very spot, allowing the rest of Talos Island's citizens to get to safety.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour5
badges.desc_hero: This area is where the real Ajax was buried, after being killed by the thug Ralph Valetti, who stole his identity as well as his powers. After the revelation was made, officials rushed to recover Ajax's body, which is now preserved in an unknown area within the city.
badges.desc_villain: This area is where the real Ajax was buried, after being killed by the thug Ralph Valetti, who stole his identity as well as his powers. After the revelation was made, officials rushed to recover Ajax's body, which is now preserved in an unknown area within the city.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour6
badges.desc_hero: The hero known as 'The Commuter' recently thwarted an attempt by the 5th Column to blow up this bridge. Some people in Paragon think the plot to destroy the bridge was ridiculous, but The Commuter insists that 'this bridge means the world to all those who drive in and out of Talos every day.'
badges.desc_villain: The hero known as 'The Commuter' recently thwarted an attempt by the 5th Column to blow up this bridge. Some people in Paragon think the plot to destroy the bridge was ridiculous, but The Commuter insists that 'this bridge means the world to all those who drive in and out of Talos every day.'

badges.name: TalosIslandTour7
badges.desc_hero: After Dark Astoria was taken over by the Banished Pantheon, the construction workers of Paragon were ordered to demolish the road leading into the cursed city. The construction workers put in major overtime work to make it happen, and by week's end the road was gone, symbolizing that the city had left Astoria to the works of the Banished Pantheon.
badges.desc_villain: After Dark Astoria was taken over by the Banished Pantheon, the construction workers of Paragon were ordered to demolish the road leading into the cursed city. The construction workers put in major overtime work to make it happen, and by week's end the road was gone, symbolizing that the city had left Astoria to the works of the Banished Pantheon.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour8
badges.desc_hero: This boardwalk was started some time ago by Robert Cooling, who was seeking to create an alternative to Spanky's Boardwalk on the other end of Talos, mainly because he hated the name 'Spanky's Boardwalk'. He was mentioned in the news for some time before he mysteriously 'disappeared.' The PPD closed the case after years of research when no sign of Robert Cooling could be found.
badges.desc_villain: This boardwalk was started some time ago by Robert Cooling, who was seeking to create an alternative to Spanky's Boardwalk on the other end of Talos, mainly because he hated the name 'Spanky's Boardwalk'. He was mentioned in the news for some time before he mysteriously 'disappeared.' The PPD closed the case after years of research when no sign of Robert Cooling could be found.

badges.name: IndependencePortTour4
badges.desc_hero: This is where workers in Terra Volta are air lifted in. From here, they're taken by several Longbow skiffs into the heart of the reactor.
badges.desc_villain: This is where workers in Terra Volta are air lifted in. From here, they're taken by several Longbow skiffs into the heart of the reactor.

badges.name: IndependencePortTour5
badges.desc_hero: More than one unlucky individual has met his end in this area of the 'Cargo Maze.' The Family is known for luring their victims into this area before 'icing' them. It's easy enough for them to get away with it, as not many heroes wander around this area.
badges.desc_villain: More than one unlucky individual has met his end in this area of the 'Cargo Maze.' The Family is known for luring their victims into this area before 'icing' them. It's easy enough for them to get away with it, as not many heroes wander around this area.

badges.name: IndependencePortTour6
badges.desc_hero: The Family uses this area right in the shadow of Terra Volta to conduct various parties, and the occasional hit on one of their own. They've also been searching for secret entrances into the reactor, though so far they have been unsuccessful.
badges.desc_villain: The Family uses this area right in the shadow of Terra Volta to conduct various parties, and the occasional hit on one of their own. They've also been searching for secret entrances into the reactor, though so far they have been unsuccessful.

badges.name: IndependencePortTour7
badges.desc_hero: The Bell-Wave is the twin of the nearly destroyed Valor Bridge. Cynics say that the statue of the heroine at the end was built to inspire the bridge to be named after her, but the trend never took off.
badges.desc_villain: The Bell-Wave is the twin of the nearly destroyed Valor Bridge. Cynics say that the statue of the heroine at the end was built to inspire the bridge to be named after her, but the trend never took off.

badges.name: IndependencePortTour8
badges.desc_hero: Every member of Freedom Corps who works in this base is considered unlucky. The base is out of the way from everything in Paragon City and has a long daily commute. Arachnos occasionally tries to spy on this base, but even they can't be bothered to come out this far from everything.
badges.desc_villain: Every member of Freedom Corps who works in this base is considered unlucky. The base is out of the way from everything in Paragon City and has a long daily commute. Arachnos occasionally tries to spy on this base, but even they can't be bothered to come out this far from everything.

badges.name: FoundersFallsTour3
badges.desc_hero: Williams Square has always been seen as a place of safety by the people of Founders' Falls, who are constantly plagued by demons in the Circle of Thorns or the Devouring Earth. Unknown to the people, it is because each of the angelic statues overlooking it is embedded with a magical rune, warding off evil forces from the area. The presence of Numina and Infernal prevent the wards from being shattered easily - but if they were to be disposed of, it wouldn't be long until the wards were broken.
badges.desc_villain: Williams Square has always been seen as a place of safety by the people of Founders' Falls, who are constantly plagued by demons in the Circle of Thorns or the Devouring Earth. Unknown to the people, it is because each of the angelic statues overlooking it is embedded with a magical rune, warding off evil forces from the area. The presence of Numina and Infernal prevent the wards from being shattered easily - but if they were to be disposed of, it wouldn't be long until the wards were broken.

badges.name: FoundersFallsTour4
badges.desc_hero: The Devouring Earth's spread into Founders' Falls was stopped here, though it was far too late to save the city of Woodvale. Heroes fought the Devouring Earth menace for days before it was pushed back into Woodvale - for the most part. The monsters still wander through Founders' Falls, while its people live in the knowledge that should the Devouring Earth grow out of control once again, they will be the first to be consumed.
badges.desc_villain: The Devouring Earth's spread into Founders' Falls was stopped here, though it was far too late to save the city of Woodvale. Heroes fought the Devouring Earth menace for days before it was pushed back into Woodvale - for the most part. The monsters still wander through Founders' Falls, while its people live in the knowledge that should the Devouring Earth grow out of control once again, they will be the first to be consumed.

badges.name: FoundersFallsTour5
badges.desc_hero: During her time in the Knives of Artemis, Agent Indigo used this spot to assassinate many of her targets. She now presides over the area to remind herself of her past sins and to prevent the Knives from staining this area with any more blood.
badges.desc_villain: During her time in the Knives of Artemis, Agent Indigo used this spot to assassinate many of her targets. She now presides over the area to remind herself of her past sins and to prevent the Knives from staining this area with any more blood.

badges.name: FoundersFallsTour6
badges.desc_hero: The hills in this area of Founders' Falls were created almost instantly during the Devouring Earth's initial push into the city. A laboratory once stood here, but it was destroyed by the erupting earth that sprung up beneath it. If not for the intervention of the city's heroes, the rest of Founders' would have followed.
badges.desc_villain: The hills in this area of Founders' Falls were created almost instantly during the Devouring Earth's initial push into the city. A laboratory once stood here, but it was destroyed by the erupting earth that sprung up beneath it. If not for the intervention of the city's heroes, the rest of Founders' would have followed.

badges.name: FoundersFallsTour7
badges.desc_hero: This area is where Michelle Harvey, a local magician, made her last stand against the Circle of Thorns, who were trying to attack the nearby hospital. Michelle used all of her life force to erect a protective barrier around the hospital. A group of heroes arrived to drive back the Circle, but it was too late for them to save Michelle. Because of this brave sacrifice, the hospital was renamed in her honor.
badges.desc_villain: This area is where Michelle Harvey, a local magician, made her last stand against the Circle of Thorns, who were trying to attack the nearby hospital. Michelle used all of her life force to erect a protective barrier around the hospital. A group of heroes arrived to drive back the Circle, but it was too late for them to save Michelle. Because of this brave sacrifice, the hospital was renamed in her honor.

badges.name: FoundersFallsTour8
badges.desc_hero: Voodoo practitioner Cadao Kestrel fled into these tunnels after being accused of murder. Agent Six tracked him here and beat him within an inch of his life before arresting him. Cadao would later be cleared of all charges, but to this day he has not gone near Agent Six, claiming she is "out of her mind."
badges.desc_villain: Voodoo practitioner Cadao Kestrel fled into these tunnels after being accused of murder. Agent Six tracked him here and beat him within an inch of his life before arresting him. Cadao would later be cleared of all charges, but to this day he has not gone near Agent Six, claiming she is "out of her mind."

badges.name: BrickstownTour3
badges.desc_hero: The roof of the Zig is the site of the first breakout by Arachnos. Captain Mako had been captured by some heroes, only to escape, tearing a path of destruction through the Zig. It ended up on the roof, where he commandeered a Longbow Skiff to fly himself out. Mako was seen leaping from skiff to skiff during the aerial battle with Longbow until he dove into the waters of Talos to swim back to the Isles.
badges.desc_villain: The roof of the Zig is the site of the first breakout by Arachnos. Captain Mako had been captured by some heroes, only to escape, tearing a path of destruction through the Zig. It ended up on the roof, where he commandeered a Longbow Skiff to fly himself out. Mako was seen leaping from skiff to skiff during the aerial battle with Longbow until he dove into the waters of Talos to swim back to the Isles.

badges.name: BrickstownTour4
badges.desc_hero: When a fugitive escapes from the Zig, this area is the first place that the PPD patrol. The Freakshow frequently make deals with inmates - they'll hold off the PPD if the escapees join the Freakshow.  This either leads to the Freakshow increasing their ranks or hunting down the fugitives who break their end of the bargain.
badges.desc_villain: When a fugitive escapes from the Zig, this area is the first place that the PPD patrol. The Freakshow frequently make deals with inmates - they'll hold off the PPD if the escapees join the Freakshow.  This either leads to the Freakshow increasing their ranks or hunting down the fugitives who break their end of the bargain.

badges.name: BrickstownTour5
badges.desc_hero: The Mashu Bridge was built in Brickstown long before construction on the Zig began. Traffic was heavy in Brickstown, causing a need for this bridge to be constructed. It was only shortly afterward that plans for the Zig were created, driving the majority of business owners out from Brickstown and into Steel Canyon, rendering Mashu Bridge nothing but an odd landmark.
badges.desc_villain: The Mashu Bridge was built in Brickstown long before construction on the Zig began. Traffic was heavy in Brickstown, causing a need for this bridge to be constructed. It was only shortly afterward that plans for the Zig were created, driving the majority of business owners out from Brickstown and into Steel Canyon, rendering Mashu Bridge nothing but an odd landmark.

badges.name: BrickstownTour6
badges.desc_hero: Tub Ci used this secret path beneath the basketball courts of Brickstown to make a clean escape from the Zig. Officers were unable to find this well hidden location until it was too late. The PPD now keep secret agents around the courts - specifically as basketball players - to prevent such a slip up from happening again.
badges.desc_villain: Tub Ci used this secret path beneath the basketball courts of Brickstown to make a clean escape from the Zig. Officers were unable to find this well hidden location until it was too late. The PPD now keep secret agents around the courts - specifically as basketball players - to prevent such a slip up from happening again.

badges.name: BrickstownTour7
badges.desc_hero: Sebastian Frost hid in the trunk of this old car for three days after he was broken out from the Zig. It was after the third day, under the cover of night, that his goons in the Family were able to come rescue him. Frost has been extra careful ever since then to never get caught again.
badges.desc_villain: Sebastian Frost hid in the trunk of this old car for three days after he was broken out from the Zig. It was after the third day, under the cover of night, that his goons in the Family were able to come rescue him. Frost has been extra careful ever since then to never get caught again.

badges.name: BrickstownTour8
badges.desc_hero: Clamor of the Freakshow used this warehouse as a hideout after escaping from the Zig - sort of. She lasted barely an hour in hiding before bursting out of the warehouse to attack PPD searching for her. This spilled out into an all-out brawl with nearby Council and 5th Column, allowing Bile to swoop in and pull Clamor out from the chaos.
badges.desc_villain: Clamor of the Freakshow used this warehouse as a hideout after escaping from the Zig - sort of. She lasted barely an hour in hiding before bursting out of the warehouse to attack PPD searching for her. This spilled out into an all-out brawl with nearby Council and 5th Column, allowing Bile to swoop in and pull Clamor out from the chaos.

badges.name: KallistiWharfTour1
badges.desc_hero: This statue was erected to pay tribute to Marcus Cole, publicly known as Statesman. Ms. Liberty and Longbow have refused to confirm or deny the persistent rumor that the statue was commissioned by Stefan Richter himself.
badges.desc_villain: This statue was erected to pay tribute to Marcus Cole, publicly known as Statesman. Ms. Liberty and Longbow have refused to confirm or deny the persistent rumor that the statue was commissioned by Stefan Richter himself.

badges.name: KallistiWharfTour2
badges.desc_hero: Padma Wadkar was not only a brilliant doctor but also moonlit as the heroine 'Brightshield', who selflessly sacrificed herself during the Rikti War to keep a portal open for survivors as long as she could. Brightshield herself did not use the portal, even as bombs fell and buildings nearby collapsed. Her body was recovered days later, and her identity was revealed to the public a few weeks afterward. The new hospital built here is dedicated to her memory.
badges.desc_villain: Padma Wadkar was not only a brilliant doctor but also moonlit as the heroine 'Brightshield', who selflessly sacrificed herself during the Rikti War to keep a portal open for survivors as long as she could. Brightshield herself did not use the portal, even as bombs fell and buildings nearby collapsed. Her body was recovered days later, and her identity was revealed to the public a few weeks afterward. The new hospital built here is dedicated to her memory.

badges.name: KallistiWharfTour3
badges.desc_hero: At this location in June of 2018, a man by the name of Kieran Holt, who was later determined to be wrongfully detained, was assaulted by members of the PPD for resisting arrest while protesting their corruption. Holt died, hours later, in his holding cell from his injuries. The resulting media coverage led to the swift loss of public trust in the local PPD and their removal, in favor of Blackwing Industries after heated debates.
badges.desc_villain: At this location in June of 2018, a man by the name of Kieran Holt, who was later determined to be wrongfully detained, was assaulted by members of the PPD for resisting arrest while protesting their corruption. Holt died, hours later, in his holding cell from his injuries. The resulting media coverage led to the swift loss of public trust in the local PPD and their removal, in favor of Blackwing Industries after heated debates.

badges.name: KallistiWharfTour4
badges.desc_hero: What started as Lou's Auto Shop was eventually bought by his brother-in-law, Manny, and turned into a full-service fuel station and repair shop. The station suffered a major fire in 1974, claiming Lou's life - Manny was investigated for insurance fraud and arson, and the station was purchased under eminent domain of the Wharf in 1997. When the Rikti attacked, plans for the station were sidelined and eventually lost entirely.
