badges.desc_hero: This old dock used to be the most popular make-out spot in Paragon City. Today, however, it is more a place of violence than of love.
badges.desc_villain: This old dock used to be the most popular make-out spot in Paragon City. Today, however, it is more a place of violence than of love.

badges.name: PerezParkTour5
badges.desc_hero: This fountain was a gift to the city, donated by billionaire playboy Justin Sinclair.
badges.desc_villain: This fountain was a gift to the city, donated by billionaire playboy Justin Sinclair.

badges.name: RiktiCrashSiteTour1
badges.desc_hero: This statue honors Mustang, a valiant hero who fought during WWII.
badges.desc_villain: This statue honors Mustang, a valiant hero who fought during WWII.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour1
badges.desc_hero: Defiler, an evil spirit brought forth by the Devouring Earth, was defeated on this spot by Ms. Liberty... with a little help from MAGI.
badges.desc_villain: Defiler, an evil spirit brought forth by the Devouring Earth, was defeated on this spot by Ms. Liberty... with a little help from MAGI.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour2
badges.desc_hero: This was the location of Dr. Anguish's secret lab, uncovered by the Freedom Phalanx when he threatened to blow up Paragon City with a black market Soviet nuke.
badges.desc_villain: This was the location of Dr. Anguish's secret lab, uncovered by the Freedom Phalanx when he threatened to blow up Paragon City with a black market Soviet nuke.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour3
badges.desc_hero: Dauntless was Galaxy Girl's sidekick until he died in battle, defending his mentor until his last breath.
badges.desc_villain: Dauntless was Galaxy Girl's sidekick until he died in battle, defending his mentor until his last breath.

badges.name: SkywayCityTour4
badges.desc_hero: The MediCom is the teleportation network that can send fallen heroes directly to the hospital for treatment. This node is the center of the network; the other nodes are on the outskirts of the city.
badges.desc_villain: The MediCom is the teleportation network that can send fallen heroes directly to the hospital for treatment. This node is the center of the network; the other nodes are on the outskirts of the city.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour1
badges.desc_hero: Before becoming guardian of Croatoa, War Witch shared an apartment here with her roommate Apex.
badges.desc_villain: Before becoming guardian of Croatoa, War Witch shared an apartment here with her roommate Apex.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour2
badges.desc_hero: Hero Corps is not only a Corps of people, but also a Corporation, selling their super-powered services to those willing to foot the bill.
badges.desc_villain: Hero Corps is not only a Corps of people, but also a Corporation, selling their super-powered services to those willing to foot the bill.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour3
badges.desc_hero: This spot is where Synapse first found Mynx and began training her.
badges.desc_villain: This spot is where Synapse first found Mynx and began training her.

badges.name: SteelCanyonTour4
badges.desc_hero: The first Luminary used her light-based powers to disrupt the formation of a large portal to the Rikti homeworld on this spot.
badges.desc_villain: The first Luminary used her light-based powers to disrupt the formation of a large portal to the Rikti homeworld on this spot.

badges.name: StrigaTour1
badges.desc_hero: The Council's expert security forces keep most heroes from venturing this far into their base.
badges.desc_villain: The Council's expert security forces keep most heroes from venturing this far into their base.

badges.name: StrigaTour2
badges.desc_hero: Port Noble's shipping industry has declined of late, as Paragon City's manufacturing has taken a hit in the wake of the Rikti War. Now, with the Council plaguing Striga Isle, the situation has gone from bad to worse.
badges.desc_villain: Port Noble's shipping industry has declined of late, as Paragon City's manufacturing has taken a hit in the wake of the Rikti War. Now, with the Council plaguing Striga Isle, the situation has gone from bad to worse.

badges.name: StrigaTour3
badges.desc_hero: The Council has hollowed out this dormant volcano to build a massive factory. The creations within are guarded with the utmost secrecy.
badges.desc_villain: The Council has hollowed out this dormant volcano to build a massive factory. The creations within are guarded with the utmost secrecy.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour1
badges.desc_hero: While wrestling with the Chimera in the waters of the bay, Talos tore a rift in the ocean floor. Although the hero never rose from the waters, the island that formed was named in his honor.
badges.desc_villain: While wrestling with the Chimera in the waters of the bay, Talos tore a rift in the ocean floor. Although the hero never rose from the waters, the island that formed was named in his honor.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour2
badges.desc_hero: Mechanus was one of Woodsman's greatest enemies. It was on this spot that the champion of nature defeated the artificially intelligent robot for the final time.
badges.desc_villain: Mechanus was one of Woodsman's greatest enemies. It was on this spot that the champion of nature defeated the artificially intelligent robot for the final time.

badges.name: TalosIslandTour3
badges.desc_hero: The cargo ship Alba Varden tends to be a hotbed of criminal activity.
badges.desc_villain: The cargo ship Alba Varden tends to be a hotbed of criminal activity.

badges.name: TerraVoltaTour1
badges.desc_hero: This junction was the first target of the Freakshow when they started their campaign of mayhem. Statesman and the rest of the Freedom Phalanx were able to stop their plan before it could be fulfilled.
badges.desc_villain: This junction was the first target of the Freakshow when they started their campaign of mayhem. Statesman and the rest of the Freedom Phalanx were able to stop their plan before it could be fulfilled.

badges.name: TerraVoltaTour2
badges.desc_hero: Covert Rikti strike teams have attempted to destroy the Terra Volta reactor on more than one occasion.
badges.desc_villain: Covert Rikti strike teams have attempted to destroy the Terra Volta reactor on more than one occasion.

badges.name: TerraVoltaTour3
badges.desc_hero: Dreck, the leader of the Freakshow, was brought to justice on this spot by Statesman. His time in jail was short, however, as he broke out just two weeks later.
badges.desc_villain: Dreck, the leader of the Freakshow, was brought to justice on this spot by Statesman. His time in jail was short, however, as he broke out just two weeks later.

badges.name: TheHiveTour1
badges.desc_hero: Portal Corporation had their main facility here until the Devouring Earth destroyed the area. This forced them to move their headquarters to Peregrine Island.
badges.desc_villain: Portal Corporation had their main facility here until the Devouring Earth destroyed the area. This forced them to move their headquarters to Peregrine Island.

badges.name: TheHiveTour2
badges.desc_hero: The Hamidon has defeated many heroes.
badges.desc_villain: The Hamidon has defeated many heroes.

badges.name: FirstWardTour1
badges.desc_hero: When the Devouring Earth struck First Ward the attack came suddenly and without warning. Thousands lost their lives on that terrible day. Though they knew they would likely never return to First Ward, the survivors laid the victims to rest in the Mercyview Cemetery believing the dead would wish to be close to the city they helped build. The survivors believed too that one day they would return and reclaim First Ward in the name of the fallen.
badges.desc_villain: When the Devouring Earth struck First Ward the attack came suddenly and without warning. Thousands lost their lives on that terrible day. Though they knew they would likely never return to First Ward, the survivors laid the victims to rest in the Mercyview Cemetery believing the dead would wish to be close to the city they helped build. The survivors believed too that one day they would return and reclaim First Ward in the name of the fallen.

badges.name: FirstWardTour2
badges.desc_hero: Mystical energies seethe and whirl overhead, hypnotizing in its terrible beauty. Standing this close to it one feels a charge in the air: the skin tingles with barely contained energy, the teeth ache to its harmonic vibration, the mind contemplates alien thoughts. You may feel as though you could fall upwards into it, be absorbed into it, become one with the vortex.
badges.desc_villain: Mystical energies seethe and whirl overhead, hypnotizing in its terrible beauty. Standing this close to it one feels a charge in the air: the skin tingles with barely contained energy, the teeth ache to its harmonic vibration, the mind contemplates alien thoughts. You may feel as though you could fall upwards into it, be absorbed into it, become one with the vortex.

badges.name: FirstWardTour3
badges.desc_hero: You have penetrated the heart of the D.U.S.T. Ranger facility, a breach in security that the rangers will be spending many long hours analyzing, pondering, and adjusting procedures over. Heads will roll. You represent what they fear the most: a dedicated, powerful, fearless insurgent who penetrates their defenses and wreaks havoc.
badges.desc_villain: You have penetrated the heart of the D.U.S.T. Ranger facility, a breach in security that the rangers will be spending many long hours analyzing, pondering, and adjusting procedures over. Heads will roll. You represent what they fear the most: a dedicated, powerful, fearless insurgent who penetrates their defenses and wreaks havoc.

badges.name: FirstWardTour4
badges.desc_hero: First Ward is a terrifying, dangerous place, but there is no other location within the ruins that can evoke such powerful feelings of fear and dread. Here, on an island left undisturbed by any of the forces vying for control, is the shell of a defeated Seed of Hamidon. As a gentle breeze blows across the island from the nearby sunken city, one could be left feeling cold and alone, staring at the corpse of an alien monster that is a harbinger of a vastly more powerful creature waiting just beyond the walls....
badges.desc_villain: First Ward is a terrifying, dangerous place, but there is no other location within the ruins that can evoke such powerful feelings of fear and dread. Here, on an island left undisturbed by any of the forces vying for control, is the shell of a defeated Seed of Hamidon. As a gentle breeze blows across the island from the nearby sunken city, one could be left feeling cold and alone, staring at the corpse of an alien monster that is a harbinger of a vastly more powerful creature waiting just beyond the walls....

badges.name: FirstWardTour5
badges.desc_hero: This is where it all started. When First Ward was still a tyrant's dream, the true Mother of Mercy Hospital was already an aging heap of Gothic masonry. No one is sure exactly when Praetor Tilman built this hospital, or why she built it here, but even with its crumbling edifices, weed-choked grounds, and vacant windows, the place resonates with a malign power. So close to Mother Mayhem now, you can feel the weight of her psyche pressing down upon you, feel her sightless gaze turn to you, condemning and welcoming at the same time, as with the return of a prodigal child.
badges.desc_villain: This is where it all started. When First Ward was still a tyrant's dream, the true Mother of Mercy Hospital was already an aging heap of Gothic masonry. No one is sure exactly when Praetor Tilman built this hospital, or why she built it here, but even with its crumbling edifices, weed-choked grounds, and vacant windows, the place resonates with a malign power. So close to Mother Mayhem now, you can feel the weight of her psyche pressing down upon you, feel her sightless gaze turn to you, condemning and welcoming at the same time, as with the return of a prodigal child.

badges.name: FirstWardTour6
badges.desc_hero: Despite the spirit wards that safeguard your soul and the ghost lights that guide your way, traversing the Shadowed Paths can be an unnerving experience. The Shadowed Paths are a fragment of the world where live the very things that go 'bump' in the night; the world of disembodied spirits and the unquiet dead. Thanks to the Carnival of Light they cannot sense you, but the frightened child that lives within us all knows they are out there, just out of sight, ready to strike at the first misstep. Tread carefully.
badges.desc_villain: Despite the spirit wards that safeguard your soul and the ghost lights that guide your way, traversing the Shadowed Paths can be an unnerving experience. The Shadowed Paths are a fragment of the world where live the very things that go 'bump' in the night; the world of disembodied spirits and the unquiet dead. Thanks to the Carnival of Light they cannot sense you, but the frightened child that lives within us all knows they are out there, just out of sight, ready to strike at the first misstep. Tread carefully.

badges.name: FirstWardTour7
badges.desc_hero: You stand in the domain of the Talons of Vengeance. The elemental nature of their ancient anger permeates the very air. Somewhere deep beneath your feet lurks the source of their power and agency on this world; you can feel it flow through you, but you're here to turn that vengeance back on its source. The Talons must be stopped, they must be punished for their actions, and you shall be the instrument of that vengeance.
badges.desc_villain: You stand in the domain of the Talons of Vengeance. The elemental nature of their ancient anger permeates the very air. Somewhere deep beneath your feet lurks the source of their power and agency on this world; you can feel it flow through you, but you're here to turn that vengeance back on its source. The Talons must be stopped, they must be punished for their actions, and you shall be the instrument of that vengeance.

badges.name: FirstWardTour8
badges.desc_hero: The first statue ever erected in honor of Marcus Cole now stands as a mute reminder of what was lost when the Devouring Earth attacked First Ward. The ossified tendrils of Hamidon coil about it, but never reach it as though checked by Cole's majesty, or so his loyalists would like to think. Members of the Resistance who have made the trek out to this flooded region mock the statue and its current state, seeing it as a visual metaphor for Cole's hubris and eventual downfall.
badges.desc_villain: The first statue ever erected in honor of Marcus Cole now stands as a mute reminder of what was lost when the Devouring Earth attacked First Ward. The ossified tendrils of Hamidon coil about it, but never reach it as though checked by Cole's majesty, or so his loyalists would like to think. Members of the Resistance who have made the trek out to this flooded region mock the statue and its current state, seeing it as a visual metaphor for Cole's hubris and eventual downfall.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour1
badges.desc_hero: Ever watchful of the sleeping god Mot, the Circle of Thorns have stood vigil on these grounds since its imprisonment. Even as the last of Mot's bonds were shattered, the Circle sought to contain its terrible power. Fools or heroes, the Circle's casualties were tremendous as they defied the wrath of the resurgent deity. It is said that the Demon-Prince Stolas was the first to confront the manifestations of Mot. When the Demon-Prince was broken and devoured, the ranks of his minions broke and fled into the streets of Dark Astoria.
badges.desc_villain: Ever watchful of the sleeping god Mot, the Circle of Thorns have stood vigil on these grounds since its imprisonment. Even as the last of Mot's bonds were shattered, the Circle sought to contain its terrible power. Fools or heroes, the Circle's casualties were tremendous as they defied the wrath of the resurgent deity. It is said that the Demon-Prince Stolas was the first to confront the manifestations of Mot. When the Demon-Prince was broken and devoured, the ranks of his minions broke and fled into the streets of Dark Astoria.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour2
badges.desc_hero: Even with every man, woman and child in Dark Astoria slaughtered, the city never ceased to be a thriving metropolis. The bonds that held Mot in its torpor also prevented the spirits of the slain from passing on. Forced to remain as ghosts among the empty remnants of their city, the citizens of Dark Astoria did their best to resume a semblance of normality. Founded by a powerful Tsoo ancestor spirit, the Palace of Stone Leaves was the nerve center of this ghostly community. Now a refuge protected vigorously by its living Tsoo guardians, it houses the few remaining spirits that were lucky enough to not be swept away and consumed when Mot first stirred from its slumber.
badges.desc_villain: Even with every man, woman and child in Dark Astoria slaughtered, the city never ceased to be a thriving metropolis. The bonds that held Mot in its torpor also prevented the spirits of the slain from passing on. Forced to remain as ghosts among the empty remnants of their city, the citizens of Dark Astoria did their best to resume a semblance of normality. Founded by a powerful Tsoo ancestor spirit, the Palace of Stone Leaves was the nerve center of this ghostly community. Now a refuge protected vigorously by its living Tsoo guardians, it houses the few remaining spirits that were lucky enough to not be swept away and consumed when Mot first stirred from its slumber.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour3
badges.desc_hero: As Mot rose again into the world of the living, the very earth was sundered in the passing. The offal of its millennial imprisonment rose with it, a mephitic concoction of the most vile nature. From weeping sores and gaping maws flows a fluid of reconstitution, flushing down its titanic mass and forming pools amongst the pockets of flesh and shattered earth. Here, Mot's followers flock, intoxicating themselves on the potent fumes and ecstatically receiving visions of Mot's glory.
badges.desc_villain: As Mot rose again into the world of the living, the very earth was sundered in the passing. The offal of its millennial imprisonment rose with it, a mephitic concoction of the most vile nature. From weeping sores and gaping maws flows a fluid of reconstitution, flushing down its titanic mass and forming pools amongst the pockets of flesh and shattered earth. Here, Mot's followers flock, intoxicating themselves on the potent fumes and ecstatically receiving visions of Mot's glory.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour4
badges.desc_hero: Behold! Before you lies the glory of Mot. In this place its true body lies exposed; a vast expanse of reconstituting flesh and yawning maws, feasting on life so it can be resuscitated as it perpetually dies and rots anew. Mot's capacity for consumption does not yet equal its appetites, for much of the body is desiccated by centuries of imprisonment or is still bound in ways both arcane and metaphysical. The many mouths that scar its horrid form are, as of yet, still stifled and immature compared to their glory in antiquity. Only one has fully extended to its full voraciousness, but that one is enough to drag all of Dark Astoria into crushing oblivion.
badges.desc_villain: Behold! Before you lies the glory of Mot. In this place its true body lies exposed; a vast expanse of reconstituting flesh and yawning maws, feasting on life so it can be resuscitated as it perpetually dies and rots anew. Mot's capacity for consumption does not yet equal its appetites, for much of the body is desiccated by centuries of imprisonment or is still bound in ways both arcane and metaphysical. The many mouths that scar its horrid form are, as of yet, still stifled and immature compared to their glory in antiquity. Only one has fully extended to its full voraciousness, but that one is enough to drag all of Dark Astoria into crushing oblivion.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour5
badges.desc_hero: This was once Moth Cemetery, the hallowed ground within which Mot was sealed. As Mot's titanic will battered against the bonds that have held it for centuries, the very soil of the cemetery has roiled in revolt at the emerging presence of this vile behemoth. The seismic devastation of its passing causes the terrain to bloat, crack and surge skyward as it struggles to stand from below the ensnaring earthen edifice. As appropriate offerings to the all-consuming manifestation of Death, the vainglorious memorials have been churned down into the earth, pulverized against its corrupting flesh, as it twists and writhes to free himself; Mot abides no vanity but its own.
badges.desc_villain: This was once Moth Cemetery, the hallowed ground within which Mot was sealed. As Mot's titanic will battered against the bonds that have held it for centuries, the very soil of the cemetery has roiled in revolt at the emerging presence of this vile behemoth. The seismic devastation of its passing causes the terrain to bloat, crack and surge skyward as it struggles to stand from below the ensnaring earthen edifice. As appropriate offerings to the all-consuming manifestation of Death, the vainglorious memorials have been churned down into the earth, pulverized against its corrupting flesh, as it twists and writhes to free himself; Mot abides no vanity but its own.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour6
badges.desc_hero: Many false heroes over the years have claimed vindication over the events that transpired in Dark Astoria, unaware that their hollow words would one day be called to account. Screaming and pleading, many have been dragged into the ruined city by the Talons of Vengeance to pay the ultimate price for oath breaking.
badges.desc_villain: Many false heroes over the years have claimed vindication over the events that transpired in Dark Astoria, unaware that their hollow words would one day be called to account. Screaming and pleading, many have been dragged into the ruined city by the Talons of Vengeance to pay the ultimate price for oath breaking.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour7
badges.desc_hero: Mot's hunger is insatiable and its power to feast upon life is prodigious. For sustenance, many innocent people have been spirited away into the haunted streets of Dark Astoria. Not all who have been abducted have met their end, surviving against all odds.
badges.desc_villain: Mot's hunger is insatiable and its power to feast upon life is prodigious. For sustenance, many innocent people have been spirited away into the haunted streets of Dark Astoria. Not all who have been abducted have met their end, surviving against all odds.

badges.name: DarkAstoriaIncarnateTour8
badges.desc_hero: The dead have always cavorted through the streets of Dark Astoria, praying and making sacrifice to their mute master, and for good reason. Even after its fall, Mot's shadow has terrorized the dreams of mankind through all of history, for it is the embodiment of all that is unnatural and vile; death most unclean.
badges.desc_villain: The dead have always cavorted through the streets of Dark Astoria, praying and making sacrifice to their mute master, and for good reason. Even after its fall, Mot's shadow has terrorized the dreams of mankind through all of history, for it is the embodiment of all that is unnatural and vile; death most unclean.

badges.name: NightWardTour1
badges.desc_hero: An arduous trek across Night Ward's misty plain has brought you at last to Lichgate's Chapel of Enduring Light. Your faith grows fleeting as you observe the disheartened souls around you, lying in wait to be ferried to the other side. You begin to feel as though perhaps your journey to this land has been in vain. Perhaps you have been led this far only to have your spirits broken like so many of those around you. Night Ward can be a cruel mistress.
badges.desc_villain: An arduous trek across Night Ward's misty plain has brought you at last to Lichgate's Chapel of Enduring Light. Your faith grows fleeting as you observe the disheartened souls around you, lying in wait to be ferried to the other side. You begin to feel as though perhaps your journey to this land has been in vain. Perhaps you have been led this far only to have your spirits broken like so many of those around you. Night Ward can be a cruel mistress.

badges.name: NightWardTour2
badges.desc_hero: You have landed in the heart of the Black Knights' encampment. Whether you stormed through with guns blazing or stealthily slunk past its many guards, Night Ward recognizes the bold of spirit and plays her next move accordingly.
badges.desc_villain: You have landed in the heart of the Black Knights' encampment. Whether you stormed through with guns blazing or stealthily slunk past its many guards, Night Ward recognizes the bold of spirit and plays her next move accordingly.

badges.name: NightWardTour3
badges.desc_hero: Chance holds little sway over the fate of Night Ward's visitors, and your happening upon the Midnighter Mansion was no exception. Despite the gloomy façade of this old Victorian house you feel eerily at home within its walls.
badges.desc_villain: Chance holds little sway over the fate of Night Ward's visitors, and your happening upon the Midnighter Mansion was no exception. Despite the gloomy façade of this old Victorian house you feel eerily at home within its walls.

badges.name: NightWardTour4
badges.desc_hero: You've managed to push your way through the teeming crowd of displaced souls in an effort to get a ticket out of Night Ward - only to find that there ain't no train a-comin'. Unlike the dead, however, this does little to faze you. After all, if creatures keep finding ways in, there must be other ways out.
badges.desc_villain: You've managed to push your way through the teeming crowd of displaced souls in an effort to get a ticket out of Night Ward - only to find that there ain't no train a-comin'. Unlike the dead, however, this does little to faze you. After all, if creatures keep finding ways in, there must be other ways out.

badges.name: NightWardTour5
badges.desc_hero: The final resting place of the Seed of Hamidon radiates a chill that permeates even Night Ward. In spite of this you take comfort in knowing that Night Ward is beyond Hamidon's reach. But to those denizens unfamiliar with the events leading to the fall of First Ward, this skull-shaped husk is an object of superstition and trepidation. It seems that even in death the Seed continues to spread its influence.
badges.desc_villain: The final resting place of the Seed of Hamidon radiates a chill that permeates even Night Ward. In spite of this you take comfort in knowing that Night Ward is beyond Hamidon's reach. But to those denizens unfamiliar with the events leading to the fall of First Ward, this skull-shaped husk is an object of superstition and trepidation. It seems that even in death the Seed continues to spread its influence.

badges.name: NightWardTour6
badges.desc_hero: You have discovered the first of many lighted paths in Night Ward. The Carnival of Light has been working tirelessly to hold the darkness of this realm at bay by way of their protective luster. With the light as your guide you are free to traverse Night Ward's darkest corners, undetected by the countless dangers that heed her call.
badges.desc_villain: You have discovered the first of many lighted paths in Night Ward. The Carnival of Light has been working tirelessly to hold the darkness of this realm at bay by way of their protective luster. With the light as your guide you are free to traverse Night Ward's darkest corners, undetected by the countless dangers that heed her call.

badges.name: NightWardTour7
badges.desc_hero: As you set foot in this peculiar stone circle you can feel ancient magics coursing through your veins. The source of its power remains a mystery - as well it should. Night Ward harbors many secrets too awesome, too transcendent for the mortal mind to behold. To merely be counted among those touched by her radiance is in itself a humbling experience.
badges.desc_villain: As you set foot in this peculiar stone circle you can feel ancient magics coursing through your veins. The source of its power remains a mystery - as well it should. Night Ward harbors many secrets too awesome, too transcendent for the mortal mind to behold. To merely be counted among those touched by her radiance is in itself a humbling experience.

badges.name: NightWardTour8
badges.desc_hero: Throwing caution aside you reach the uppermost point of Night Ward. Here, scattered spirits soar overhead like shooting stars in the night sky, forever doomed to the limbo of Night Ward as she drifts ever further from the land of the dead.
badges.desc_villain: Throwing caution aside you reach the uppermost point of Night Ward. Here, scattered spirits soar overhead like shooting stars in the night sky, forever doomed to the limbo of Night Ward as she drifts ever further from the land of the dead.

badges.name: CommSpecialist
badges.desc_hero: These communications towers are critical for boosting signals with enough power to overcome Rikti jamming technology.
badges.desc_villain: These communications towers are critical for boosting signals with enough power to overcome Rikti jamming technology.

badges.name: Shielded
badges.desc_hero: Despite its crash landing, the Rikti mother ship's shields continue to function, providing the stranded Rikti with a relatively safe haven.
badges.desc_villain: Despite its crash landing, the Rikti mother ship's shields continue to function, providing the stranded Rikti with a relatively safe haven.

badges.name: CroatoaTour2
badges.desc_hero: It may be in dangerous territory, but this lake, frequented by the Cabal's strange sprites, is one of the most beautiful sights near Salamanca.
badges.desc_villain: It may be in dangerous territory, but this lake, frequented by the Cabal's strange sprites, is one of the most beautiful sights near Salamanca.

badges.name: CroatoaTour3
badges.desc_hero: The Cabal have developed an attachment to this old, gnarled tree. Some heroes even say they are conducting dark experiments beneath its roots.
badges.desc_villain: The Cabal have developed an attachment to this old, gnarled tree. Some heroes even say they are conducting dark experiments beneath its roots.

badges.name: PartyClubTour
badges.desc_hero: You've always sought out the biggest parties, where you're certain to make a splash, and now you've become truly unparalleled. Having been to dance clubs from entirely different dimensions you are, without any doubt, a Party Animal.
badges.desc_villain: You've always sought out the biggest parties, where you're certain to make a splash, and now you've become truly unparalleled. Having been to dance clubs from entirely different dimensions you are, without any doubt, a Party Animal.

badges.name: DungeonLabyrinthTour1
badges.desc_hero:
The Labyrinth of Fog is an endless maze constructed from the amalgamation of memories taken from those who have entered the maze. Some speak of finding lost secrets, long forgotten, laying hidden amongst the fog, and that those who surrender themselves to the labyrinth are in a position to glean forbidden knowledge.
This badge unlocks access to the Colonnade in the Labyrinth of Fog.

badges.desc_hero:

You can't help but feel like a lab rat, running a maze for some unseen intelligence's amusement...

You've gone much deeper into the Labyrinth of Fog, perhaps deeper than you ought to...

Lurking in the darkest depths of the maze hid a shadow of Atlas Park, wreathed in nightmare. What purpose this place serves is a mystery waiting to be uncovered.
This badge unlocks access to the Origin in the Labyrinth of Fog.

badges.desc_villain: You crashed a rave and stole a piece of the alloy which makes up Silver Mantis' armor.

badges.name: VanguardEnabled

Seizing the opportunity to deal a major blow to the Prussian Prince of Automatons, you put his Kallisti Wharf base of operations out of commission once and for all.

badges.desc_villain: You played the Center's personal story and saw that the Council has another ace up their sleeve for future events.

badges.name: Mission_SM_i24_Personal_Story
badges.desc_hero: You played Wu Yin's personal story and saw the plan that has been set in motion to try and save Penelope Mayhem.
badges.desc_villain: You played Wu Yin's personal story and saw the plan that has been set in motion to try and save Penelope Mayhem.

badges.name: Mission_Incarnate_i24_Personal_Story
badges.desc_hero: You played Anti-Matter's personal story and witnessed his last moments.
badges.desc_villain: You played Anti-Matter's personal story and witnessed his last moments.

badges.name: Mission_Incarnate_i24_Challenge_02
badges.desc_hero: You found a lot of odd things during your fight to hold the last area of Praetoria. Some make sense, while others leave you with more questions than answers.
badges.desc_villain: You found a lot of odd things during your fight to hold the last area of Praetoria. Some make sense, while others leave you with more questions than answers.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Find all of the easter eggs in Number Six's arcs. There is one in each mission.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Find all of the easter eggs in Number Six's arcs. There is one in each mission.

badges.name: Mission_KR_i24_Arc_Complete_02
badges.desc_hero: You formed the New Regulators and put a stop to the Skulls' Superadine Ring in Kings Row. You destroyed their lab and put one of the Petrovic Brothers behind bars, leaving the Skulls scattered and weakened.
badges.desc_villain: You formed the New Regulators and put a stop to the Skulls' Superadine Ring in Kings Row. You destroyed their lab and put one of the Petrovic Brothers behind bars, leaving the Skulls scattered and weakened.

badges.name: Mission_KR_i24_Personal_Story
badges.display_hero: You should see the other guy.
badges.display_villain: You should see the other guy.
badges.desc_hero: You played Deadlock's personal story and learned a little bit about the man who put Back Alley Brawler in the hospital.
badges.desc_villain: You played Deadlock's personal story and learned a little bit about the man who put Back Alley Brawler in the hospital.

badges.name: ZE_SM_Complete
badges.desc_hero: You stopped Longbow from raiding a Family casino in St. Martial, then proceeded to rob the Family blind. The goons of the Family have taken to calling you 'Oobatz', crazy, for daring to cross them.
badges.desc_villain: You stopped Longbow from raiding a Family casino in St. Martial, then proceeded to rob the Family blind. The goons of the Family have taken to calling you 'Oobatz', crazy, for daring to cross them.

badges.name: ZE_BT_Complete
badges.desc_hero: You stopped a number of prisoners from escaping from Ziggursky prison.
badges.desc_villain: You stopped a number of prisoners from escaping from Ziggursky prison.

badges.name: Gullible
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent as a seagull has given you better insights into the nature of reality. One insight in particular comes to mind: be careful what you ask for.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent as a seagull has given you better insights into the nature of reality. One insight in particular comes to mind: be careful what you ask for.

badges.name: EatenByBlarf
badges.desc_hero: Despite missing or ignoring the hazardous material warning, Blarf is now fed, although probably not in the way you anticipated...
badges.desc_villain: Despite missing or ignoring the hazardous material warning, Blarf is now fed, although probably not in the way you anticipated...

badges.name: StrigaTF
badges.desc_hero: You have stopped the Council's plan to infect the populace with Nictus aliens.
badges.desc_villain: You have stopped the Council's plan to infect the populace with Nictus aliens.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Moonfire Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Moonfire Task Force.

badges.name: ShardTF1
badges.desc_hero: You cut off the illegal portals the Nemesis army and Crey had built to access the Shadow Shard, and prevented the Rularuu from escaping into our world.
badges.desc_villain: You cut off the illegal portals the Nemesis army and Crey had built to access the Shadow Shard, and prevented the Rularuu from escaping into our world.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete Dr. Quaterfield's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete Dr. Quaterfield's Task Force.

badges.name: ShardTF2
badges.desc_hero: You defeated the being known as Ruladak the Strong, freeing the people of the Shadow Shard from his tyranny.
badges.desc_villain: You defeated the being known as Ruladak the Strong, freeing the people of the Shadow Shard from his tyranny.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete Sara Moore's Task Force
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete Sara Moore's Task Force

badges.name: ShardTF3
badges.desc_hero: You saved the being known as Faathim the Kind from capture by the Circle of Thorns.
badges.desc_villain: You saved the being known as Faathim the Kind from capture by the Circle of Thorns.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete Justin Augustine's Task Force
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete Justin Augustine's Task Force

badges.name: ShardTF4
badges.desc_hero: You defeated the being known as Lanaru the Mad, sparing the people of the Shadow Shard from total destruction.
badges.desc_villain: You defeated the being known as Lanaru the Mad, sparing the people of the Shadow Shard from total destruction.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete Faathim the Kind's Task Force
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete Faathim the Kind's Task Force

badges.name: CroatoaTF
badges.desc_hero: You aided the Cabal in their struggle against the loathsome Red Caps.
badges.desc_villain: You aided the Cabal in their struggle against the loathsome Red Caps.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Katie Hannon Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Katie Hannon Task Force.

badges.name: Victor1
badges.desc_hero: You have barely impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her one time. The secretive Cabal are not so easily trusting of outsiders, but you have potential.
badges.desc_villain: You have barely impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her one time. The secretive Cabal are not so easily trusting of outsiders, but you have potential.

badges.name: Victor2
badges.desc_hero: You have slightly impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her two times. Mary can sense the light of possibility within you, but it is yet dim.
badges.desc_villain: You have slightly impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her two times. Mary can sense the light of possibility within you, but it is yet dim.

badges.name: Victor3
badges.desc_hero: You have sort of impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her three times. Your persistance has begun to leave a positive impression with the Cabal.
badges.desc_villain: You have sort of impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her three times. Your persistance has begun to leave a positive impression with the Cabal.

badges.name: Victor4
badges.desc_hero: You have started to impress Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her four times. Many have turned back at this point, but you are not simply one of the many.
badges.desc_villain: You have started to impress Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her four times. Many have turned back at this point, but you are not simply one of the many.

badges.name: Victor5
badges.desc_hero: You have made progress impressing Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her five times. Your promise is beginning to shine through, the Cabal's witches have taken notice.
badges.desc_villain: You have made progress impressing Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her five times. Your promise is beginning to shine through, the Cabal's witches have taken notice.

badges.name: Victor6
badges.desc_hero: You have begun leaving an impression on Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her six times. The world of the fae demands respect, and you're earning it with the Cabal.
badges.desc_villain: You have begun leaving an impression on Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her six times. The world of the fae demands respect, and you're earning it with the Cabal.

badges.name: Victor7
badges.desc_hero: You have really begun to impress Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her seven times. Not many outsiders have made it this far, time to prove what makes you special.
badges.desc_villain: You have really begun to impress Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her seven times. Not many outsiders have made it this far, time to prove what makes you special.

badges.name: Victor8
badges.desc_hero: You have seriously impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her eight times. Your willingness to endure the harshest tribulations will prove your worth.
badges.desc_villain: You have seriously impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her eight times. Your willingness to endure the harshest tribulations will prove your worth.

badges.name: Victor9
badges.desc_hero: You have majorly impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her nine times. Your perseverence has not gone without notice, the trial nears its end.
badges.desc_villain: You have majorly impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her nine times. Your perseverence has not gone without notice, the trial nears its end.

badges.name: Victor10
badges.desc_hero: You have completely impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her ten times. Though some members of the Cabal may still fear you, others will work as your allies.
badges.desc_villain: You have completely impressed Mary Macomber, leader of the Cabal, by defeating her ten times. Though some members of the Cabal may still fear you, others will work as your allies.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Containment
badges.desc_hero: Under extreme pressure, you were cool in a crisis. With only five minutes in a warehouse engulfed in flames, you were able to disable the rigged sprinklers before the situation became a national tragedy.
badges.desc_villain: Under extreme pressure, you were cool in a crisis. With only five minutes in a warehouse engulfed in flames, you were able to disable the rigged sprinklers before the situation became a national tragedy.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Hero
badges.desc_hero: You chose to sit tight and quarantine yourself, rather than jeopardize Paragon with the diseases from Pathogen's warehouse.
badges.desc_villain: You chose to sit tight and quarantine yourself, rather than jeopardize Paragon with the diseases from Pathogen's warehouse.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Vigilante
badges.desc_hero: You chose to defy your contact and risk the lives of countless innocents to put a firm end to the Vahzilok civil war.
badges.desc_villain: You chose to defy your contact and risk the lives of countless innocents to put a firm end to the Vahzilok civil war.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Watkins
badges.desc_hero: As the crescendo to a wild adventure that took you all over the city and into many life-threatening scenarios, you went straight to the heart of where the last Vahzilok leader was trying to navigate the complex civil war within the ranks. Cortex was able to escape you, but Dr. Pierce was left trapped in her own mess of lies and deceptions, her fate left to the authorities and the Paragon justice system.
badges.desc_villain: As the crescendo to a wild adventure that took you all over the city and into many life-threatening scenarios, you went straight to the heart of where the last Vahzilok leader was trying to navigate the complex civil war within the ranks. Cortex was able to escape you, but Dr. Pierce was left trapped in her own mess of lies and deceptions, her fate left to the authorities and the Paragon justice system.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Manticore
badges.desc_hero: Despite all the villains you've put away, you couldn't help becoming one yourself. You were reminded of this when Manticore ambushed you in the Zig during Clamor and Bile's breakout, in front of nineteen high-profile arrests you'd made yourself. Undeterred, you added him and his Shining Star lackeys to your list of accomplishments.
badges.desc_villain: Despite all the villains you've put away, you couldn't help becoming one yourself. You were reminded of this when Manticore ambushed you in the Zig during Clamor and Bile's breakout, in front of nineteen high-profile arrests you'd made yourself. Undeterred, you added him and his Shining Star lackeys to your list of accomplishments.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Buzzsaw
badges.desc_hero: Doc Buzzsaw bit off more she could chew when she called out for help against Cortex, leading you into a whole new world of mad science and pushing fringe Freakshow members and desperate terminal Eidolons to evolve beyond their humanity as conscripts in a new cybertech army. Piecemeal owes their existence to you.
badges.desc_villain: Doc Buzzsaw bit off more she could chew when she called out for help against Cortex, leading you into a whole new world of mad science and pushing fringe Freakshow members and desperate terminal Eidolons to evolve beyond their humanity as conscripts in a new cybertech army. Piecemeal owes their existence to you.

badges.name: AeonSF_Beckys_BFF
badges.desc_hero: You like, totally took Becky hostage! Giving her a much needed break from that extra super boring desk job! In return she like, so totally came to your rescue to save the day and stuff! Those weirdo gold guys are like, totally no match for Becky and her new BFF!
badges.desc_villain: You like, totally took Becky hostage! Giving her a much needed break from that extra super boring desk job! In return she like, so totally came to your rescue to save the day and stuff! Those weirdo gold guys are like, totally no match for Becky and her new BFF!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Take Becky, the Tarantula Secretary hostage in the first mission, ensure she has a fun time, and then accept her help and bring her with you to D-Rifter console without her being defeated in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Take Becky, the Tarantula Secretary hostage in the first mission, ensure she has a fun time, and then accept her help and bring her with you to D-Rifter console without her being defeated in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Valeria
badges.desc_hero: This small trinket was fashioned for you in gratitude by a Cimeroran blacksmith. Within it spins a fragment of the First Cyst, purged of its evil by the Midnighters and purified by the waters of Phoebas Point. It serves as a reminder that Ouroboros are not the only ones who can fix a timeline, and you bet on that knowledge being important someday.
badges.desc_villain: This small trinket was fashioned for you in gratitude by a Cimeroran blacksmith. Within it spins a fragment of the First Cyst, purged of its evil by the Midnighters and purified by the waters of Phoebas Point. It serves as a reminder that Ouroboros are not the only ones who can fix a timeline, and you bet on that knowledge being important someday.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Corlett
badges.desc_hero: You were successful in exposing ---- ---------- for having stolen ------- ---- from ---- ----- and using it to ---- ----- --- ------. You just can't legally talk about it.
badges.desc_villain: You were successful in exposing Crey Industries for having stolen genetic data from Hero Corps and using it to make their own heroes. You can legally talk about it in the Isles, but either everyone knows, or nobody cares.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Houston_R
badges.desc_hero: You took advantage of the Council's election fraud scheme for your personal profit, and made a mockery of the democratic process by getting the Can Man elected to the city council.
badges.desc_villain: You took advantage of the Council's election fraud scheme for your personal profit, and made a mockery of the democratic process by getting the Can Man elected to the city council.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Houston_H
badges.desc_hero: You protected democracy by exposing the Council's election fraud scheme to put Alexander 'The Great' Pavlidis on the city council.
badges.desc_villain: You protected democracy by exposing the Council's election fraud scheme to put Alexander 'The Great' Pavlidis on the city council.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Stribbling
badges.desc_hero: After much trial and tribulation, you were able to use Ouroboros to put an end to the Stribbling family drama. By your own count, you must have gone around at least 5 times... but the real number could be well into the thousands.
badges.desc_villain: After much trial and tribulation, you were able to use Ouroboros to put an end to the Stribbling family drama. By your own count, you must have gone around at least 5 times... but the real number could be well into the thousands.

badges.name: LadyGreyTF_StationEscape
badges.desc_hero: Part of the job is knowing how to look cool, and you've mastered the art. While not intentional, when fate threw you aboard a Rikti space station, you sent it nuclear and made it out in one piece.
badges.desc_villain: Part of the job is knowing how to look cool, and you've mastered the art. While not intentional, when fate threw you aboard a Rikti space station, you sent it nuclear and made it out in one piece.

badges.name: Mission_i27_Finale
badges.desc_hero: You witnessed what Bile swears is the truth, and navigated a recording of Piecemeal's final moments, marooned in Galaxy City amidst the beginning of a horrific invasion.
badges.desc_villain: You witnessed what Bile swears is the truth, and navigated a recording of Piecemeal's final moments, marooned in Galaxy City amidst the beginning of a horrific invasion.

badges.name: Mission_i28_Ziegler
badges.desc_hero: You assisted Adelard Ziegler with his investigation into the disappearance of the majority of the Council's Void Hunter division. What you found out was disturbing, with an ominous warning about a possible invasion coming soon.
badges.desc_villain: You assisted Adelard Ziegler with his investigation into the disappearance of the majority of the Council's Void Hunter division. What you found out was disturbing, with an ominous warning about a possible invasion coming soon.

badges.name: Mission_i28_DapDap
badges.desc_hero: You bumbled, hustled and crashed through a number of people and places to help Dap-Dap establish the Freaklok as an organization worthy of being taken seriously, especially by the Freakshow.
badges.desc_villain: You bumbled, hustled and crashed through a number of people and places to help Dap-Dap establish the Freaklok as an organization worthy of being taken seriously, especially by the Freakshow.

badges.name: Mission_i28_ErinWest
badges.desc_hero: When Crey needed someone to give them a good face to recover their image, they called you.
badges.desc_villain: When Crey needed someone to give them a good face to recover their image, they called you.

badges.name: Mission_i28_RobertKogan
badges.desc_hero: Some evils can't be beaten while keeping your hands clean. You've done what was needed when others wouldn't.
badges.desc_villain: Some evils can't be beaten while keeping your hands clean. You've done what was needed when others wouldn't.

badges.name: Mission_i28_AlexanderTheGreat
badges.desc_hero: Alexander 'the Great' Pavlidis used the full quote: 'The blood of the battlefield is thicker than the water of the womb.' His former brothers in arms among the Warriors have fallen victim to demonic trickery but he remains honorbound to try to save their souls.
badges.desc_villain: Alexander 'the Great' Pavlidis used the full quote: 'The blood of the battlefield is thicker than the water of the womb.' His former brothers in arms among the Warriors have fallen victim to demonic trickery but he remains honorbound to try to save their souls.

badges.name: Mission_i28_Ziegler_Bonus
badges.desc_hero: You have discovered the consequences of helping Sister Valeria in the past - your encounter with Livia was actually the first time you met the host Nictus inside Arakhn, which now harbors milennia of hatred for you as a result. The fact that Ourboros did not mend this is telling.
badges.desc_villain: You have discovered the consequences of helping Sister Valeria in the past - your encounter with Livia was actually the first time you met the host Nictus inside Arakhn, which now harbors milennia of hatred for you as a result. The fact that Ourboros did not mend this is telling.

badges.name: Mission_i28_ErinWest_Bonus01
badges.desc_hero: Sometimes the only thing it takes to completely rock a person's world is to learn a few uncomfortable truths.
badges.desc_villain: Sometimes the only thing it takes to completely rock a person's world is to learn a few uncomfortable truths.

badges.name: Mission_i28_ErinWest_Bonus02
badges.desc_hero: No mystery is too small to intrigue you. You gave Erin West closure by uncovering the truth about her mentor's death.
badges.desc_villain: No mystery is too small to intrigue you. You gave Erin West closure by uncovering the truth about her mentor's death.

badges.name: Mission_i28_DapDap_Bonus
badges.desc_hero: You negotiated with Nemesis, to the joyful sounds of shattering brass, on his own home turf in the Shadow Shard.
badges.desc_villain: You negotiated with Nemesis, to the joyful sounds of shattering brass, on his own home turf in the Shadow Shard.

badges.name: Mission_i28_WylieGalloway
badges.desc_hero: You discovered the source of the Skulls' new powers: mystifying pacts formed between themselves and the entities that ferry souls of the dead to the afterlife.
badges.desc_villain: You discovered the source of the Skulls' new powers: mystifying pacts formed between themselves and the entities that ferry souls of the dead to the afterlife.

badges.name: Labyrinth_Test_Spectrum
badges.desc_hero: You've proven yourself adapative and a worthy challenger by overcoming the many different Tests of Combat offered by the Four Generals of Achlys in the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.desc_villain: You've proven yourself adapative and a worthy challenger by overcoming the many different Tests of Combat offered by the Four Generals of Achlys in the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete all six standard Tests of Combat offered by The Watcher, Teleute in the Core of the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete all six standard Tests of Combat offered by The Watcher, Teleute in the Core of the Labyrinth of Fog.

badges.name: Labyrinth_Test_Apathy
badges.desc_hero: You've shown yourself amongst greatest of your otherworlder peers by mastering the Tests of Combat. The phantoms knows your true worth after defeating all Four Generals of Achlys at the same time.
badges.desc_villain: You've shown yourself amongst greatest of your otherworlder peers by mastering the Tests of Combat. The phantoms knows your true worth after defeating all Four Generals of Achlys at the same time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Test of Apathy offered by The Watcher, Teleute in the Core of the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Test of Apathy offered by The Watcher, Teleute in the Core of the Labyrinth of Fog.

badges.name: Level10
badges.desc_hero: Positron has awarded you this badge for achieving Security Level 10.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos has awarded you the Soldier Badge for reaching Level 10.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Fight the bad fight to claim these badges.

badges.name: P_Level_10
badges.desc_hero: Working your way through the ins and outs of Praetoria's political landscape has become second nature to you.
badges.desc_villain: Working your way through the ins and outs of Praetoria's political landscape has become second nature to you.

badges.name: Level20
badges.desc_hero: Positron has awarded you this badge for achieving Security Level 20.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos has awarded you the Insider Badge for reaching Level 20.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Fight the bad fight to claim these badges.

badges.name: P_Level_20
badges.desc_hero: Not many last so long in Praetoria as you have managed. Keep up the good work.
badges.desc_villain: Not many last so long in Praetoria as you have managed. Keep up the good work.

badges.name: Level30
badges.desc_hero: Positron has awarded you this badge for achieving Security Level 30.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos has awarded you this badge for reaching Level 30.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Fight the bad fight to claim these badges.

badges.name: P_Level_30
badges.desc_hero: Whether you have traveled to Primal Earth or delved into the otherworldly secrets of Praetoria, you have tested yourself against many new challenges, which have increased your skills rapidly. You'll need them.
badges.desc_villain: Whether you have traveled to Primal Earth or delved into the otherworldly secrets of Praetoria, you have tested yourself against many new challenges, which have increased your skills rapidly. You'll need them.

badges.name: Level40
badges.desc_hero: Positron has awarded you this badge for achieving Security Level 40.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos has awarded you the Captain Badge for reaching Level 40.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Fight the bad fight to claim these badges.

badges.name: P_Level_40
badges.desc_hero: Regardless of the dimension in which you find yourself, your involvement in the affairs of Primal and Praetorian Earth has allowed you to establish a well-earned reputation in both worlds.
badges.desc_villain: Regardless of the dimension in which you find yourself, your involvement in the affairs of Primal and Praetorian Earth has allowed you to establish a well-earned reputation in both worlds.

badges.name: Level50
badges.desc_hero: Positron has awarded you this badge for achieving Security Level 50.
badges.desc_villain: Arachnos has awarded you the Made Badge for reaching Level 50.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Fight the bad fight to claim these badges.

badges.name: P_Level_50
badges.desc_hero: Even Emperor Cole would have to admit you would make a fine Praetor. You can feel the time of reckoning drawing near...
badges.desc_villain: Even Emperor Cole would have to admit you would make a fine Praetor. You can feel the time of reckoning drawing near...

badges.name: P_HeroAlignment
badges.desc_hero: You've proven time and time again that Paragon City can rely on you. You have completed a Hero Morality Mission, earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You've proven time and time again that Paragon City can rely on you. You have completed a Hero Morality Mission, earning yourself this badge.

badges.name: P_VigilanteAlignment
badges.desc_hero: You are the law, you dispense your own kind of justice for the greater good. You have completed a Vigilante Morality Mission earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You are the law, you dispense your own kind of justice for the greater good. You have completed a Vigilante Morality Mission earning yourself this badge.

badges.name: P_RogueAlignment
badges.desc_hero: You take consideration of all the angles and know when making deals instead of wreaking blind havoc puts you farther ahead. You have completed a Rogue Morality Mission earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You take consideration of all the angles and know when making deals instead of wreaking blind havoc puts you farther ahead. You have completed a Rogue Morality Mission earning yourself this badge.

badges.name: P_VillainAlignment
badges.desc_hero: The mere mention of your name causes those that hear it to shiver in fear. You have completed a Villain Morality Mission earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: The mere mention of your name causes those that hear it to shiver in fear. You have completed a Villain Morality Mission earning yourself this badge.

badges.name: P_HeroAlignmentPower
badges.desc_hero: You completed a Hero Morality Mission and then maintained your Hero alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You completed a Hero Morality Mission and then maintained your Hero alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Maintain the Hero alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Maintain the Hero alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.

badges.desc_hero: You completed a Vigilante Morality Mission and then maintained your Vigilante alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You completed a Vigilante Morality Mission and then maintained your Vigilante alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Maintain the Vigilante alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Maintain the Vigilante alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.

badges.desc_hero: You completed a Rogue Morality Mission and then maintained your Rogue alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You completed a Rogue Morality Mission and then maintained your Rogue alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Maintain the Rogue alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Maintain the Rogue alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.

badges.desc_hero: You completed a Villain Morality Mission and then maintained your Villain alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You completed a Villain Morality Mission and then maintained your Villain alignment for 7 days, earning yourself this badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Maintain the Villain alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Maintain the Villain alignment for 7 days to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Ascended
badges.desc_hero: Despite your villainous beginnings you managed to redeem yourself. You have shifted your alignment from Villain to Hero, earning yourself the Ascended badge.
badges.desc_villain: Despite your villainous beginnings you managed to redeem yourself. You have shifted your alignment from Villain to Hero, earning yourself the Ascended badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Shift your alignment from Villain to Hero to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Shift your alignment from Villain to Hero to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Descended
badges.desc_hero: You have shrugged off the heavy binds of morality and selflessness and have become a Villain. You have shifted your alignment from Hero to Villain earning yourself the Descended badge.
badges.desc_villain: You have shrugged off the heavy binds of morality and selflessness and have become a Villain. You have shifted your alignment from Hero to Villain earning yourself the Descended badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Shift your alignment from Hero to Villain to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Shift your alignment from Hero to Villain to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_ComeFullCircle
badges.desc_hero: You ended up back right where you started, coming full circle from Hero to Villain and back again.
badges.desc_villain: You ended up back right where you started, coming full circle from Villain to Hero and back again.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Shift your alignment from Hero to Vigilante then to Villain then to Rogue and finally back to Hero to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Shift your alignment from Villain to Rogue then to Hero then to Vigilante and finally back to Villain to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_TravelBetweenCities
badges.desc_hero: You have traveled from the relative safety of Paragon City to the rough and tumble Rogue Isles, where it seems even the grass is meaner.
badges.desc_villain: You have traveled from the cutthroat Rogue Isles to the relative calm and prosperity of Paragon City, where it definitely seems the grass is greener.

badges.name: Tough
badges.desc_hero: You have endured one hundred thousand points of damage and are still dauntless in your pursuit of justice.
badges.desc_villain: Way to take it like a man, tough guy. You've taken one hundred thousand points of damage.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Take 100,000 points of damage to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Take 100,000 points of damage to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Damage_100K
badges.desc_hero: You've taken such a beating the Resistance would certainly call you a Slammer (one who can't be slammed).
badges.desc_villain: You've taken such a beating the Resistance would certainly call you a Slammer (one who can't be slammed).
badges.earn_hint_hero: Take 100,000 points of damage to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Take 100,000 points of damage to earn this badge.

badges.name: Indestructable

badges.desc_villain: You can dish it out, and you can take it. You've soaked up over five hundred thousand points of damage.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Take 500,000 points of damage to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Take 500,000 points of damage to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Take 1,000,000 points of damage to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Take 1,000,000 points of damage to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend 12 hours held, slept or immobilized to earn this badge.

badges.desc_villain: You've spent so much time held, slept, immobilized, encased in goo, et cetera, that it now seems to take you two seconds to do something it takes others only one. Perhaps you should see someone about it?
