badges.name: P_Money_2500K
badges.desc_hero: There's a certain allure in knowing that as your stockpile of resources and contacts grow, it will make your future challenges that much easier.
badges.desc_villain: There's a certain allure in knowing that as your stockpile of resources and contacts grow, it will make your future challenges that much easier.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 2,500,000 information (or equivalent).
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this badge by gaining 2,500,000 information (or equivalent).

badges.name: Superstar
badges.desc_hero: The citizens of Paragon City have begun a petition to make a statue in your name.
badges.desc_villain: Every job you take seems to turn to gold. You've earned over ten million Infamy.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 10,000,000 influence.
badges.earn_hint_villain: It's all about the Infamy, baby.  Earn this badge by gaining 10,000,000 infamy.

badges.name: P_Money_10M
badges.desc_hero: You've pieced together from bits of information that word of your exploits is spreading back to Praetoria in hushed whispers and classified reports.
badges.desc_villain: You've pieced together from bits of information that word of your exploits is spreading back to Praetoria in hushed whispers and classified reports.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 10,000,000 information (or equivalent).
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this badge by gaining 10,000,000 information (or equivalent).

badges.name: Multimillionaire
badges.desc_hero: People look to you as a leader.
badges.desc_villain: People look to you as a leader.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 50,000,000 influence.
badges.earn_hint_villain: It's all about the Infamy, baby.  Earn this badge by gaining 50,000,000 infamy.

badges.name: P_Money_50M
badges.desc_hero: Most citizens of Praetoria have heard your name by now. Rumors abound concerning your relationship with the Emperor because of it.
badges.desc_villain: Most citizens of Praetoria have heard your name by now. Rumors abound concerning your relationship with the Emperor because of it.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 50,000,000 information (or equivalent).
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this badge by gaining 50,000,000 information (or equivalent).

badges.name: Billionaire
badges.desc_hero: The citizens of Paragon City have begun a petition to make a statue in your name.
badges.desc_villain: The citizens of the Rogue Isles have begun a petition to make a statue in your name.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 250,000,000 influence.
badges.earn_hint_villain: It's all about the Infamy, baby.  Earn this badge by gaining 250,000,000 infamy.

badges.name: P_Money_250M
badges.desc_hero: There is an urban legend floating around Praetoria that one day you will return, and on that day Praetoria will change forever. You're kind of flattered.
badges.desc_villain: There is an urban legend floating around Praetoria that one day you will return, and on that day Praetoria will change forever. You're kind of flattered.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 250,000,000 information (or equivalent).
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this badge by gaining 250,000,000 information (or equivalent).

badges.name: Trillionaire
badges.desc_hero: Your very name instills both hope and inspiration to the people of Paragon City. You truly are a Leader.
badges.desc_villain: Your very name strikes both fear and awe into the hearts of the citizens of the Rogue Isles.  You are considered a Leader.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 500,000,000 influence.
badges.earn_hint_villain: It's all about the Infamy, baby.  Earn this badge by gaining 500,000,000 infamy.

badges.name: P_Money_500M
badges.desc_hero: Could it be that all along there has been some hand of fate at work here? Your name commands such weight, you now dare to dream that Praetoria's future may be in your hands after all...
badges.desc_villain: Could it be that all along there has been some hand of fate at work here? Your name commands such weight, you now dare to dream that Praetoria's future may be in your hands after all...
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by gaining 500,000,000 information (or equivalent).
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this badge by gaining 500,000,000 information (or equivalent).

badges.name: Advisor
badges.desc_hero: You have earned this badge for your time spent tutoring others.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent time helping others on the path of super-villainy.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 4 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Continue teaching lesser villains the ropes for a total of 4 hours to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Mentor_4Hour
badges.desc_hero: There's always new blood flowing through Praetoria. You've spent some time trying to keep all of it from being spilled.
badges.desc_villain: There's always new blood flowing through Praetoria. You've spent some time trying to keep all of it from being spilled.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 4 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 4 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.

badges.name: Guide
badges.desc_hero: Your continued mentoring has earned you this badge.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent time teaching the young toughs how to do it 'Old School.'
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 8 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Continue teaching lesser villains the ropes for a total of 8 hours to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Mentor_8Hour
badges.desc_hero: If those you mentor slack off, you've got quite a few ways to motivate them. They're not all pleasant.
badges.desc_villain: If those you mentor slack off, you've got quite a few ways to motivate them. They're not all pleasant.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 8 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 8 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.

badges.name: Paragon
badges.desc_hero: The time spent as a mentor has earned you the right to call yourself Paragon.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent time recruiting others to Arachnos' cause.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 12 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Continue teaching lesser villains the ropes for a total of 12 hours to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Mentor_12Hour
badges.desc_hero: Teaching those who want to learn the ways of Praetoria is more than a hobby to you. It's a mission.
badges.desc_villain: Teaching those who want to learn the ways of Praetoria is more than a hobby to you. It's a mission.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 12 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 12 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.

badges.name: RoleModel
badges.desc_hero: You are looked at as a Role Model to the newest generation of Heroes.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent considerable time with a lackey of your own.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 16 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Continue teaching lesser villains the ropes for this badge.

badges.name: P_Mentor_16Hour
badges.desc_hero: There's a lot of harsh lessons common to all worlds. If you can spare some new kid just one, that's enough for you.
badges.desc_villain: There's a lot of harsh lessons common to all worlds. If you can spare some new kid just one, that's enough for you.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 16 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 16 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.

badges.name: Epitome
badges.desc_hero: You are the Epitome of heroism, and gratefully share your knowledge with younger heroes.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent considerable time helping lesser villains realize their potential.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 20 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Continue teaching lesser villains the ropes for this badge.

badges.name: P_Mentor_20Hour
badges.desc_hero: Like some Greek philosopher, you're approached by wannabes and questioners who want to know the secrets of Praetoria. By fighting alongside them, in a way you're revealing those secrets. That's philosophical enough.
badges.desc_villain: Like some Greek philosopher, you're approached by wannabes and questioners who want to know the secrets of Praetoria. By fighting alongside them, in a way you're revealing those secrets. That's philosophical enough.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 20 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 20 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.

badges.name: Paradigm
badges.desc_hero: You are a Paradigm, that which all other heroes aspire to be.
badges.desc_villain: You've spent considerable time as a boss of others.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 24 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Continue teaching lesser villains the ropes for this badge.

badges.name: P_Mentor_24Hour
badges.desc_hero: There's no doubt you've seen it all, and the young pups who look up to you have started calling you "Old-Timer." You'll take it as a term of endearment.
badges.desc_villain: There's no doubt you've seen it all, and the young pups who look up to you have started calling you "Old-Timer." You'll take it as a term of endearment.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 24 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 24 hours of mentoring to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectInspirations50
badges.desc_hero: Word of your accomplishments is spreading, but you don't seem to care much about it.
badges.desc_villain: Word of your accomplishments is spreading, but you don't seem to care much about it.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 50 Inspirations to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 50 Inspirations to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectInspirations100
badges.desc_hero: Your skill and ability is recognized far and wide, but you appear quite indifferent.
badges.desc_villain: Your skill and ability is recognized far and wide, but you appear quite indifferent.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 100 Inspirations to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 100 Inspirations to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectInspirations500
badges.desc_hero: The world looks at your achievements in awe, but you remain impassive.
badges.desc_villain: The world looks at your achievements in awe, but you remain impassive.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 500 Inspirations to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 500 Inspirations to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectInspirations1000
badges.desc_hero: No matter how amazing, stunning or incredible your actions, nothing seems to inspire you.
badges.desc_villain: No matter how amazing, stunning or incredible your actions, nothing seems to inspire you.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 1000 Inspirations to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 1000 Inspirations to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectRecipes50
badges.desc_hero: There are some recipes you just won't touch.
badges.desc_villain: There are some recipes you just won't touch.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 50 recipes to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 50 recipes to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectRecipes100
badges.desc_hero: You don't want the same old recipes, you want something exotic.
badges.desc_villain: You don't want the same old recipes, you want something exotic.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 100 recipes to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 100 recipes to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectRecipes500
badges.desc_hero: The commonplace is not for you. Only the finest recipes will do!
badges.desc_villain: The commonplace is not for you. Only the finest recipes will do!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 500 recipes to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 500 recipes to earn this badge.

badges.name: RejectRecipes1000
badges.desc_hero: Your trained, discerning eye demands you shun most recipes.
badges.desc_villain: Your trained, discerning eye demands you shun most recipes.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Reject 1000 recipes to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Reject 1000 recipes to earn this badge.

badges.name: AlignmentTipMissions5
badges.desc_hero: There's so many options sometimes in life, you can't help but have a difficult time choosing. You've completed a few Alignment Tip missions and made a couple moral decisions.
badges.desc_villain: There's so many options sometimes in life, you can't help but have a difficult time choosing. You've completed a few Alignment Tip missions and made a couple moral decisions.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 5 Alignment Tip missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 5 Alignment Tip missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: AlignmentTipMissions10
badges.desc_hero: The amount of moral options open to you sometimes leads to compulsory or contradictory decisions, but that's part of the freedom to make choices. You've completed several Alignment Tip missions and made some moral decisions.
badges.desc_villain: The amount of moral options open to you sometimes leads to compulsory or contradictory decisions, but that's part of the freedom to make choices. You've completed several Alignment Tip missions and made some moral decisions.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 10 Alignment Tip missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 10 Alignment Tip missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: AlignmentTipMissions25
badges.desc_hero: You've walked too many roads of life to count, and your experience affords you a position of reflection and wisdom. You've completed countless Alignment Tip missions and made many moral decisions.
badges.desc_villain: You've walked too many roads of life to count, and your experience affords you a position of reflection and wisdom. You've completed countless Alignment Tip missions and made many moral decisions.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 25 Alignment Tip missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 25 Alignment Tip missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: AetherCostume1
badges.desc_hero: You've purchased a permanent costume power reward using the Prismatic Aether acquired from overcoming some challenges.
badges.desc_villain: You've purchased a permanent costume power reward using the Prismatic Aether acquired from overcoming some challenges.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Purchase a costume power using Prismatic Aether salvage.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Purchase a costume power using Prismatic Aether salvage.

badges.name: AetherCostume2
badges.desc_hero: You've purchased five permanent costume powers using the Prismatic Aether you assembled from overcoming many challenges.
badges.desc_villain: You've purchased five permanent costume powers using the Prismatic Aether you assembled from overcoming many challenges.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Purchase five costume powers using Prismatic Aether salvage.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Purchase five costume powers using Prismatic Aether salvage.

badges.name: AetherCostume3
badges.desc_hero: You've purchased ten costume powers using the Prismatic Aether you amassed from overcoming an enormous number of challenges.
badges.desc_villain: You've purchased ten costume powers using the Prismatic Aether you amassed from overcoming an enormous number of challenges.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Purchase ten costume powers using Prismatic Aether salvage.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Purchase ten costume powers using Prismatic Aether salvage.

badges.name: RoleDiversity
badges.desc_hero: It's difficult sometimes to know what challenges you might come across, but having allies with a variety of strengths certainly helps improve your odds. With a well-balanced team you're ready to step forward and seize victory!
badges.desc_villain: In order to properly demonstrate your dominance, it's important you make sure everyone else knows you're a big deal. Towards that, you've elected to keep your most varied rivals close to ensure you're ready to tackle anybody who might become a threat.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete a Task Force with a team that qualifies for Role Diversity.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete a Strike Force with a team that qualifies for Role Diversity.

badges.name: ATDuplication
badges.desc_hero: Sometimes experiences can be uncanny, and when you stop to look around you'll notice peculiarities that surely can't be happenstance... Regardless, you've banded together with your same-Archetype comrades and emerged triumphant!
badges.desc_villain: Sometimes experiences can be uncanny, and when you stop to look around you'll notice peculiarities that surely can't be happenstance... Regardless, you've banded together with your same-Archetype comrades and emerged triumphant!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete a Task Force with a team that qualifies for Archetype Duplication.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete a Task Force with a team that qualifies for Archetype Duplication.

badges.name: MayhemFirebug
badges.desc_hero: For your actions setting Paragon City ablaze, you've been prohibited from owning matches or lighters of any sort.
badges.desc_villain: You have set Paragon City ablaze!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete 10 Arson side missions while doing a Mayhem Mission.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete 10 Arson side missions while doing a Mayhem Mission.

badges.name: MayhemImpounder
badges.desc_hero: No one sane lets you get anywhere close to their vehicles now.
badges.desc_villain: You've done your part to help keep Paragon City's streets clear of traffic.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Destroy 100 cars and trucks in Mayhem Missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy 100 cars and trucks in Mayhem Missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: SafeguardFireMarshal
badges.desc_hero: Paragon officials recognize your efforts in thwarting arsons, and have made you an honorary Fire Marshal.
badges.desc_villain: You were Fired from your honorary post as Fire Marshal when you left for the Rogue Isles.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Prevent 5 arsons in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Prevent 5 arsons in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: SafeguardBombSquad
badges.desc_hero: You were right. It WAS the red wire first.
badges.desc_villain: The best way to make bombs that can't be defused is to train on the Bomb Squad. Needless to say, on yours it's the Blue Wire.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Prevent 5 sewer bombings in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Prevent 5 sewer bombings in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: SafeguardPPDDeputy
badges.desc_hero: Paragon Police officials have deputized you for rescuing several of their officers.
badges.desc_villain: Though the Paragon Police you saved owe you one, they will still bring you down on sight.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Rescue 20 PPD Hostages in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Rescue 20 PPD Hostages in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: SafeguardSecurityExpert
badges.desc_hero: You have protected several local businesses in Paragon City, and the public loves you for it.
badges.desc_villain: You have protected several local businesses in Paragon City, and now know their security inside and out.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Prevent 5 shop robberies in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Prevent 5 shop robberies in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: SafeguardInterceptor
badges.desc_hero: You have kept several shipments of illegal weapons off of the streets.
badges.desc_villain: Keeping your competition from getting their hands on more hardware was remarkably prescient.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Raid 10 weapon deals in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Raid 10 weapon deals in Safeguard missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: MarketCrashValet
badges.desc_hero: You have kept Paragon City's vehicles safe during a Freakshow rampage.
badges.desc_villain: You have kept Paragon City's vehicles safe during a Freakshow rampage.

badges.name: SL1_SewerTrial_LostWorshippersKilled
badges.desc_hero: You defeated all of the Lost worshippers before tackling their leader, ensuring he had no followers to fuel his power.
badges.desc_villain: You defeated all of the Lost worshippers before tackling their leader, ensuring he had no followers to fuel his power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat all of the Lost worshippers in the Sewer Trial before defeating the Lost leader.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat all of the Lost worshippers in the Sewer Trial before defeating the Lost leader.

badges.name: SL1_SewerTrial_VahzCadaversSpared
badges.desc_hero: You took out the mad Vahzilok doctor in the sewers beneath Paragon without killing any of the Cadavers it was controlling.
badges.desc_villain: You took out the mad Vahzilok doctor in the sewers beneath Paragon without killing any of the Cadavers it was controlling.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat the Vahzilok leader in the Sewer Trial without killing any of the Cadavers.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat the Vahzilok leader in the Sewer Trial without killing any of the Cadavers.

badges.name: BloodyBayTrial_SimultaneousDefeat
badges.desc_hero: You defeated both Shivan Obliterators at the end of Drowning in Blood within 30 seconds of each other.
badges.desc_villain: You defeated both Shivan Obliterators at the end of Drowning in Blood within 30 seconds of each other.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat both Neo-Shivan Obliterators within 30 seconds of each other at the end of the Drowning in Blood trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat both Neo-Shivan Obliterators within 30 seconds of each other at the end of the Drowning in Blood trial.

badges.name: BloodyBayTrial_Meteors
badges.desc_hero: You have furthered our understanding of the Shivan by collecting samples from Bloody Bay.
badges.desc_villain: You have furthered our understanding of the Shivan by collecting samples from Bloody Bay.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 4 meteor samples during a single runthrough of the Drowning in Blood trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 4 meteor samples during a single runthrough of the Drowning in Blood trial.

badges.name: I19HeroStoryArcOptional
badges.desc_hero: You helped saved the injured Rogue PPD from being killed in a burning building, showing that you're willing to lend a helping hand even to your enemies.
badges.desc_villain: You helped saved the injured Rogue PPD from being killed in a burning building, showing that you're willing to lend a helping hand even to your enemies.

badges.name: I19VillainStoryArcOptional
badges.desc_hero: You've worked together with a contact in Sharkhead on the side, while investigating the secrets of the Blood Coral.
badges.desc_villain: You've worked together with a contact in Sharkhead on the side, while investigating the secrets of the Blood Coral.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_CaD_GiftedSpeaker
badges.desc_hero: You know how to work a crowd when you need to. With the help of a psychic suggestion device, of course.
badges.desc_villain: You know how to work a crowd when you need to. With the help of a psychic suggestion device, of course.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_CaD_FalseProphet
badges.desc_hero: You're not above using others' beliefs to your own advantage, especially when they're as gullible as the Luddites.
badges.desc_villain: You're not above using others' beliefs to your own advantage, especially when they're as gullible as the Luddites.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_SC_SteelSavior
badges.desc_hero: You have gone above and beyond the call of duty and prevented Steel Canyon from turning into a war zone.
badges.desc_villain: You have gone above and beyond the call of duty and prevented Steel Canyon from turning into a war zone.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_SC_WarHero
badges.desc_hero: You stood in the middle of a war between the Council and the 5th Column, and emerged the victor.
badges.desc_villain: You stood in the middle of a war between the Council and the 5th Column, and emerged the victor.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_SC_Guardian
badges.desc_hero: You used the Pillar of Ice and Flame to cheat death and recruit a new member for Ouroboros.
badges.desc_villain: You used the Pillar of Ice and Flame to cheat death and recruit a new member for Ouroboros.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_SC_DeadlyCombatant
badges.desc_hero: Sun Xiong learned what it meant to face you in combat. It is not a lesson he will recover from.
badges.desc_villain: Sun Xiong learned what it meant to face you in combat. It is not a lesson he will recover from.

badges.name: Mission_LowLevel_SC_DignifiedCombatant
badges.desc_hero: You spared Sun Xiong, despite his attempts to have you killed, and have gained his grudging respect.
badges.desc_villain: You spared Sun Xiong, despite his attempts to have you killed, and have gained his grudging respect.

badges.name: Mission_IP_i25_Vigilante
badges.desc_hero: When the law fails to serve us, we must serve as the law.
badges.desc_villain: When the law fails to serve us, we must serve as the law.

badges.name: Mission_IP_i25_Hero
badges.desc_hero: It is better that ten guilty persons escape than that one innocent suffer.
badges.desc_villain: It is better that ten guilty persons escape than that one innocent suffer.

badges.name: Mission_NA_i25_Rogue
badges.desc_hero: Finding the Florentine Diamond was not as quick or simple as it first seemed.
badges.desc_villain: Finding the Florentine Diamond was not as quick or simple as it first seemed.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Achievement_01
badges.desc_hero: You were able to save Kadabra Kill and Sigil by defeating all the members of the Knives of Vengeance within two minutes.
badges.desc_villain: You were able to save Kadabra Kill and Sigil by defeating all the members of the Knives of Vengeance within two minutes.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Save Kadabra Kill and Sigil in Heather Townshend's arc.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Save Kadabra Kill and Sigil in Heather Townshend's arc.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Achievement_02
badges.desc_hero: You chose to fight against Romulus and his army of Talons by yourself, showing that you know no fear.
badges.desc_villain: You chose to fight against Romulus and his army of Talons by yourself, showing that you know no fear.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Refuse help from the Cimerorans in the final mission for Sister Solaris.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Refuse help from the Cimerorans in the final mission for Sister Solaris.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Achievement_03
badges.desc_hero: You fought against the armies of the Banished Pantheon by yourself, choosing to have the other Incarnates support the rest of Astoria.
badges.desc_villain: You fought against the armies of the Banished Pantheon by yourself, choosing to have the other Incarnates support the rest of Astoria.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Refuse help from other Incarnate NPCs in the final mission of Dream Doctor's arc.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Refuse help from other Incarnate NPCs in the final mission of Dream Doctor's arc.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Achievement_04
badges.desc_hero: You rescued Detective Hopp from the Banished Pantheon in Dark Astoria. When the time came, he remembered you and was able to stay alive long enough for you to find him. The question is, did you actually save him?
badges.desc_villain: You rescued Detective Hopp from the Banished Pantheon in Dark Astoria. When the time came, he remembered you and was able to stay alive long enough for you to find him. The question is, did you actually save him?
badges.earn_hint_hero: Save Detective Hopp at least once in Dark Astoria before your final meeting in Dream Doctor's arc.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Save Detective Hopp at least once in Dark Astoria before your final meeting in Dream Doctor's arc.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Achievement_05
badges.desc_hero: You rescued Madame Bellerose from the forces of Dark Astoria. She eventually succumbed to Mot's will and attacked you, but came to her senses before it was too late. Did you choose to spare her life, or end it when she refused to pay you back?
badges.desc_villain: You rescued Madame Bellerose from the forces of Dark Astoria. She eventually succumbed to Mot's will and attacked you, but came to her senses before it was too late. Did you choose to spare her life, or end it when she refused to pay you back?
badges.earn_hint_hero: Save Madame Bellerose at least once in Dark Astoria before your final meeting in Dream Doctor's arc.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Save Madame Bellerose at least once in Dark Astoria before your final meeting in Dream Doctor's arc.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Achievement_06
badges.desc_hero: The Freedom Phalanx and Vindicators were absorbed by Mot in their efforts to free Praetor Duncan. You worked together with a team of super powered individuals and Dream Doctor to save them and Praetor Duncan, while also destroying Diabolique once and for all.
badges.desc_villain: The Freedom Phalanx and Vindicators were absorbed by Mot in their efforts to free Praetor Duncan. You worked together with a team of super powered individuals and Dream Doctor to save them and Praetor Duncan, while also destroying Diabolique once and for all.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Dilemma Diabolique trial while also having the mission from Dream Doctor to complete it.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Dilemma Diabolique trial while also having the mission from Dream Doctor to complete it.

badges.name: AlphaTF_DronesAlive
badges.desc_hero: You managed to protect all the police drones during the Praetorian's invasion of Kings Row.
badges.desc_villain: You ensured that none of the police drones in Kings Row were were destroyed by the Praetorians. You can think of plenty of other uses for them, especially if you could swipe one for yourself.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Keep all the police drones alive in Apex's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Keep all the police drones alive in Apex's Task Force.

badges.name: AlphaTF_DronesUnused
badges.desc_hero: Who needs the help of police drones? You let them sit on the sidelines and took care of the invasion yourself, while also making sure none of them were destroyed.
badges.desc_villain: You kept the police drones de-activated while also ensuring none of them were destroyed during the attack on Kings Row. It didn't exactly scream 'good idea' to keep those drones activated around you while standing in the heart of Paragon City.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Keep all the police drones alive and de-activated in Apex's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Keep all the police drones alive and de-activated in Apex's Task Force.

badges.name: AlphaTF_BattleMaidenQuick
badges.desc_hero: Battle Maiden thought she was all-powerful, but you put her down before she knew what was happening.
badges.desc_villain: Battle Maiden thought she was all-powerful, but you put her down before she knew what was happening.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Battle Maiden in Apex's Task Force in under 15 minutes.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Battle Maiden in Apex's Task Force in under 15 minutes.

badges.name: AlphaTF_ComputersQuick
badges.desc_hero: You managed to destroy the War Walkers within the secret Praetorian warehouse before the security team could be activated.
badges.desc_villain: You managed to destroy the War Walkers within the secret Praetorian warehouse before the security team could be activated.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Destroy the War Walker factory before security forces arrive in Tin Mage's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy the War Walker factory before security forces arrive in Tin Mage's Task Force.

badges.name: AlphaTF_NoProximityBombs
badges.display_hero: Midnight Dodger What Dodges At Midnight
badges.display_villain: Midnight Dodger What Dodges At Midnight
badges.desc_hero: Director 11 may be a master of demolitions, but you showed him you're a master at dodging bombs.
badges.desc_villain: Director 11 may be a master of demolitions, but you showed him you're a master at dodging bombs.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Avoid being hit at all by any proximity bombs in Tin Mage's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Avoid being hit at all by any proximity bombs in Tin Mage's Task Force.

badges.name: AlphaTF_BobcatMaxed
badges.desc_hero: You saw Bobcat do something no one else has seen; fight with all her effort. Despite her best efforts, you still managed to put her down.
badges.desc_villain: You saw Bobcat do something no one else has seen; fight with all her effort. Despite her best efforts, you still managed to put her down.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Neuron before Bobcat reaches 50% health, then defeat Bobcat in Tin Mage's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Neuron before Bobcat reaches 50% health, then defeat Bobcat in Tin Mage's Task Force.

badges.name: AlphaTF_NeuronClones
badges.desc_hero: You waded through a small army of Neuron's clones in order to help push back Praetoria's invasion of Primal Earth.
badges.desc_villain: You waded through a small army of Neuron's clones in order to help push back Praetoria's invasion of Primal Earth.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat 40 of Neuron's clones in Tin Mage's Task Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 40 of Neuron's clones in Tin Mage's Task Force.

badges.name: IT_BAF_NoEscapes
badges.desc_hero: Not a single Mindwashed Resistance member was allowed to escape the Behavioral Adjustment Facility on your watch.
badges.desc_villain: Not a single Mindwashed Resistance member was allowed to escape the Behavioral Adjustment Facility on your watch.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Allow no Mindwashed Prisoners to escape during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Allow no Mindwashed Prisoners to escape during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_BAF_NoTowers
badges.desc_hero: Whether by chutzpah or ignorance, you managed to assault the Behavioral Adjustment Facility without ever disabling a single one of their guard towers.
badges.desc_villain: Whether by chutzpah or ignorance, you managed to assault the Behavioral Adjustment Facility without ever disabling a single one of their guard towers.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Never disable a Guard Tower using the controls at its base during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Never disable a Guard Tower using the controls at its base during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_BAF_NoMovingAVs
badges.desc_hero: Siege and Nightstar usually fight as a duo, but you decided to divide and conquer, defeating them in the Behavioral Adjustment Facility where they stood.
badges.desc_villain: Siege and Nightstar usually fight as a duo, but you decided to divide and conquer, defeating them in the Behavioral Adjustment Facility where they stood.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Siege & Nightstar without moving them from their initial locations during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Siege & Nightstar without moving them from their initial locations during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_BAF_NoAdds
badges.desc_hero: Siege and Nightstar are the real threat at the Behavioral Adjustment Facility, but you added insult to injury by depriving them of all their War Works allies prior to administering the final simultaneous blow.
badges.desc_villain: Siege and Nightstar are the real threat at the Behavioral Adjustment Facility, but you added insult to injury by depriving them of all their War Works allies prior to administering the final simultaneous blow.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Siege & Nightstar while none of their reinforcements are alive during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Siege & Nightstar while none of their reinforcements are alive during a Behavioral Adjustment Facility Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_Lambda_Simultaneity
badges.desc_hero: You proved masterful coordination during a raid on Lambda Sector by your league destroying two separate objectives simultaneously.
badges.desc_villain: You proved masterful coordination during a raid on Lambda Sector by your league destroying two separate objectives simultaneously.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Destroy a Weapons Cache and an Incubation Pod within 2 seconds of each other during the Lambda Sector Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy a Weapons Cache and an Incubation Pod within 2 seconds of each other during the Lambda Sector Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_Lambda_NoGrenades
badges.desc_hero: Demonstrating a dogged persistence, you wore Marauder down in Lambda Sector without using a single Pacification Grenade despite having a full set.
badges.desc_villain: Demonstrating a dogged persistence, you wore Marauder down in Lambda Sector without using a single Pacification Grenade despite having a full set.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Lambda Sector Trial while acquiring all Pacification Grenades and no Molecular Acids from the facility's interior, and using no acids or grenades in the final battle. You must also not acquire any acids or grenades from the Reinforcements during the Marauder fight.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Lambda Sector Trial while acquiring all Pacification Grenades and no Molecular Acids from the facility's interior, and using no acids or grenades in the final battle. You must also not acquire any acids or grenades from the Reinforcements during the Marauder fight.

badges.name: IT_Lambda_NoAcids
badges.desc_hero: You mocked the Top Dog himself by refusing to use any of the collected Molecular Acids to stop Marauder's reinforcements during a Lambda Sector raid.
badges.desc_villain: You mocked the Top Dog himself by refusing to use any of the collected Molecular Acids to stop Marauder's reinforcements during a Lambda Sector raid.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Lambda Sector Trial while acquiring all Molecular Acids and no Pacification Grenades from the facility's interior, and using no acids or grenades in the final battle. You must also not acquire any acids or grenades from the Reinforcements during the Marauder fight.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Lambda Sector Trial while acquiring all Molecular Acids and no Pacification Grenades from the facility's interior, and using no acids or grenades in the final battle. You must also not acquire any acids or grenades from the Reinforcements during the Marauder fight.

badges.name: IT_Lambda_NoPowers
badges.desc_hero: Perhaps you didn't know this, but the items collected in Lambda Sector can be used in the fight versus Marauder to make it easier. Your league, however, decided to collect a full set of both items and not use a single one. Kudos to you.
badges.desc_villain: Perhaps you didn't know this, but the items collected in Lambda Sector can be used in the fight versus Marauder to make it easier. Your league, however, decided to collect a full set of both items and not use a single one. Kudos to you.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Lambda Sector Incarnate Trial having acquired 10 Pacification Grenades and 10 Molecular Acids but using none of them. You must also not acquire any acids or grenades from the Reinforcements during the Marauder fight.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Lambda Sector Incarnate Trial having acquired 10 Pacification Grenades and 10 Molecular Acids but using none of them. You must also not acquire any acids or grenades from the Reinforcements during the Marauder fight.

badges.name: IT_Keyes_StrongPulse
badges.desc_hero: You didn't defeat Anti-Matter when you weren't supposed to during the Keyes Island Reactor, but you came really close and still toughed it out.
badges.desc_villain: You didn't defeat Anti-Matter when you weren't supposed to during the Keyes Island Reactor, but you came really close and still toughed it out.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial after having brought Anti-Matter below 10% of his health while attempting to take control of Reactor Hope, the western-most reactor.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial after having brought Anti-Matter below 10% of his health while attempting to take control of Reactor Hope, the western-most reactor.

badges.name: IT_Keyes_BunkerBuster
badges.desc_hero: Your league's coordinated strike blew the hinges off multiple bunker doors at once during your fight at Keyes Island Reactor.
badges.desc_villain: Your league's coordinated strike blew the hinges off multiple bunker doors at once during your fight at Keyes Island Reactor.
badges.earn_hint_hero: During the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial, bust down all three doors on a bunker within three seconds, and then repeat for all bunkers found near Reactor Infinity.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial, bust down all three doors on a bunker within three seconds, and then repeat for all bunkers found near Reactor Infinity.

badges.name: IT_Keyes_Challenge
badges.desc_hero: You successfully faced down Anti-Matter without losing anyone during the fight or destroying his regenerative terminal links during Keyes Island Reactor.
badges.desc_villain: You successfully faced down Anti-Matter without losing anyone during the fight or destroying his regenerative terminal links during Keyes Island Reactor.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial without having anyone die or destroy any terminals in the final battle versus Anti-Matter.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial without having anyone die or destroy any terminals in the final battle versus Anti-Matter.

badges.name: IT_Keyes_NoHolds
badges.desc_hero: You defeated Anti-Matter at the Keyes Island Reactor without letting a member of your league get caught in an Obliteration Beam.
badges.desc_villain: You defeated Anti-Matter at the Keyes Island Reactor without letting a member of your league get caught in an Obliteration Beam.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Don't let anyone be caught by an Obliteration Beam in the final battle with Anti-Matter during the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Don't let anyone be caught by an Obliteration Beam in the final battle with Anti-Matter during the Keyes Island Reactor Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_Underground_FastKill
badges.desc_hero: You blitzed the Self-Repairing and Lichen Infested War Walkers within 8 minutes of starting combat in the Underground.
badges.desc_villain: You blitzed the Self-Repairing and Lichen Infested War Walkers within 8 minutes of starting combat in the Underground.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat the Self-Repairing and Lichen Infested War Walkers within 8 minutes of starting the battle with them during the Underground Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat the Self-Repairing and Lichen Infested War Walkers within 8 minutes of starting the battle with them during the Underground Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_Underground_DesHealth
badges.desc_hero: While escorting Desdemona through the Underground, you never let her drop below half health.
badges.desc_villain: While escorting Desdemona through the Underground, you never let her drop below half health.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Don't let Desdemona's health drop below 50% during the Underground Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Don't let Desdemona's health drop below 50% during the Underground Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_Underground_AllBombs
badges.desc_hero: The Demolition Charges sent by the IDF to take out the Underground didn't pose a threat to your league, and you were able to take all of them out without a single detonation.
badges.desc_villain: The Demolition Charges sent by the IDF to take out the Underground didn't pose a threat to your league, and you were able to take all of them out without a single detonation.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Destroy all IDF Bombs (except those in the Avatar of Hamidon's room) in the Underground Incarnate Trial without a single one going off.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy all IDF Bombs (except those in the Avatar of Hamidon's room) in the Underground Incarnate Trial without a single one going off.

badges.name: IT_Underground_AvatarBomb
badges.desc_hero: You took a risk and managed to defeat the Avatar of Hamidon in the Underground at the same time a Detonating Seedling was about to go off.
badges.desc_villain: You took a risk and managed to defeat the Avatar of Hamidon in the Underground at the same time a Detonating Seedling was about to go off.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat the Avatar of Hamidon while a Detonating Seedling is present in its room during the Underground Incarnate Trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat the Avatar of Hamidon while a Detonating Seedling is present in its room during the Underground Incarnate Trial.

badges.name: IT_TPN_PropagandaChallenge
badges.desc_hero: You managed to successfully complete each major broadcast to the people of Praetoria within a few minutes, establishing to the world that Tyrant's Imperial forces are no obstacle to the Incarnates and their mission to deliver the truth to the people during the raid on TPN Campus.
badges.desc_villain: You managed to successfully complete each major broadcast to the people of Praetoria within a few minutes, establishing to the world that Tyrant's Imperial forces are no obstacle to the Incarnates and their mission to deliver the truth to the people during the raid on TPN Campus.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete all three 500-point Public Opinion challenges, taking no more than 8 minutes per challenge, and then finish the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete all three 500-point Public Opinion challenges, taking no more than 8 minutes per challenge, and then finish the trial.

badges.name: IT_TPN_TelepathistChallenge
badges.desc_hero: The Imperial forces threw some of Mother Mayhems' mindwashing Telepathists at the populace in an effort to turn them against you, and you stepped up to shut them down. No Telepathist managed to convert four citizens during the raid on TPN Campus.
badges.desc_villain: The Imperial forces threw some of Mother Mayhems' mindwashing Telepathists at the populace in an effort to turn them against you, and you stepped up to shut them down. No Telepathist managed to convert four citizens during the raid on TPN Campus.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Do not allow a single Telepathist to convert 4 or more citizens for the duration of TPN Campus, and then finish the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Do not allow a single Telepathist to convert 4 or more citizens for the duration of TPN Campus, and then finish the trial.

badges.name: IT_TPN_TelevisionChallenge
badges.desc_hero: During the raid on TPN Campus, H.D. offered you his assistance in delivering the truth to the world, with only his protection as his price. You accepted his bargain and delivered far better than would be expected with the IDF swarming the facility, thus ensuring that H.D. had the greatest chance to deliver your message with no interference.
badges.desc_villain: During the raid on TPN Campus, H.D. offered you his assistance in delivering the truth to the world, with only his protection as his price. You accepted his bargain and delivered far better than would be expected with the IDF swarming the facility, thus ensuring that H.D. had the greatest chance to deliver your message with no interference.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete all four terminals in all three buildings during each 500-point Public Opinion challenge, while also keeping H.D. above 80% health at all times, and then finish the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete all four terminals in all three buildings during each 500-point Public Opinion challenge, while also keeping H.D. above 80% health at all times, and then finish the trial.

badges.name: IT_TPN_MaelstromChallenge
badges.desc_hero: Maelstrom arrived during the raid on TPN Campus to send a message of his own: that he would not allow the Incarnates to spread their 'lies'. Not only did his efforts fail, but you also managed to defeat him handily, adding his humiliating defeats to your message to the people of Praetoria.
badges.desc_villain: Maelstrom arrived during the raid on TPN Campus to send a message of his own: that he would not allow the Incarnates to spread their 'lies'. Not only did his efforts fail, but you also managed to defeat him handily, adding his humiliating defeats to your message to the people of Praetoria.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Maelstrom within four minutes during each of his three encounters.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Maelstrom within four minutes during each of his three encounters.

badges.name: IT_MoM_MalaiseChallenge
badges.desc_hero: Through persistence or madness, you have faced down the many nightmares of Malaise while battling him in the dreamscape of the Minds of Mayhem.
badges.desc_villain: Through persistence or madness, you have faced down the many nightmares of Malaise while battling him in the dreamscape of the Minds of Mayhem.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat all of Malaise's possible nightmares at least once.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat all of Malaise's possible nightmares at least once.

badges.name: IT_MoM_PenelopeChallenge
badges.desc_hero: Despite the furious typhoon of psychic energy enveloping you within Mother Yin's layer of the Minds of Mayhem, you were able to keep calm, efficiently using the precious Eyes of the Storm to put an end to Mother Mayhem's hold on Penelope Yin.
badges.desc_villain: Despite the furious typhoon of psychic energy enveloping you within Mother Yin's layer of the Minds of Mayhem, you were able to keep calm, efficiently using the precious Eyes of the Storm to put an end to Mother Mayhem's hold on Penelope Yin.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Mother Yin while creating no more than 4 Eyes of the Storm, then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Mother Yin while creating no more than 4 Eyes of the Storm, then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_MoM_AuroraChallenge
badges.desc_hero: Deep within the Minds of Mayhem, you came across the long-suffering Aurora Borealis, whose body and mind had been taken over by Shalice Tilman. Separating the two was never going to be an easy task, but you did it while valiantly defending Aurora Borealis, delivering her from Tilman's torment with a minimum of suffering.
badges.desc_villain: Deep within the Minds of Mayhem, you came across the long-suffering Aurora Borealis, whose body and mind had been taken over by Shalice Tilman. Separating the two was never going to be an easy task, but you did it while valiantly defending Aurora Borealis, delivering her from Tilman's torment with a minimum of suffering.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Mother Mayhem without allowing Aurora Borealis' health to drop below 75%, and then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Mother Mayhem without allowing Aurora Borealis' health to drop below 75%, and then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_MoM_ShaliceChallenge
badges.desc_hero: When you finally were able to confront Shalice Tilman within the depths of the Minds of Mayhem, you found that she would not go easily, for she was strongly connected to the Seer Network. Despite this difficulty, you found a way to sever her connections with little trouble, never allowing her to regain her strength after being chased from Malaise's broken body.
badges.desc_villain: When you finally were able to confront Shalice Tilman within the depths of the Minds of Mayhem, you found that she would not go easily, for she was strongly connected to the Seer Network. Despite this difficulty, you found a way to sever her connections with little trouble, never allowing her to regain her strength after being chased from Malaise's broken body.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Shalice Tilman without missing any opportunity to sever her connection to the Seer Network, and then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Shalice Tilman without missing any opportunity to sever her connection to the Seer Network, and then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_DD_TimeChallenge
badges.desc_hero: In beginning your assault on Mot during Dilemma Diabolique, you and your league did not think it sufficient to merely destroy the Repulsive Spines and bring down the protective barrier around Mot's plateau. Instead, you wanted to send a message. You wanted to bring down all the Repulsive Spines at once.... and succeeded.
badges.desc_villain: In beginning your assault on Mot during Dilemma Diabolique, you and your league did not think it sufficient to merely destroy the Repulsive Spines and bring down the protective barrier around Mot's plateau. Instead, you wanted to send a message. You wanted to bring down all the Repulsive Spines at once.... and succeeded.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Destroy all four Repulsive Spines maintaining the protective barrier around Mot within one minute of each other during the initial assault in Dilemma Diabolique, and then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy all four Repulsive Spines maintaining the protective barrier around Mot within one minute of each other during the initial assault in Dilemma Diabolique, and then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_DD_SentinelChallenge
badges.desc_hero: Diabolique thought she had ensured that the Sentinel could be prepared for any situation simply by absorbing the powers of the heroes she had captured. In a display of confidence or hubris, you decided to make a point by giving the Sentinel its best possible chance of defeating your league. Even in this dangerous state, you achieved victory over the Sentinel during Dilemma Diabolique.
badges.desc_villain: Diabolique thought she had ensured that the Sentinel could be prepared for any situation simply by absorbing the powers of the heroes she had captured. In a display of confidence or hubris, you decided to make a point by giving the Sentinel its best possible chance of defeating your league. Even in this dangerous state, you achieved victory over the Sentinel during Dilemma Diabolique.
badges.earn_hint_hero: During Dilemma Diabolique, defeat the Sentinel with the following three powers acquired from controlled heroes: Aura of Decay (from Numina/Swan), Touch of Death (from Sister Psyche/Luminary) and Grasp of Death (from Citadel/Infernal), and then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During Dilemma Diabolique, defeat the Sentinel with the following three powers acquired from controlled heroes: Aura of Decay (from Numina/Swan), Touch of Death (from Sister Psyche/Luminary) and Grasp of Death (from Citadel/Infernal), and then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_DD_NoRescueChallenge
badges.desc_hero: Though two heroes remained captured and indentured to Diabolique, you chose to ignore them during the final battle and focused instead on Diabolique. In spite of the extra complications that this choice brought to your battle against Diabolique, you still prevailed against her and put an end to her mad scheme to become Death Incarnate during Dilemma Diabolique.
badges.desc_villain: Though two heroes remained captured and indentured to Diabolique, you chose to ignore them during the final battle and focused instead on Diabolique. In spite of the extra complications that this choice brought to your battle against Diabolique, you still prevailed against her and put an end to her mad scheme to become Death Incarnate during Dilemma Diabolique.
badges.earn_hint_hero: During the final battle of Dilemma Diabolique, defeat Diabolique without defeating the two heroes under her control and allowing her to receive their benefits for the entire battle.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During the final battle of Dilemma Diabolique, defeat Diabolique without defeating the two heroes under her control and allowing her to receive their benefits for the entire battle.

badges.name: IT_DD_HealingChallenge
badges.desc_hero: For a woman so obsessed with becoming Death Incarnate, Diabolique sure spent a lot of energy making sure that she had a ready supply of Lifegiving Essences to keep her alive during your final battle in Dilemma Diabolique. In the end, though, they proved to be little more than an inconvenience for your league, as you did not allow a single one to successfully be used to heal her.
badges.desc_villain: For a woman so obsessed with becoming Death Incarnate, Diabolique sure spent a lot of energy making sure that she had a ready supply of Lifegiving Essences to keep her alive during your final battle in Dilemma Diabolique. In the end, though, they proved to be little more than an inconvenience for your league, as you did not allow a single one to successfully be used to heal her.
badges.earn_hint_hero: During the final battle of Dilemma Diabolique, defeat Diabolique without allowing her to heal from a single Lifegiving Essence.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During the final battle of Dilemma Diabolique, defeat Diabolique without allowing her to heal from a single Lifegiving Essence.

badges.name: IT_MAG_Challenge1
badges.desc_hero: While one Praetor is a challenge for the most potent of superpowers, you and your league masterfully tackled a group of three with startling simultaneity!  You are henceforth known as a Triple Threat.
badges.desc_villain: While one Praetor is a challenge for the most potent of superpowers, you and your league masterfully tackled a group of three with startling simultaneity!  You are henceforth known as a Triple Threat.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat all three Archvillains during the Battle Royale stage of Magisterium within 5 seconds of the first one's defeat, and then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat all three Archvillains during the Battle Royale stage of Magisterium within 5 seconds of the first one's defeat, and then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_MAG_Challenge2
badges.desc_hero: Pendragon, Chimera, Shadowhunter, Black Swan, and a legion of IDF fell before you and your league with startling rapidity. By demonstrating your speed at mowing through Praetoria's last line of defense, you have proven that you are Ready to Rumble!
badges.desc_villain: Pendragon, Chimera, Shadowhunter, Black Swan, and a legion of IDF fell before you and your league with startling rapidity. By demonstrating your speed at mowing through Praetoria's last line of defense, you have proven that you are Ready to Rumble!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Black Swan sooner than 8 minutes after entering the Magisterium, and then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Black Swan sooner than 8 minutes after entering the Magisterium, and then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_MAG_Challenge3
badges.desc_hero: Though Black Swan attempted to tear open the barrier between Shadow Earth and Praetoria, you stopped her shadowy suffusion before it could overwhelm your League and stain your souls. You are a true Shadow Master.
badges.desc_villain: Though Black Swan attempted to tear open the barrier between Shadow Earth and Praetoria, you stopped her shadowy suffusion before it could overwhelm your League and stain your souls. You are a true Shadow Master.
badges.earn_hint_hero: During the battle with Black Swan, never allow her to open all six Shadow Rifts simultaneously, then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During the battle with Black Swan, never allow her to open all six Shadow Rifts simultaneously, then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_MAG_Challenge4
badges.desc_hero: You've never been one to do things the easy way, have you? You've proven true mastery over your Incarnate powers and the Well of the Furies by defeating Tyrant while he maintained most of his link to the Well. You've taken The Hard Way - and prevailed!
badges.desc_villain: You've never been one to do things the easy way, have you? You've proven true mastery over your Incarnate powers and the Well of the Furies by defeating Tyrant while he maintained most of his link to the Well. You've taken The Hard Way - and prevailed!
badges.earn_hint_hero: During the final battle with Tyrant, defeat Tyrant without destroying more than 12 Lights of the Well, then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During the final battle with Tyrant, defeat Tyrant without destroying more than 12 Lights of the Well, then complete the trial.

badges.name: IT_MAG_EpicChallenge
badges.desc_hero: You have accomplished that which was seemingly impossible - defeating the champion of the Well of the Furies while he was at his full power!  Congratulations to you - you are one of the strongest superpowered beings ever to walk the multiverse.
badges.desc_villain: You have accomplished that which was seemingly impossible - defeating the champion of the Well of the Furies while he was at his full power!  Congratulations to you - you are one of the strongest superpowered beings ever to walk the multiverse.
badges.earn_hint_hero: During the final battle with Tyrant, defeat Tyrant without destroying any Lights of the Well, then complete the trial.
badges.earn_hint_villain: During the final battle with Tyrant, defeat Tyrant without destroying any Lights of the Well, then complete the trial.

badges.name: AeonSF_Challenge1
badges.desc_hero: You've taught the Gold Brickers the dangers of overclocking their powersuits by taking advantage of the situation and using a Brickernaut's power core that went critical to deal the finishing blow to their own princess.
badges.desc_villain: You've taught the Gold Brickers the dangers of overclocking their powersuits by taking advantage of the situation and using a Brickernaut's power core that went critical to deal the finishing blow to their own princess.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Use a confused Golden Brickernaut's self-destruct to hit Princess Zoe while her health is under 10% on Malicious difficulty or higher in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Use a confused Golden Brickernaut's self-destruct to hit Princess Zoe while her health is under 10% on Malicious difficulty or higher in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.

badges.name: AeonSF_Challenge2
badges.desc_hero: You've shown yourself to be incredibly adaptable by overcoming every major threat found within the familiar-yet-different dimensional ripples Golden Roller tossed your team into.
badges.desc_villain: You've shown yourself to be incredibly adaptable by overcoming every major threat found within the familiar-yet-different dimensional ripples Golden Roller tossed your team into.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Successfully conquer all twelve powerful foes within Golden Roller's dimensional ripples in a single attempt in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Successfully conquer all twelve powerful foes within Golden Roller's dimensional ripples in a single attempt in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.

badges.name: AeonSF_Challenge3
badges.desc_hero: You like to make demonstrations of your power, it's what makes you a cut above the rest. You didn't bat an eye in letting Ripplesurge consume environmental ripple energy, and empowering himself to his absolute limit before showing him why no degree of overwhelming power can stand against your own might.
badges.desc_villain: You like to make demonstrations of your power, it's what makes you a cut above the rest. You didn't bat an eye in letting Ripplesurge consume environmental ripple energy, and empowering himself to his absolute limit before showing him why no degree of overwhelming power can stand against your own might.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat Ripplesurge while it is empowered from standing in the residual energy left behind from consuming a Shimmering Effusion while on Malicious difficulty or higher in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat Ripplesurge while it is empowered from standing in the residual energy left behind from consuming a Shimmering Effusion while on Malicious difficulty or higher in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.

badges.name: AeonSF_Challenge4
badges.desc_hero: You've shown King Midas that he can't touch this by defeating him without anyone on your team being hit by a single one of his Ripple Singularity attacks.
badges.desc_villain: You've shown King Midas that he can't touch this by defeating him without anyone on your team being hit by a single one of his Ripple Singularity attacks.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat King Midas without any members of the team being hit by a Ripple Singularity during the length of the fight on Malicious difficulty or higher in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat King Midas without any members of the team being hit by a Ripple Singularity during the length of the fight on Malicious difficulty or higher in Dr. Aeon's Strike Force.

badges.name: ZoeTF_Challenge1
badges.desc_hero: You've proven to be light on your feet, dodging all of the deadly cones of cold sent your way by Ultimatum's Flashfreeze, the agent who holds commanding authority over Blackwing Industries' P.E.A.C.E. division.

badges.name: ZoeTF_Challenge2

badges.name: ZoeTF_Challenge3
