badges.desc_villain: When it comes to collecting souvenirs from your foes, you don't just take anything that's not nailed down; you take the nails, too.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 50 souvenirs to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 50 souvenirs to earn this badge.

badges.name: SouvenirCount100
badges.desc_hero: The more souvenirs you gather, the more you want. This is starting to become an obsession.
badges.desc_villain: The more souvenirs you gather, the more you want. This is starting to become an obsession.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 100 souvenirs to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 100 souvenirs to earn this badge.

badges.name: SouvenirCount200
badges.desc_hero: You never throw anything away, lest it be the clue that unravels the next mystery of the universe. Your collection of souvenirs makes museums jealous, and you wouldn't get rid of any of them.
badges.desc_villain: You never throw anything away, lest it be the clue that unravels the next mystery of the universe. Your collection of souvenirs makes museums jealous, and you wouldn't get rid of any of them.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 200 souvenirs to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 200 souvenirs to earn this badge.

badges.name: Tourist
badges.desc_hero: You have earned 10 badges. You are officially a tourist in Paragon City.
badges.desc_villain: You've earned 10 Badges, making you a Visitor of the Rogue Isles.

badges.name: P_Badges_10
badges.desc_hero: Keeping your eyes and ears open, you've earned 10 badges. Amongst those who follow these things, this qualifies you as a Lead-Follower.
badges.desc_villain: Keeping your eyes and ears open, you've earned 10 badges. Amongst those who follow these things, this qualifies you as a Lead-Follower.

badges.name: Collector
badges.desc_hero: You have collected 25 badges.
badges.desc_villain: You've earned enough badges to be called a Native.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 25 badges!
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 25 badges!

badges.name: P_Badges_25
badges.desc_hero: 25 badges later, it's clear now nothing will keep you from uncovering the secrets of Praetoria and beyond.
badges.desc_villain: 25 badges later, it's clear now nothing will keep you from uncovering the secrets of Praetoria and beyond.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 25 badges!
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 25 badges!

badges.name: Explorer
badges.desc_hero: Your diligence has earned you 50 badges.
badges.desc_villain: That's 50 Badges. Some call you determined. Most call you Obsessed.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 50 badges!
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 50 badges!

badges.name: P_Badges_50
badges.desc_hero: From the depths of the Underground to the top of the Magisterium, Praetoria is built on lies. After 50 badges, you've learned this truth.
badges.desc_villain: From the depths of the Underground to the top of the Magisterium, Praetoria is built on lies. After 50 badges, you've learned this truth.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 50 badges!
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 50 badges!

badges.name: Pathfinder
badges.desc_hero: Your eye for exploration and achievement is recognized. You have earned 100 badges.
badges.desc_villain: Your eye for exploration and achievement is recognized. You have earned 100 badges.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 100 badges!
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 100 badges!

badges.name: P_Badges_100
badges.desc_hero: The secrets of all dimensions lie before you. You realize 100 badges is but a step in the right direction.
badges.desc_villain: The secrets of all dimensions lie before you. You realize 100 badges is but a step in the right direction.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 100 badges!
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 100 badges!

badges.name: Trailblazer
badges.desc_hero: You can usually tell where a hero is going by having a look at where they've been, and you've left your mark on almost everything you've touched in Paragon City. You've been there, done that, and still adventure beckons you. Carry on, Hero!
badges.desc_villain: You're a villain who knows what you want, and you take it. The world is your oyster; go forth and conquer.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 200 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 200 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Badges_200
badges.desc_hero: Though you may be a foreigner in Primal Earth, your many and varied accomplishments precede you nowadays.
badges.desc_villain: Though you may be a foreigner in Primal Earth, your many and varied accomplishments precede you nowadays.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 200 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 200 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: 500Badges
badges.desc_hero: You're a hero recognized for your wide range of accomplishments, but you're not done yet!
badges.desc_villain: You're a villain who'll do whatever it takes to get what you want, and you've only just begun.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 500 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 500 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Badges_500
badges.desc_hero: There are still secrets to root out, and battles to be won, but an Overachiever such as yourself can spare a moment to rest on your vast array of laurels.
badges.desc_villain: There are still secrets to root out, and battles to be won, but an Overachiever such as yourself can spare a moment to rest on your vast array of laurels.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 500 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 500 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: 750Badges
badges.desc_hero: You've explored your world and tackled dangerous obstacles that would fell lesser heroes. However, you get the distinct impression there is still much left to do.
badges.desc_villain: You've conquered, plotted against, and crushed your enemies. However, none of this gives you total fulfillment; there's still so much left to be done.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 750 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 750 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Badges_750
badges.desc_hero: Your motto seems to be, "If it was not meant to be done, it would not be there." So far all the universes you've visited tend to agree.
badges.desc_villain: Your motto seems to be, "If it was not meant to be done, it would not be there." So far all the universes you've visited tend to agree.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 750 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 750 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: 1000Badges
badges.desc_hero: You've experienced more in the last few years than most will in their entire lives. That said, you know you're not done yet.
badges.desc_villain: You've seen what the world has to offer, and you want it all.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 1000 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 1000 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Badges_1000
badges.desc_hero: If experience is any measure, you've accomplished enough for several lifetimes. You'd like to see any dimension, Primal or Praetorian, try to pull something you can't handle.
badges.desc_villain: If experience is any measure, you've accomplished enough for several lifetimes. You'd like to see any dimension, Primal or Praetorian, try to pull something you can't handle.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 1000 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 1000 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: 1250Badges
badges.desc_hero: You've been able to handle everything the world has thrown at you. You've battled across Paragon City and the Rogue Isles, have thwarted alien invasions and explored strange new dimensions, but you have a sneaking suspicion that there is still much more to be done.
badges.desc_villain: You've been able to handle everything the world has thrown at you. You've battled across Paragon City and the Rogue Isles, have thwarted alien invasions and explored strange new dimensions, but you have a sneaking suspicion that there is still much more to be done.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 1250 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 1250 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: P_Badges_1250
badges.desc_hero: Standing in the Magisterium for the first time, never in your wildest dreams could you have guessed the road you'd take from there to here. But there is no rest for someone such as yourself, and though you can't predict where you will head next - you will still charge ahead!
badges.desc_villain: Standing in the Magisterium for the first time, never in your wildest dreams could you have guessed the road you'd take from there to here. But there is no rest for someone such as yourself, and though you can't predict where you will head next - you will still charge ahead!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 1250 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 1250 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: 1500Badges
badges.display_hero: Until the End of the World
badges.display_villain: Until the End of the World
badges.desc_hero: You've seen your world and others come to the brink many times, but each time you've been there to pull them back and keep things going. And you'll continue to be there, no matter what the future brings.
badges.desc_villain: You've seen your world and others come to the brink many times, but each time you've been there to pull them back and keep things going. And you'll continue to be there, no matter what the future brings.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 1500 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 1500 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: 1750Badges
badges.desc_hero: You've outlasted the doomsayers and the ticking clocks. Your journey didn't stop at the end of the world, it just got more interesting. You've proven that true heroism isn't just about the battle... it's about the endurance.
badges.desc_villain: You've outlasted the doomsayers and the ticking clocks. Your journey didn't stop at the end of the world, it just got more interesting. You've proven that true villany isn't just about the battle... it's about the endurance.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Collect 1750 badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Collect 1750 badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: BetaTester
badges.desc_hero: Your stalwart efforts in tracking down and eradicating evil bugs have been recognized by the Paragon City authorities. Thanks to you, the City of Heroes has its pests firmly under control.
badges.desc_villain: Your stalwart efforts in tracking down and eradicating evil bugs have been recognized by the Paragon City authorities. Thanks to you, the City of Heroes has its pests firmly under control.

badges.name: BetaTester2
badges.desc_hero: You have been recognized as an official Beta Tester of the 'City of' franchise.
badges.desc_villain: You have been recognized as an official Beta Tester of the 'City of' franchise.

badges.name: LRTAccolade
badges.desc_hero: Your travels have taken you to mysterious and exotic places. You have faced many dangers, but now you have returned to the place you call home.
badges.desc_villain: Your travels have taken you to mysterious and exotic places. You have faced many dangers, but now you have returned to the place you call home.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain this accolade by collecting ten Exploration badges. Earning this accolade grants you the Long Range Teleporter power.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain this accolade by collecting ten Exploration badges. Earning this accolade grants you the Long Range Teleporter power.

badges.name: UnderTheKnifeUsed
badges.desc_hero: You have stolen the power of the Nexus of Thorns with the knowledge from the demon Sparcetriel.
badges.desc_villain: You have stolen the power of the Nexus of Thorns with the knowledge from the demon Sparcetriel.

badges.name: NipTuckUsed
badges.desc_hero: You have stolen the power of the Nexus of Thorns with the knowledge from the demon Trepsarciel.
badges.desc_villain: You have stolen the power of the Nexus of Thorns with the knowledge from the demon Trepsarciel.

badges.name: FaceliftedUsed
badges.desc_hero: You have stolen the power of the Nexus of Thorns with the knowledge from the demon Ractespriel.
badges.desc_villain: You have stolen the power of the Nexus of Thorns with the knowledge from the demon Ractespriel.

badges.name: MiragePatron
badges.desc_hero: Perhaps Scirocco is secretly envious of your break to the side of honor, but he still cannot brook your betrayal.
badges.desc_villain: You have chosen Scirocco's cause. He will not forget your noble gesture.

badges.name: BloodInTheWaterPatron
badges.desc_hero: Captain Mako once called you an ally. Now he calls you a snack.
badges.desc_villain: You're deadly and cold-blooded. Captain Mako appreciates that.

badges.name: SpidersKissPatron
badges.desc_hero: You've broken your ties with Ghost Widow, but you can never tell for sure. Be careful, or your former Patron may claim your spirit from afar.
badges.desc_villain: In a world of treachery who can you trust but Ghost Widow?

badges.name: TheStingerPatron
badges.desc_hero: This is the sound Black Scorpion's arm cannon will make when you run into him next. Didn't you learn not to peeve the guy in powered armor?
badges.desc_villain: 'Pretty soon, nobody's gonna be able to touch me. Stick with me and you'll go places,' Black Scorpion said approvingly.

badges.name: ReclusesRightHand
badges.desc_hero: Lord Recluse was wrong to place his trust in you.
badges.desc_villain: You are the most villainous of villains and I, Lord Recluse, am proud of you!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete every story arc from Black Scorpion, Captain Mako, Ghost Widow, Scirocco and Lord Recluse to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete every story arc from Black Scorpion, Captain Mako, Ghost Widow, Scirocco and Lord Recluse to earn this badge.

badges.name: Marshal
badges.desc_hero: You once held the title of Marshal in Arachnos. Unfortunately, the memory is all that remains of the power it once gave you.
badges.desc_villain: You've been awarded the title of Marshal for your service to Arachnos. This has given you a 5% increase to Endurance.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Paragon of Vice, Annihilator, The Mongoose, The Next Big Thing, Weapon of Mass Destruction and Arachnos Rising.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Paragon of Vice, Annihilator, The Mongoose, The Next Big Thing, Weapon of Mass Destruction and Arachnos Rising.

badges.name: HeadlineStealer
badges.desc_hero: While rampaging in the Rogue Isles, you acquired an Immobilizer Ray. Unfortunately, it seems to require something only present there to recharge.
badges.desc_villain: In your crime spree you have acquired an Immobilizer Ray. You're not sure where it came from, but it sure is useful for stopping foes in their tracks.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Couch Potato, Electrician, Strike Buster, Surging, Crooked Politician, Master of the Airwaves and Crimelord.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Couch Potato, Electrician, Strike Buster, Surging, Crooked Politician, Master of the Airwaves and Crimelord.

badges.name: BornInBattle
badges.desc_hero: You may have proven yourself as Born in Battle, but in Paragon City other virtues matter more.
badges.desc_villain: You've proven yourself as Born in Battle, adding 5% to both your Endurance and Hit Point totals.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Exterminator, Pirate, Hammer Down, Iron Man, Primal Instinct, Triumphant and Swashbuckler.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Exterminator, Pirate, Hammer Down, Iron Man, Primal Instinct, Triumphant and Swashbuckler.

badges.name: HighPainThreshold
badges.desc_hero: You once had a incredibly High Pain Threshold, but it seems you've grown a little soft after coming to Paragon City.
badges.desc_villain: You've got an incredibly High Pain Threshold, an aftereffect of which is that your Hit Points are 10% greater than normal.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Bad Luck, Gangbuster, Spider Smasher, The Unbroken Spirit, Locked and Loaded, Freak of Nature and Technofreak.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Bad Luck, Gangbuster, Spider Smasher, The Unbroken Spirit, Locked and Loaded, Freak of Nature and Technofreak.

badges.name: Demonic
badges.desc_hero: The goodness you've let into your heart appears to have banished the spirit of a demon which once resided within.
badges.desc_villain: The spirit of a demon resides within you. Bringing it to the surface of your mind can make you highly resistant to all types of damage for a short time. You mustn't let the demon out too long, or you just may lose your mortal soul, forever.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Soul Taker, Coldhearted, Overlord, Forged by Hellfire and Lorekeeper.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Soul Taker, Coldhearted, Overlord, Forged by Hellfire and Lorekeeper.

badges.name: Megalomaniac
badges.desc_hero: In order to get along with the heroes of Paragon City, you've started to see a professional about your desires for world domination.
badges.desc_villain: You've wanted more control and now you have it. Activating this power increases the strength of all of your Sleeps, Holds, Immobilizes, and Confuses for 60 seconds.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Crystal Keeper, Strikebreaker, Man in Black, Last Stand and Triumphant.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Crystal Keeper, Strikebreaker, Man in Black, Last Stand and Triumphant.

badges.name: MayhemForceOfNature
badges.desc_hero: The massive destruction you previously wrought has made it really difficult to find anyone willing to insure you for collateral damage liability.
badges.desc_villain: Paragon City has felt your wrath; you are a true Force of Nature!
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Villain, Impounder, Outlaw, Vandal, Safecracker, Firebug and Hero Slayer.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Villain, Impounder, Outlaw, Vandal, Safecracker, Firebug and Hero Slayer.

badges.name: MayhemInvader
badges.desc_hero: You've seen a lot of Paragon from the other side already, so you've got a head start on making your new life here.
badges.desc_villain: No corner of Paragon City is safe from your destruction!
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Global Threat, King Maker, Road Raged, Tyrannical, Steel Worker, Talon of Talos, Brickhouse, Anarchist and Gate Crasher.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Global Threat, King Maker, Road Raged, Tyrannical, Steel Worker, Talon of Talos, Brickhouse, Anarchist and Gate Crasher.

badges.name: StrikeForceCommander
badges.desc_hero: You have successfully taken part in many of the most impactful operations and Strike Forces executed by Arachnos and their 'Destined Ones'. You can break free from many effects out of sheer spite, due to your remarkable tenacity.
badges.desc_villain: You successfully infiltrated the most impactful operations and Strike Forces executed by Arachnos and their 'Destined Ones'. You can break free from many effects out of sheer spite.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete all 5 signature Strike Forces offered by members of Arachnos.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete all 5 signature Strike Forces offered by members of Arachnos.

badges.name: TaskForceCommander
badges.desc_hero: You have successfully completed each of the Task Forces given out by the Freedom Phalanx. This gives you +5% Hit Points.
badges.desc_villain: Your perks for serving the Freedom Phalanx have been stripped due to your descent into villainy. You can keep the epaulets, though.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Complete all 6 Task Forces offered by members of the Freedom Phalanx.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Complete all 6 Task Forces offered by members of the Freedom Phalanx.

badges.name: ProtectorOfParagon
badges.desc_hero: You have shown true dedication to the protection of Paragon City, without sacrificing the morals that the city is founded and established on.
badges.desc_villain: You were once an icon of the ethics upon which Paragon City was established. That's long gone, now.
badges.earn_hint_hero: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Bicentennial, Helping Hand, Force of Justice, Gallant, Guardian of Forever and The Greater Good.
badges.earn_hint_villain: To obtain this Accolade collect the following badges: Bicentennial, Helping Hand, Force of Justice, Gallant, Guardian of Forever and The Greater Good.

badges.name: SafeguardForceOfJustice
badges.desc_hero: You have proven yourself as one of Paragon City's finest heroes by protecting all of the major banks in the city.
badges.desc_villain: Paragon's bank employees are very confused by your new allegiances, and are that much slower to react when you show up to rob them.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain this badge by earning the following badges: Fire Marshal, Bomb Squad, PPD Deputy, Security Expert, Interceptor and Villain Disruptor.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain this badge by earning the following badges: Fire Marshal, Bomb Squad, PPD Deputy, Security Expert, Interceptor and Villain Disruptor.

badges.name: SafeguardStouthearted
badges.desc_hero: You've left no stone unturned in your efforts to protect Paragon City's financial infrastructure. Your diligence is greatly appreciated by all.
badges.desc_villain: No one can explain your turn to villainy after going to such lengths to defend all of Paragon. Perhaps your heart has turned to stone.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain this badge by earning the following badges: Gatekeeper, Founders' Protector, Cornerstone, Talos' Might, Honorable Captain, Freedom's Defender, Courage Driven, King's Righteousness and Heart of the City.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain this badge by earning the following badges: Gatekeeper, Founders' Protector, Cornerstone, Talos' Might, Honorable Captain, Freedom's Defender, Courage Driven, King's Righteousness and Heart of the City.

badges.name: InventorAccolade
badges.desc_hero: You are truly a crafting specialist, and can now summon a portable crafting station to your location. All nearby characters can use this station.
badges.desc_villain: You are truly a crafting specialist, and can now summon a portable crafting station to your location. All nearby characters can use this station.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Achieve Invention Badges to unlock this
badges.earn_hint_villain: Achieve Invention Badges to unlock this

badges.name: RIWEAccolade
badges.desc_hero: You have defended Paragon City from the invading Rikti!
badges.desc_villain: You have defended the Rogue Isles from the invading Rikti!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain the following badges to earn this badge: Sentry, Bomb Specialist and Chief.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain the following badges to earn this badge: Sentry, Bomb Specialist and Chief.

badges.name: Halloween09Accolade
badges.desc_hero: You've endured the spells of witches, the might of misshapen abominations, the ghostly touch of spectral terrors, and the schemes of the supernatural fiends, earning yourself this Accolade.
badges.desc_villain: You've endured the spells of witches, the might of misshapen abominations, the ghostly touch of spectral terrors, and the schemes of the supernatural fiends, earning yourself this Accolade.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain the Dark Fiend, Scorned, Terror, Monster Masher and Monstrous badges to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain the Dark Fiend, Scorned, Terror, Monster Masher and Monstrous badges to earn this badge.

badges.name: DJ_Warden
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent working with both Paragon City Hall and the Paragon Police Department has earned you a great deal of respect. While logged out in either Paragon City Hall or a Police Department, you'll earn uses for your Police Chief's Baton power.
badges.desc_villain: The scandal caused by your switch to villainy brought down a City Representative and an entire PPD precinct.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the City Official and Law Enforcer Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the City Official and Law Enforcer Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Security_Chief
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent protecting the banks of Paragon City has earned you the position of Security Chief. While logged out in either a Vault or a Police Department, you will earn charges of Tear Gas.
badges.desc_villain: Every major bank and secure facility had to change their locks and passcodes when you went to the Rogue Isles.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Law Enforcer and Banker Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Law Enforcer and Banker Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Traveler
badges.desc_hero: Your travels around both Paragon City and the Shadow Shard have become a full time job, and you have earned the title of Traveler. While logged out in either a Train Station or the Shadow Shard, you will earn fuel for your Traveler's Jet Pack at an accelerated rate.
badges.desc_villain: You've made a breakthrough in getting to new places, heading all the way to the Rogue Isles for more travel opportunities.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Commuter and Dimensional Explorer Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Commuter and Dimensional Explorer Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Entrepreneur
badges.desc_hero: Your masterful knowledge of the Auction House combined with a great head for business has made you a very successful Entrepreneur. While logged out at either Wentworth's or inside a Shop, you will earn tokens that will grant you a discount when crafting inventions.
badges.desc_villain: Your studies of business theory and practice have driven you to press for free trade between the Rogue Isles and Paragon City. On the surface, your efforts appear fruitless, but there are shadowy rumors they have had an effect ...
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Shop Keeper and Day Trader Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Shop Keeper and Day Trader Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Scientist
badges.desc_hero: Your studies at the Universities of Paragon City and work with Portal Corps have earned you the Scientist Accolade. While logged out at a University or inside a Portal Corps building, you will earn charges of Sleep Gas.
badges.desc_villain: Eager to distance themselves from your villainous self, Portal Corps and the universities of Paragon City have quickly denounced you as merely a Crackpot.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Intern and Professor Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Intern and Professor Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Doctor
badges.desc_hero: Your studies at the Universities of Paragon City and work with the hospitals of Paragon have earned you the Physician Accolade. While logged out at a University or inside a Hospital, you will earn charges for your Revive Ally power.
badges.desc_villain: Your studies at the Universities of the Rogue Isles and work within the Hospitals of the Rogue Isles have earned you the Physician Accolade. While logged out at a University or inside a Hospital, you will earn charges for your Revive Ally power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Caregiver and Professor Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Pain Specialist and Professor Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Alchemist
badges.desc_hero: Your arcane studies with the Midnighters and time spent working in the Hospitals of Paragon City have earned you the Alchemist Accolade. While logged out within the Midnighter's Club or inside a Hospital, you will earn charges for your Vitalize power.
badges.desc_villain: Your arcane studies with the Midnighters and time spent working in the Hospitals of the Rogue Isles have earned you the Alchemist Accolade. While logged out within the Midnighter's Club or inside a Hospital, you will earn charges for your Vitalize power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Caregiver and Midnighter Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Pain Specialist and Midnighter badges.

badges.name: DJ_Black_Ops
badges.desc_hero: You've taken your skills at wetwork and espionage and defected to the other side, which has a lot more qualms about using those skills to their fullest potential.
badges.desc_villain: Your mastery of stealth and your training with Arachnos has earned you the Black Ops Accolade. While logged out in an Arachnos controlled area or inside a Vault, you will earn charges for your Smoke Bomb power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Arachnos Agent and Thief Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Arachnos Agent and Thief Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Trend_Setter
badges.desc_hero: Your popularity and your fashion sense have earned you the Socialite Accolade. While logged out in Pocket D or a Tailor, you will earn charges for your Beguile power.
badges.desc_villain: Your popularity and your fashion sense have earned you the Socialite Accolade. While logged out in Pocket D or a Tailor, you will earn charges for your Beguile power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Clubber and Fashion Designer Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Clubber and Fashion Designer Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Soldier
badges.desc_hero: Your work helping Vanguard defend Paragon from the ever-present Rikti threat and always being ready to aid Paragon City has earned you the Mercenary Accolade. While logged out in the Vanguard Base, you will earn charges for your Fragmentation Grenade Power.
badges.desc_villain: Your work helping Vanguard defeat the ever-present Rikti threat and always being ready to spring into action has earned you the Mercenary Accolade. While logged out in the Vanguard Base, you will earn charges for your Fragmentation Grenade Power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Vanguard Recruit and Patroller Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Vanguard Recruit and Patroller/Criminal Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Time_Traveler
badges.desc_hero: Your presence in Cimerora and working with the Menders of Ouroboros has earned you the Time Lord Accolade. While logged out in either Cimerora or Ouroboros, you will earn additional time for your Time Lord power.
badges.desc_villain: Your presence in Cimerora and working with the Menders of Ouroboros has earned you the Time Lord Accolade. While logged out in either Cimerora or Ouroboros, you will earn additional time for your Time Lord power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Cimeroran and Chronologist Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Cimeroran and Chronologist Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Archaeologist
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent working with the Midnighters and uncovering the secrets of buried artifacts has earned you the Archaeologist Accolade.  While logged out in either the Midnighter Club or a Graveyard, you will earn additional charges for your Rune of Purification power.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent working with the Midnighters and uncovering the secrets of buried artifacts has earned you the Archaeologist Accolade. While logged out in either the Midnighter Club or a Graveyard, you will earn additional charges for your Rune of Purification power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Mortician and Midnighter badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Mortician and Midnighter badges.

badges.name: DJ_Brood_Leader
badges.desc_hero: High status within Arachnos was not enough to keep you bound to the Rogue Isles. Your exit caused a power vacuum which some other young upstart quickly filled.
badges.desc_villain: You have climbed the ranks of Arachnos by being both a pilot and a city official, earning you the Brood Leader Accolade.  While logged out in either Grandville or near a Black Helicoper you will earn fuel for your Traveler's Jet Pack at an accelerated rate.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Pilot and Arachnos Official Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Pilot and Arachnos Official Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Gladiator
badges.desc_hero: Your reputation as a ferocious combatant in both PvP Zones and the Arena has earned you the Gladiator Accolade. While logged out in either an Arena or a PvP Zone, you will additional time for your Combat Shield power.
badges.desc_villain: Your reputation as a ferocious combatant in both PvP Zones and the Arena has earned you the Gladiator Accolade. While logged out in either an Arena or a PvP Zone, you will additional time for your Combat Shield power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Duelist and Predator badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Duelist and Predator Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Rapid_Response_Member
badges.desc_hero: Your reputation of your work with your Super Group and in the field has earned you the Rapid Response Member Accolade. While logged out near a Super Group Base portal, you will earn charges of your Rapid Response Portal power.
badges.desc_villain: Your reputation of your work with your Super Group and causing havok in the streets of the Rogue Isles has earned you the Trouble Maker Accolade. While logged out near a Super Group Base portal you will earn charges of your Rapid Response Portal power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Monitor Duty and Patroller badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Monitor Duty and Patroller/Criminal Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Crey_Scientist
badges.desc_hero: Crey Industries has been hard at work removing your name from all your research and publicly denying the corporate secrets you've revealed.
badges.desc_villain: Your work with Crey Industries and studies in various fields has earned you the Crey Scientist Accolade. While logged out in the Crey Industries building or in a University you will earn additional charges for your Sleep Grenade power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Crey Employee and Professor
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Crey Employee and Professor

badges.name: DJ_Web_Weaver
badges.desc_hero: You've turned your skills at propaganda and rabble-rousing against Arachnos, bringing a glimmer of hope to those you once helped enslave.
badges.desc_villain: Your work subjugating the masses of the Rogue Isles and promoting pro-Arachnos propaganda has earned you the Web Weaver Accolade. While logged out in an Arachnos controlled area or in the Arachnos building in Marconeville, you will earn additional charges for your Web Grenade power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Arachnos Agent and Demagogue Day Job badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Arachnos Agent and Demagogue Day Job badges.

badges.name: DJ_Black_Marketeer
badges.desc_hero: Your skills at circumventing trade restrictions and finding profit are handy in Paragon City. Recently, it seems many have managed to run the blockade from the Rogue Isles, turning those restrictions into a paper tiger.
badges.desc_villain: Your masterful knowledge of the Black Market coupled with knowing where to get the best merchandise has made you a master of the Black Market. While logged out near Docks or near the Black Market, you will earn tokens that will grant you a discount when crafting inventions.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Smuggler and Marketeer Day Jobs badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Smuggler and Marketeer Day Jobs badges.

badges.name: DJ_Master_Architect
badges.desc_hero: Your extensive study of the Mission Architect technology has earned you the Master Architect Day Job. Earning this Accolade grants you the Invigorate power, which will allow you to revive yourself, should you be defeated, while on Architect missions.
badges.desc_villain: Your extensive study of the Mission Architect technology has earned you the Master Architect Day Job. Earning this Accolade grants you the Vitalize power, which will allow you to revive yourself once every 10 minutes, should you be defeated, while on Architect missions.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Architect and Professor badges.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this Day Job Accolade by obtaining both the Architect and Professor badges.

badges.name: ArchitectAccolade
badges.desc_hero: Your overall expertise in everything relating to the Mission Architect system has earned you the title of Mission Engineer. Owning this Accolade will grant you the ability to remotely create and edit Mission Architect content.
badges.desc_villain: Your overall expertise in everything relating to the Mission Architect system has earned you the title of Mission Engineer. Owning this Accolade will grant you the ability to remotely create and edit Mission Architect content.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain the following badges to earn this accolade: Thrill Seeker, Gamer, Ticket Taker, Author, Recognized, Early Bird, Customizer and Bug Fixer.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain the following badges to earn this accolade: Thrill Seeker, Gamer, Ticket Taker, Author, Recognized, Early Bird, Customizer and Bug Fixer.

badges.name: Loyalty2011
badges.desc_hero: Villains, heroes, time travel, trans-dimensional wars...  Come what may, in an ever-changing multiverse, you are The Constant which remains unchanged.
badges.desc_villain: Villains, heroes, time travel, trans-dimensional wars...  Come what may, in an ever-changing multiverse, you are The Constant which remains unchanged.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Obtain this accolade by earning every Exploration badge in Atlas Park and Echo: Atlas Park.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Obtain this accolade by earning every Exploration badge in Atlas Park and Echo: Atlas Park.

badges.name: P_VivaPraetoria
badges.desc_hero: Long live Praetoria. You are a well-traveled citizen.
badges.desc_villain: Long live Praetoria. You are a well-traveled citizen.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Unlock this Accolade by earning the following Exploration accolades and badges: Pure Praetorian, Knows Nova's Nooks, Emperor for a Day, Beneath the Empire, A Neu Man/Woman, Neu You Could Do It, Rail Rider and Going Rouge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Unlock this Accolade by earning the following Exploration accolades and badges: Pure Praetorian, Knows Nova's Nooks, Emperor for a Day, Beneath the Empire, A Neu Man/Woman, Neu You Could Do It, Rail Rider and Going Rouge.

badges.name: P_DVDEdition

badges.desc_villain: Praetoria is your world, for better or worse.

badges.name: Beta_AutoLevel50
badges.desc_hero: Your connection to your home timeline has been severed. Your only purpose now is eternal battle for a future you will never reach.
badges.desc_villain: Your connection to your home timeline has been severed. Your only purpose now is eternal battle for a future you will never reach.

badges.name: Loyalty2012

badges.desc_villain: Through fire and flame your resolve has been tempered like finely forged steel.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Loyalist, Magistrate, Tyrant, Resistance Member, Obliterator, Survivor and Escapist.

badges.name: Halloween2010Accolade
badges.desc_hero: You are not tied to any single decision, and must pursue every course of action available to determine the consequences.
badges.desc_villain: You are not tied to any single decision, and must pursue every course of action available to determine the consequences.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following Halloween Event badges to obtain this badge: Secured, Power Hungry, Artifact Destroyer, Veiled, and Trusting or Arriviste.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following Halloween Event badges to obtain this badge: Secured, Power Hungry, Artifact Destroyer, Veiled, and Trusting or Arriviste.

badges.name: FashionVictim
badges.desc_hero: The road of excess leads to the palace of... fabulousness!
badges.desc_villain: The road of excess leads to the palace of... fabulousness!
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn this badge by spending 50,000,000 influence in Tailor sessions.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn this badge by spending 50,000,000 infamy in Tailor sessions.

badges.name: InitiateAllStar
badges.desc_hero: You've earned the Arena All-Star badge by winning a variety of different Arena matches.
badges.desc_villain: You've earned the Arena All-Star badge by winning a variety of different Arena matches.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the Arena Victor, Arena Duelist, Tournament Victor, Arena Survivalist and Pentad Victor badges to get this Accolade.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the Arena Victor, Arena Duelist, Tournament Victor, Arena Survivalist and Pentad Victor badges to get this Accolade.

badges.name: DVDEdition
badges.desc_hero: Being a V.I.P. in Paragon City has many advantages associated with it.
badges.desc_villain: Being one of Kalinda's Destined Ones brings with it many perks, and just as many enemies.

badges.name: AtlasSet
badges.desc_hero: Through the might of Atlas, one of the greatest heroes of Paragon City's history, you have gained +5 to your maximum Endurance total.
badges.desc_villain: Whatever power the spirit of Atlas once sent your way, it doesn't seem to work for villains.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Top Dog, Pupil, Spelunker, The Silver Bullet and The Slayer.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Top Dog, Pupil, Spelunker, The Silver Bullet and The Slayer.

badges.name: CreySet
badges.desc_hero: You have uncovered Crey's conspiracy, one that has been choking Paragon City for years. As a souvenir you have kept a Crey pistol for your own personal use.
badges.desc_villain: You uncovered one of Crey's conspiracies, and kept a Cryo Pistol as a souvenir. Unfortunately, feedback from the PTS has made it virtually useless in the Rogue Isles.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Bird Watcher, Crey Fish, Crey Havoc, Crey Watcher, The Doctor's Ally and Infiltrator. NOTE: You must be level 30 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Bird Watcher, Crey Fish, Crey Havoc, Crey Watcher, The Doctor's Ally and Infiltrator. NOTE: You must be level 30 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.

badges.name: DimensionalHopperSet
badges.desc_hero: Your efforts to help Portal Corporation explore the vast multiverse have earned you the title of Portal Jockey. This perk comes with +5 Endurance and +5% Hit Points.
badges.desc_villain: Portal Corporation has disavowed your many efforts on their behalf. The energies you had received from those other worlds no longer seems to flow.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Multidimensional, Shrouded, Scholastic and Dimensional Warder.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Multidimensional, Shrouded, Scholastic and Dimensional Warder.

badges.name: FreedomPhalanxSet
badges.desc_hero: You have earned a reserve membership into Paragon City's premier Super Group, the Freedom Phalanx. This privilege comes with the added perk of +10% Hit Points.
badges.desc_villain: The Freedom Phalanx has stricken you from their rolls. All associated rights and privileges have been revoked.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Regal, Brawler, Vigorous, Summoned, Keen Sighted, Purifier, Nimble Mynx, Authority, Tank Buster, Gear Smasher and Unveiler. NOTE: You must be level 21 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Regal, Brawler, Vigorous, Summoned, Keen Sighted, Purifier, Nimble Mynx, Authority, Tank Buster, Gear Smasher and Unveiler. NOTE: You must be level 21 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.

badges.name: MagusSet
badges.desc_hero: Your research into the arcane, coupled with your experience in fighting magical foes, has unlocked heretofore unknown magics within you, earning you the title of Archmage. You have learned a spell of protection because of this.
badges.desc_villain: Your research into the arcane, coupled with your experience in fighting magical foes, has unlocked heretofore unknown magics within you, earning you the title of Archmage. The associated spell of protection, which relies on a certain purity of spirit, is no longer useful to you.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Dark Mystic, Faultless Mystic, Mystic, Mystic King, Banisher, Illusionists, Soul Binder and Tracer. NOTE: You must be level 21 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Dark Mystic, Faultless Mystic, Mystic, Mystic King, Banisher, Illusionists, Soul Binder and Tracer. NOTE: You must be level 21 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.

badges.name: RiktiWarSet
badges.desc_hero: Your efforts against the extra-dimensional invaders have been recognized, and you have received the Rikti Resistance Medal. You have found and kept a Rikti power amplifier.
badges.desc_villain: Vanguard still values your efforts against the extra-dimensional invaders, but they no longer trust you as much as before. Without you even knowing it, they have silently confiscated your Rikti power amplifier. Vanguard ops are good.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Portal Parter, Ace, Savant, Finder and Zookeeper. NOTE: You must be level 35 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn the following badges to earn this badge: Portal Parter, Ace, Savant, Finder and Zookeeper. NOTE: You must be level 35 before this Accolade will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.

badges.name: StalwartMedallionUsed
badges.desc_hero: Your battle in the reactor of Terra Volta altered your powers in a permanent way.
badges.desc_villain: Your battle in the reactor of Terra Volta altered your powers in a permanent way.

badges.name: StatesmanStarUsed
badges.desc_hero: Your Terra Volta experience has altered your powers in ways no one could have imagined.
badges.desc_villain: Your Terra Volta experience has altered your powers in ways no one could have imagined.

badges.name: FreedomCrossUsed

badges.desc_villain: Powerful energies of the Terra Volta reactor have permanently fused with your own, modifying them in dramatic ways.

badges.name: Mission_DA_Zone_Complete
badges.desc_hero: Mot represented hatred and despair. It tried to twist the memories of all those it came across, aiming to make them believe there was no hope in their lives, that all of their hopes and dreams were meaningless. You fully conquered the forces of Mot and showed the creature just how wrong it was.
badges.desc_villain: Mot represented hatred and despair. It tried to twist the memories of all those it came across, aiming to make them believe there was no hope in their lives, that all of their hopes and dreams were meaningless. You fully conquered the forces of Mot and showed the creature just how wrong it was.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Within Dark Astoria, acquire all six mission completion badges, all six personal arc completion badges and all five mission achievement badges.

badges.name: GeasoftheKindOnes

badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn the following badges to obtain this badge: Cabalist, Giant Killer, Believer, Cap Buster, Pumpkin King, Pumpkin Master, Bane of Dannan, Spellbinding and Haunted.

badges.name: AetherCostumeAccolade

This intuitive, all-in-one system will automatically install and manage any hologram costumes you own, allowing you to access all of them from one handy location! We look forward to your continued patronage!
badges.desc_villain: Thank you for your purchase of the BenevoLabs© BL-22c Holographic Matrix™! This intuitive, all-in-one system will automatically install and manage any hologram costumes you own, allowing you to access all of them from one handy location! We look forward to your continued patronage!

This badge grants you increased Max HP and Max Endurance while in the Labyrinth of Fog!

You have proven your prowess by having not only explored, but also conquered everything that stood in your path within the maze of corridors known as the Labyrinth of Fog.

badges.desc_villain: These soldiers will fight for you.

badges.desc_villain: You now can summon a Red Cap Rascal in the Arena pet battles.

badges.desc_villain: For defeating the Reichsman, you have been granted access to a 5th Column Gladiator!

badges.name: 1YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: A year of service is recognized by the government of Paragon City.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 12 months, you've earned the 1 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: A year has passed, and your powers are still growing.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 12 months, you've earned the 1 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 2YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: Two solid years of beating down the bad guys.   For subscribing to City of Heroes for 24 months, you've earned the 2 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: Two years in, and the plans get bigger, and your aspirations grander.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 24 months, you've earned the 2 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 3YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: Three years battling crime, you've surprised yourself you've lasted this long.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 36 months, you've earned the 3 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: You've been at this three years now, even Lord Recluse is suprised you've lasted this long.   For subscribing to City of Heroes for 36 months, you've earned the 3 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 4YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: Four years behind you... and yet the road ahead looks as bright as ever.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 48 months, you've earned the 4 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: Four years of battle have made you worthy.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 48 months, you've earned the 4 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 5YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: You've been at it for 5 years, you're truly unstoppable.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 60 months, you've earned the 5 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: You've been at it for 5 years, you're truly unstoppable.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 60 months, you've earned the 5 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 6YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: Your achievements are recognized the world over for your 6 years of service.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 72 months, you've earned the 6 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: You are recognized and feared the world over for the six years of chaos and destruction you've caused.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 72 months, you've earned the 6 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 7YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: You are known among your peers for your sagely wisdom and knowledge. For subscribing to City of Heroes for 84 months, you've earned the 7 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: You are feared even by the Lord Recluse and his Patrons. For subscribing to City of Heroes for 84 months, you've earned the 7 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: 8YearVeteran
badges.desc_hero: The world has learned that it can always rely on you after 8 years of service.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 96 months, you've earned the 8 Year Veteran badge.
badges.desc_villain: Your name has become synonymous with terror due to your eight-year reign of terror.  For subscribing to City of Heroes for 96 months, you've earned the 8 Year Veteran badge.

badges.name: Veteran3
badges.desc_hero: You have come to understand that your experience and prowess do not peak at the highest Security Level. You have attained three Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You have come to understand that your experience and prowess do not peak at the highest Threat Level. You have attained three Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran6
badges.desc_hero: Paragon City thanks you for your continued support in keeping the City safe. You have attained six Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You are ever faithful in your service, to cause pain and misery to all those in your way. You have attained six Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran9
badges.desc_hero: You've achieved nine Veteran levels. Paragon City can depend on you to be there.
badges.desc_villain: You've achieved nine Veteran levels and your powers are still growing.

badges.name: Veteran12
badges.desc_hero: Your diligent service is recognized by the government of Paragon City. You have attained twelve Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Loyalty amongst thieves is such a rare occurrence these days, but you're certainly on track to shake things up a bit. You have attained twelve Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran15
badges.desc_hero: You've gained fifteen Veteran levels protecting Rhode Island's jewel, Paragon City.
badges.desc_villain: You've gained fifteen Veteran levels chewing bubblegum and kicking butt. You ran out of gum a long time ago.

badges.name: Veteran18
badges.desc_hero: With eighteen Veteran levels to show for your service, you don't see yourself stopping anytime soon.
badges.desc_villain: With eighteen Veteran levels to show for your villainy, one would think you'd have accumulated a decent retirement fund by now.

badges.name: Veteran21
badges.desc_hero: All this crimefighting has people calling you Steadfast. You have attained twenty-one Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You have a reputation for always being there, and always being bad. You have attained twenty-one Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran24
badges.desc_hero: Nobody can tear you and Paragon City apart. You have attained twenty-four Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Nobody can come between you and that big vault o' riches. You have attained twenty-four Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran27
badges.desc_hero: Few can match your dedication to fighting for good and justice. You've achieved twenty-seven Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Few can trounce your dedication to your villainous craft. You have attained twenty-seven Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran30
badges.desc_hero: There's no stopping your campaign to end crime and tyranny wherever it appears. You have attained thirty Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: There's no stopping your campaign to instill fear into the hearts of your lessers. You have attained thirty Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran33
badges.desc_hero: After paying your dues you have been recognized as 'Unswerving' by the government of Paragon City. You have attained thirty-three Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You continue to elude capture after all this time. You have attained thirty-three Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran36
badges.desc_hero: Despite your trials and long-standing experience, you are still around fighting the good fight. You have attained thirty-six Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You just won't stop after all this time. Even Lord Recluse is surprised you've lasted this long. You have attained thirty-six Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran39
badges.desc_hero: Non-stop crime fighting has earned you the respect you deserve. You have attained thirty-nine Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You take what you want, when you want it and you'll crush anyone who stands in your way. You have attained thirty-nine Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran42
badges.desc_hero: You stand up for what you believe in time and time again, you're considered 'Fervent' by your peers. You have attained forty-two Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You do what you want and eliminate your competition time and time again, you're considered 'Fervent' by your peers. You have attained forty-two Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran45
badges.desc_hero: No one can keep you down. It's no wonder some of your peers consider you 'Eternal'. You have attained forty-five Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: No one can keep you down. It's no wonder some of your peers consider you 'Eternal'. You have attained forty-five Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran48
badges.desc_hero: You've gone this far and the road ahead looks as bright as ever. You have attained forty-eight Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You've gone this far and the future looks even more promising. You have attained forty-eight Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran51
badges.desc_hero: There's no denying you've got a name for yourself out there, and you're not about to have that fall into obscurity anytime soon. You have attained fifty-one Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: There's no denying you've got a name for yourself out there, and you're not about to have that fall into obscurity anytime soon. You have attained fifty-one Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran54
badges.desc_hero: You've shown the world that your allegiance is to the people and those in need. You have attained fifty-four Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You've shown the world that the only one you serve is yourself. In fact, the way you see it, the world should be serving you. You have attained fifty-four Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran57
badges.desc_hero: You're still around fighting the good fight after all this time. If one thing could be said about you, it's that you're consistent. You have attained fifty-seven Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You're still around crushing your foes and taking what is rightfully yours after all this time. If one thing could be said about you it's that you're persistent. You have attained fifty-seven Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran60
badges.desc_hero: Your experience could outstrip even several seasoned heroes combined. You know what's what; there are no surprises for you anymore. You have attained sixty Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Your experience could outstrip even several seasoned villains combined. You know what's what; there are no surprises for you anymore. You have attained sixty Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran63
badges.desc_hero: You're revered by the people of Paragon City and are considered 'Honorable' for your many good deeds. You have attained sixty-three Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: The people of the Rogue Isles know to refer to you as 'Honorable'... or else. You have attained sixty-three Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran66
badges.desc_hero: This world is in a state of constant change, but there's one thing people can count on: you. You have attained sixty-six Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: This world is in a state of constant change, but there's one thing that people will always fear: you. You have attained sixty-six Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran69
badges.desc_hero: You're true to what you believe in; your peers consider you 'Genuine'. You have attained sixty-nine Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: You're true to what you believe in: kicking butt and striking fear into everyone you face. Your peers consider you 'Genuine'. You have attained sixty-nine Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran72
badges.desc_hero: With a selfless history as long as yours, you gain respect wherever you go from heroes and villains alike. You have attained seventy-two Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: With a villainous history as long as yours, you gain respect wherever you go from heroes and villains alike. You have attained seventy-two Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran75
badges.desc_hero: Against all odds, you've withstood the challenges that have been thrown your way and come out on top. You have attained seventy-five Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Against all odds, you've withstood the challenges that have been thrown your way and come out on top. You have attained seventy-five Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran78
badges.desc_hero: Your drive and purpose is what keeps you going and standing up for what you believe in. You have attained seventy-eight Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Your drive and purpose is what keeps you going and crushing your foes beneath your heel. You have attained seventy-eight Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran81
badges.desc_hero: You stand up for those who cannot stand up for themselves without compromise. You have attained eighty-one Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Believe it or not, there are still some people out there that don't know not to mess with you. You have attained eighty-one Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran84
badges.desc_hero: Your power is palpable and your very presence is inspiring to others. You have attained eighty-four Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Your power is palpable and lesser beings tremble in your wake. You have attained eighty-four Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran87
badges.desc_hero: When you are focused on your goal, nothing can get in your way. You have attained eighty-seven Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: When you are focused on your goal, nothing can get in your way. You have attained eighty-seven Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran90
badges.desc_hero: Nothing can keep a hero like you down. Try as villains might, you're just unshakable. You have attained ninety Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Nothing can keep a villain like you down. Try as heroes might, you're just unshakable. You have attained ninety Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran93
badges.desc_hero: It's safe to say Paragon City would not be the same if it weren't for your tireless efforts. You have attained ninety-three Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: It is safe to say the world would be a far different place if it weren't for you. You have attained ninety-three Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran96
badges.desc_hero: Villains have practically given up trying to face you. Your persistence to your goals is utterly unmatched. You have attained ninety-six Veteran levels.
badges.desc_villain: Heroes have practically given up trying to take back your turf. Your persistence towards taking what you want is utterly unmatched. You have attained ninety-six Veteran levels.

badges.name: Veteran99
badges.desc_hero: The greatest threats of the universe have risen to challenge you, and you have prevailed. Any foe that dares threaten what is under your watchful vigil can be certain of what is coming for them. You have survived a thousand trials, quashed evil and ascended to ranks few can even comprehend. You are truly overpowered.
badges.desc_villain: Worlds have burned, people have bent to your will and it seems as if no mortal or god can end your dominion. You've eradicated more foes than could ever be counted, forged a trail of fear throughout the world and beyond and ascended to levels few can even comprehend. You are truly overpowered.

badges.name: DefeatMinotaur
badges.desc_hero: You have defeated 100 Minotaurs in Cimerora.
badges.desc_villain: You have defeated 100 Minotaurs in Cimerora.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat 100 Minotaurs in Cimerora to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 Minotaurs in Cimerora to earn this badge.

badges.name: DefeatFogGladiator
badges.desc_hero: The Labryinth's Gladiators In The Fog are a curious phenomenon. This legion of immortal warriors compete in an eternal blood sport to determine who is the strongest amongst them, but not one was found worthy of taking you down.
badges.desc_villain: The Labryinth's Gladiators In The Fog are a curious phenomenon. This legion of immortal warriors compete in an eternal blood sport to determine who is the strongest amongst them, but not one was found worthy of taking you down.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat 25 of the Gladiators In The Fog to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 25 of the Gladiators In The Fog to earn this badge.

badges.name: DefeatVolatileAether
badges.desc_hero:
The Labyrinth of Fog is an unnatural dungeon where a mythical fog, steeped in malevolence, coagulates of its own volition, and you've taken advantage of the opportunity to claim their power for yourself.
This badge unlocks access to the Core in the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.desc_villain:
The Labyrinth of Fog is an unnatural dungeon where a mythical fog, steeped in malevolence, coagulates of its own volition, and you've taken advantage of the opportunity to claim their power for yourself.
This badge unlocks access to the Core in the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.earn_hint_hero:
Defeat 5 of the Malevolent Fog pinatas found within the Labyrinth of Fog to earn this badge.
Earning this badge unlocks Core access in the Labyrinth of Fog zone.
badges.earn_hint_villain:
Defeat 5 of the Malevolent Fog pinatas found within the Labyrinth of Fog to earn this badge.
Earning this badge unlocks Core access in the Labyrinth of Fog zone.

badges.name: DefeatLabyrinthNightmare
badges.desc_hero: Unusual changes have begun to take place in the Labyrinth of Fog... The formation of strange growths, a rampant epidemic of sleepwalkers, and the emergence of a caste of creatures in the darkness. These nightmarish beings seek to pull victims into a deep sleep and feed upon their dreams to grow in strength.
badges.desc_villain: Unusual changes have begun to take place in the Labyrinth of Fog... The formation of strange growths, a rampant epidemic of sleepwalkers, and the emergence of a caste of creatures in the darkness. These nightmarish beings seek to pull victims into a deep sleep and feed upon their dreams to grow in strength.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat 100 of the Labyrinthine Nightmare to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 of the Labyrinthine Nightmare to earn this badge.

badges.name: ArchitectCustomKills10000

badges.desc_villain: The citizens of Paragon City flee in terror when they see you coming.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 1000 citizens in Mayhem Missions to earn this badge.

badges.name: Quarantine

badges.desc_villain: When you were first brawling Contaminated in the Outbreak Zone, did you ever think that one day you'd be known as a villain?
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat 100 Contaminated to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 Contaminated to earn this badge.

badges.name: DefeatHydra
badges.desc_hero: There's so many conflicting theories as to the true origin of the Hydra that you aren't sure what to believe. What you are sure of, however, is that these monstrous mutated organisms are incredibly dangerous.

badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat 100 Hydra creatures to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 Hydra creatures to earn this badge.

badges.name: Gearsmasher

badges.desc_villain: You have learned that the smallest gear can power the greatest threat, and have taken steps to stop the Clockwork menace.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Destroy 100 Clockwork animated gears to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy 100 Clockwork animated gears to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 Hordelings, Hellfrosts or Blade Princes to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 50 Succubus or Hellfrost Bosses to earn this badge.

badges.desc_hero: The way they talk, their irrational paranoia, and other subtle signs can be found in the 5th Column soldiers who have undergone experimental lycanthropy treatments. After experiencing their transformations many times, you've become an expert at drawing out the beast within and vanquishing it.

After experiencing their transformations many times, you've become an expert at drawing out the beast within and vanquishing it.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 50 of the 5th Column's lycanthrope soldiers after they have transformed to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 200 Warwolves to earn this badge.

badges.desc_villain: You are a slayer of the darkest of Vampyri.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 200 Dark Vampyri to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Destroy Council War Walkers to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 200 of Crey's Gamma Tank minions to earn this badge.

badges.desc_hero: Crey's Revenant Hero Project has turned out some formidable foes in your career as a super. But nothing was more unsettling than racking up a count on the immature clones that sometimes get deployed in extreme crises. You try not to think about the fact that Crey has child-sized suits on-hand for them.
badges.desc_villain: Crey's Revenant Hero Project has turned out some formidable foes in your career as a super. But nothing was more unsettling than racking up a count on the immature clones that sometimes get deployed in extreme crises. You try not to think about the fact that Crey has child-sized suits on-hand for them.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Give a merciful end to immature Paragon Protectors.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 Devouring Earth emanators to earn this badge.

badges.desc_villain: When the Blackwing Industries private military company was contracted to protect Kallisti Wharf, you weren't sure what to expect. Now, having faced their advanced armor, weapons, and training yourself, there's no doubt that the security of Kallisti Wharf is in capable hands.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 250 of the Blackwing Industries security personnel assigned to protect Kallisti Wharf.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 50 Hellion bosses to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 100 Igneous Bosses to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat 1000 Longbow to earn this badge.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat all 14 Praetorian Archvillains to earn this badge.

badges.name: PositronsPal

badges.desc_villain: In the past you rescued Positron from the Praetorians. Perhaps today you might not do the same.

badges.desc_villain: In the past you rescued Statesman from the Praetorians. Perhaps today you might not do the same.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Freedom Phalanx? You'll need to show them who's boss around here.

badges.desc_villain: You have claimed victory over the greatest heroes of Paragon City, the Freedom Phalanx!

badges.desc_villain: Defeating all of Lord Recluse's minions before making a home in the Rogue Isles has earned you some breathing room.

badges.desc_villain: You have claimed victory over the master of villainy himself, Lord Recluse!

badges.desc_villain: You have successfully brought down one of Lord Recluses' fliers. Lord Recluse is amused.

badges.desc_villain: You have defeated the demon Adamastor, brought forth by the Banished Pantheon to destroy the world.

badges.desc_villain: You have defeated Babbage, one of the greatest works of the Clockwork King.

badges.desc_villain: The king is dead. Long live the king!

badges.name: DefeatSeedlings
badges.desc_hero: The Seedlings come in all sorts of pretty colors and make a satisfying 'pop' when squished. If they weren't murderous devastating corrupting beasts intent on your annihilation, you might consider one as a pet. You have defeated one of each variety of Seedling spawned by the Seed of Hamidon to earn this badge.
badges.desc_villain: The Seedlings come in all sorts of pretty colors and make a satisfying 'pop' when squished. If they weren't murderous devastating corrupting beasts intent on your annihilation, you might consider one as a pet. You have defeated one of each variety of Seedling spawned by the Seed of Hamidon to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat one of each variety of Seedling spawned by the Seed of Hamidon in First Ward.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat one of each variety of Seedling spawned by the Seed of Hamidon in First Ward.

badges.name: TheSolution

badges.desc_villain: You have bested Jurassik, the personification of the ideals of the Devouring Earth. The world sleeps safer at night due to your actions.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Take down the spirit of Scrapyard for this badge.

badges.name: Unleasher

badges.desc_villain: You have destroyed the Kronos Titan, showing Malta that you are a force to be reckoned with.

badges.name: DefeatLabyrinthMinotaur
badges.desc_hero:
Historians insisted it couldn't be done, that The Minotaur In The Fog could not be bested in combat, but you've done just that. You've proven yourself worthy to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with the greatest ancient heroes of myth.
This badge unlocks access to the Core in the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.desc_villain:
Historians insisted it couldn't be done, that The Minotaur In The Fog could not be bested in combat, but you've done just that. You've proven yourself worthy to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with the greatest ancient heroes of myth.
This badge unlocks access to the Core in the Labyrinth of Fog.
badges.earn_hint_hero:
Venture into the Labyrinth of Fog and achieve victory against the Minotaur In The Fog to earn this badge.
Earning this badge unlocks Core access in the Labyrinth of Fog zone.
badges.earn_hint_villain:
Venture into the Labyrinth of Fog and achieve victory against the Minotaur In The Fog to earn this badge.
Earning this badge unlocks Core access in the Labyrinth of Fog zone.

badges.name: DefeatPEACEKeeper
badges.desc_hero: The most expensive weapon in P.E.A.C.E.'s arsenal was a gargantuan piloted mech... That you sent to the scrap heap. It's not quite apparent what One Statesman Plaza and its tower hides, but Blackwing Industries have been paid an unthinkable sum to ensure that Emil Christie's investment was secure.
badges.desc_villain: The most expensive weapon in P.E.A.C.E.'s arsenal was a gargantuan piloted mech... That you sent to the scrap heap. badges.name: ValentineWidow

badges.desc_villain: You were instrumental in the resurrection of Red Widow, Lord Recluse's love from long ago. Fortunatas have foreseen new heights of power achieved by Arachnos because of this act.

badges.name: ValentineWeddingHero
badges.desc_hero: When given the opportunity to travel back in time and experience Manticore & Sister Psyche's wedding, you stood with the Freedom Phalanx and successfully drove back Lord Recluse and his villains who tried to disrupt the happy occasion.
badges.desc_villain: When given the opportunity to travel back in time and experience Manticore & Sister Psyche's wedding, you stood with the Freedom Phalanx and successfully drove back Lord Recluse and his villains who tried to disrupt the happy occasion.

badges.name: ValentineWeddingVillain
badges.desc_hero: Opportunities like this don't come often! You took the chance to go back in time and help Lord Recluse crash Manticore & Sister Psyche's wedding, getting the drop on both the Freedom Phalanx and the heroes in attendance.
badges.desc_villain: Opportunities like this don't come often! You took the chance to go back in time and help Lord Recluse crash Manticore & Sister Psyche's wedding, getting the drop on both the Freedom Phalanx and the heroes in attendance.

badges.name: ValentineWeddingDefeats

badges.desc_villain: Despite the Freedom Phalanx and Arachnos elite being dressed in their finest for a special occasion, you pulled no punches and demonstrated your prowess in combat by defeating each and every one.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Defeat all 14 signature heroes & villains dressed in their wedding attire to earn this badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Defeat all 14 signature heroes & villains dressed in their wedding attire to earn this badge.

badges.name: ValentineWeddingNuisance
badges.desc_hero: The audience wasn't very amused when you proved yourself a nuisance during Manticore & Sister Psyche's wedding ceremony and had to be escorted off-stage.
badges.desc_villain: The audience wasn't very amused when you proved yourself a nuisance during Manticore & Sister Psyche's wedding ceremony and had to be escorted off-stage.

badges.name: ValentineWeddingNemesis
