badges.name: DJ_On_Patrol
badges.desc_hero: You have spent your free time making the streets of Paragon City a safer place for its citizens, earning the Patroller Day Job.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time causing havoc in the Rogue Isles and bringing terror to its citizens, earning you the Criminal Day Job.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn 30 bars of Patrol Experience to obtain this badge. (NOTE: Level 50 characters earn this badge by spending time logged off.)
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn 30 bars of Patrol Experience to obtain this badge. (NOTE: Level 50 characters earn this badge by spending time logged off.)

badges.name: P_DJ_On_Patrol
badges.desc_hero: You have spent your free time on the streets, Praetorian or otherwise, earning the Patroller Day Job.
badges.desc_villain: You have spent your free time on the streets, Praetorian or otherwise, earning the Patroller Day Job.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Earn 30 bars of Patrol Experience to obtain this badge. (NOTE: Level 50 characters earn this badge by spending time logged off.)
badges.earn_hint_villain: Earn 30 bars of Patrol Experience to obtain this badge. (NOTE: Level 50 characters earn this badge by spending time logged off.)

badges.name: DJ_Architect
badges.desc_hero: Your study of the Mission Architect system has earned you the Architect Day Job. Logging out in the Mission Architect will earn you a +10% Mission Architect Ticket bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete an Architect Mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your study of the Mission Architect system has earned you the Architect Day Job. Logging out in the Mission Architect will earn you a +10% Mission Architect Ticket bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete an Architect Mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in the Mission Architect to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the Mission Architect to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_City_Official
badges.desc_hero: You have worked closely with the Paragon City government during your free time, earning you the City Official Day Job. Logging out in the City Hall will earn you an Influence Bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You were unceremoniously ejected from your position in Paragon City government when you became a villain.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in City Hall to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in City Hall to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Law_Enforcement
badges.desc_hero: You have worked closely with the Paragon Police Department during your free time, earning you the Law Enforcer Day Job. Logging out in a Police Station will earn you an Experience Bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: The Paragon Police Department has severed its ties with you now that you're a villain.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a Police Station to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a Police Station to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Commuter
badges.desc_hero: You have traveled all over Paragon City for various day jobs during your free time, earning you the Commuter Day Job. Logging out in a Train Station will earn you a speed boost, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You miss the monorails of Paragon City, but in the Rogue Isles it would just be too impractical.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a Train Station to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a Train Station to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Shop_Keeper
badges.desc_hero: You have spent your free time running a shop in Paragon City selling various wares, earning you the Shop Keeper Day Job. Logging out in a store will earn you a random enhancement, upon each mission completion, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You know better than to work retail in the Rogue Isles.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a store to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a store to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Dimensional_Explorer
badges.desc_hero: You have spent a great deal of time working with the military at Firebase Zulu, earning you the Dimensional Explorer Day Job.  Logging out in the Shadow Shard will earn you a Jetpack power, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Firebase Zulu has classified you as A.W.O.L., but they wouldn't welcome you if you showed up, either.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in the Shadow Shard to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the Shadow Shard to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Intern
badges.desc_hero: You have worked with Portal Corps during your free time, earning you the Intern Day Job. Logging out in a Portal Corps building will earn you a Large Inspiration, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You wouldn't make it past the guards at Portal Corps nowadays, but at least you never have to make the coffee anymore.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a Portal Corps building to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a Portal Corps building to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Caregiver
badges.desc_hero: You have spent a great deal of time working in the hospitals of Paragon City during your free time, earning you the Caregiver Day Job. Logging out in a Hospital will earn you a Regeneration Bonus, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your expertise in surgery and understanding pain has earned you the Pain Specialist Day Job.  Logging out in a Hospital will earn you a Regeneration Bonus, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a Hospital to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a Hospital to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Scholar
badges.desc_hero: Your studies at the universities of Paragon City during your free time have earned you the Professor Day Job. Logging out in a University will earn you a random piece of Tech Salvage, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your studies at the universities of the Rogue Isles during your free time has earned you the Professor Day Job. Logging out in a University will earn you a random piece of Tech Salvage, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a University to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a University to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Banker
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent working with the financial institutions of Paragon City during your free time has earned you the Banker Day Job. Logging out in a Vault will earn you an Influence Bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent staging heists on the various financial institutions of the Rogue Isles has earned you the Thief Day Job. Logging out in a Vault will earn you an Infamy Bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a Vault to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a Vault to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Clubber
badges.desc_hero: You spend your free time mingling with both the heroes of Paragon City and the villains of the Rogue Isles in Pocket D, earning yourself the Clubber Day Job. Logging out in Pocket D will earn you a bonus to your out of combat Recovery, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time mingling with both the heroes of Paragon City and the villains of the Rogue Isles in Pocket D, earning yourself the Clubber Day Job. Logging out in Pocket D will earn you a bonus to your out of combat Recovery, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in Pocket D to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in Pocket D to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Auctioneer
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent working at Wentworth's has earned you the Day Trader Day Job. Logging out in Wentworth's will grant you a Brain Storm Idea Salvage after mission completion, when you log in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent supplying the Black Market has earned you the Marketeer Job. Logging out near a Black Market will grant you a brain Storm Idea Salvage after mission completion, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in Wentworths to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off near the Black Market to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Vanguard_Recruit
badges.desc_hero: You have worked closely with Vanguard, helping to eliminate the Rikti threat, earning you the Vanguard Recruit Day Job. Logging out in the Vanguard Base will earn you a bonus to the number of Vanguard Merits you receive, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You have worked closely with Vanguard, helping to eliminate the Rikti threat, earning you the Vanguard Recruit Day Job. Logging out in the Vanguard Base will earn you a bonus to the number of Vanguard Merits you receive, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in the Vanguard Base to earn this Day Job badge. NOTE: You must be level 35 before this badge will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the Vanguard Base to earn this Day Job badge. NOTE: You must be level 35 before this badge will unlock; however, you can earn credit towards this badge before then.

badges.name: DJ_Mender
badges.desc_hero: You have spent a great deal of time working with the agents of Ouroboros, earning you the Chronologist Day Job. Logging out in Ouroboros will earn you a bonus enhancement recipe, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You have spent a great deal of time working with the agents of Ouroboros, earning you the Chronologist Day Job. Logging out in Ouroboros will earn you a bonus enhancement recipe, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in Ouroboros to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in Ouroboros to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Midnighter
badges.desc_hero: Your studies at the Midnighter Club have earned you the Midnighter Day Job. Logging out in the Midnighter Club will earn you a random piece of Arcane Salvage, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your studies at the Midnighter Club have earned you the Midnighter Day Job. Logging out in the Midnighter Club will earn you a random piece of Arcane Salvage, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in the Midnighter's Club  to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the Midnighter's Club  to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Pilot
badges.desc_hero: Arachnos is more likely to pound you into dust than let you near one of their fliers. And your license is no good in Paragon City, it seems.
badges.desc_villain: You have aided Arachnos by piloting its fliers, helping Lord Recluse better mobilize his troops, earning you the Pilot Day Job.  Logging out near a Black Helicopter will earn you a Speed Bonus, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off near a Black Helicopter to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off near a Black Helicopter to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Duelist
badges.desc_hero: You spend your free time battling other heroes and villains in Arena matches, earning you the Duelist Day Job. Logging out in an Arena will earn you a bonus to your maximum Endurance, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time battling other heroes and villains in Arena matches, earning you the Duelist Day Job. Logging out in an Arena will earn you a bonus to your maximum Endurance, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in an Arena to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in an Arena to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Clotheshorse
badges.desc_hero: You spend your free time perfecting your costume, earning you the Fashion Designer Day Job.  Logging out at a Tailor will earn you a discount to Tailor fees, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time perfecting your costume, earning you the Fashion Designer Day Job.  Logging out at a Tailor will earn you a discount to Tailor fees, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off at a Tailor to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off at a Tailor to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Cimeroran
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent protecting the inhabitants of Cimerora has earned you the Cimeroran Day Job. Logging out in Cimerora will earn you a bonus to your damage resistance, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent plotting against the inhabitants of Cimerora has earned you the Cimeroran Day Job. Logging out in Cimerora will earn you a bonus to your damage resistance, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in Cimerora to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in Cimerora to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Griefer
badges.desc_hero: You spend your free time battling villains in PvP zones, earning you the Predator Day Job.  Logging out in a PvP zone will earn you a bonus to your Recharge rate, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time battling heroes in PvP zones, earning you the Predator Day Job.  Logging out in a PvP zone will earn you a bonus to your Recharge rate, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a PvP zone to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a PvP zone to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Monitor_Duty
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent protecting your Supergroup's base has earned you the Monitor Duty Day Job.  Logging out in your Supergroup base will earn you charges for your Monitor Duty Teleporter power.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent protecting your Supergroup's base has earned you the Monitor Duty Day Job.  Logging out in your Supergroup base will earn you charges for your Monitor Duty Teleporter power.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in your base to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in your base to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Gravedigger
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent studying death itself has earned you the Mortician Day Job. Logging out in a graveyard will earn you protection against Experience Debt, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent studying death itself has earned you the Mortician Day Job. Logging out in a graveyard will earn you protection against Experience Debt, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in a graveyard to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in a graveyard to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Crey_Employee
badges.desc_hero: Your utility to Crey Industries is now limited to your tolerance for experimental treatments.
badges.desc_villain: Your work with Crey Industries has earned you the Crey Employee Day Job. Logging out in the Crey Building will earn you a random Large Inspiration, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in the Crey Building to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the Crey Building to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Arachnos_Official
badges.desc_hero: The Arbiters of Arachnos have made you a priority target. They do not like to let their secrets slip.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent working with the Arachnos Arbiters has earned you the Arachnos Official Day Job. Logging out in Grandville will earn fuel for your Jetpack.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in Grandville to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in Grandville to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Arachnos_Agent
badges.desc_hero: There's no resigning from Arachnos, but you appear to have done just that. Good luck.
badges.desc_villain: Your work with the forces of Arachnos has earned you the Arachnos Agent Day Job. Logging out in an Arachnos Base will grant you an Experience bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in an Arachnos Base to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in an Arachnos Base to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Smuggler
badges.desc_hero: You've scored the biggest coup of all: smuggling directly into Paragon City. Unfortunately, it's a long round trip.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time smuggling in illicit black market goods, earning you the Smuggler Day Job. Logging out in a store will earn you a random enhancement, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off at the ports and docks of Rogue Isles to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off at the ports and docks of Rogue Isles to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Demagogue
badges.desc_hero: While you're no longer interested in spreading Arachnos lies, there don't seem to be many opportunities in a similar vein here in Paragon City.
badges.desc_villain: You spend your free time spreading Arachnos propaganda to better manipulate and placate the masses of the Rogue Isles, earning you the Demagogue Day Job. Logging out in the Arachnos Building in Marconeville will earn you an Infamy bonus, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off at the Arachnos Building in Marconeville to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off at the Arachnos Building in Marconeville to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_DUST_Ranger
badges.desc_hero: You have trained with the elite D.U.S.T. of First Ward during your free time, earning you the D.U.S.T. Ranger Day Job. Logging out in the D.U.S.T Training Facility will hone your skills further, granting you a bonus to your damage, accuracy, and range for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You have trained with the elite D.U.S.T. of First Ward during your free time, earning you the D.U.S.T. Ranger Day Job. Logging out in the D.U.S.T Training Facility will hone your skills further, granting you a bonus to your damage, accuracy, and range for a short time.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the D.U.S.T Training Facility to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Scavenger
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent scrounging in the wrecked city of First Ward has earned you the Scavenger Day Job. Logging out in First Ward will enable you to dig up extra Inspirations, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent scrounging in the wrecked city of First Ward has earned you the Scavenger Day Job. Logging out in First Ward will enable you to dig up extra Inspirations, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off in First Ward to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in First Ward to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Psychologist
badges.desc_hero: You have spent a great deal of time in the Mother of Mercy Hospital, earning you the Psychologist Day Job. Logging out in the Mother of Mercy Hospital will bolster your defenses against psionic attacks, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You have spent a great deal of time in the Mother of Mercy Hospital, earning you the Psychologist Day Job. Logging out in the Mother of Mercy Hospital will bolster your defenses against psionic attacks, when you log back in, for a short time.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off near Mother of Mercy Hospital in First Ward to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Survivalist
badges.desc_hero: Your time spent learning from the hearty Survivors of First Ward has earned you the Survivalist Day Job. Logging out in the Survivor Compound will earn you a bonus chance to earn recipes, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: Your time spent learning from the hearty Survivors of First Ward has earned you the Survivalist Day Job. Logging out in the Survivor Compound will earn you a bonus chance to earn recipes, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.

badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off in the Survivor Compound in First Ward to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_DarkAstoria
badges.desc_hero: You have withstood the oppressive influence of Mot, at great cost to your health and sanity and earning you the mark of the Cold Hand of Death. Logging out within Dark Astoria will increase your defense and resistance to cold and negative attacks, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.desc_villain: You have withstood the oppressive influence of Mot, at great cost to your health and sanity and earning you the mark of the Cold Hand of Death. Logging out within Dark Astoria will increase your defense and resistance to cold and negative attacks, when you log back in, for a short time.
badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off within Dark Astoria to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off within Dark Astoria to earn this Day Job badge.

badges.name: DJ_Labyrinth
badges.desc_hero: You've spent a lot of time navigating the maze that is the Labyrinth of Fog and have become quite familiar with navigating unusual spaces. Logging out within the Labyrinth of Fog will earn you a bonus to the number of Nightmare Obols you receive, when you log back in, each time you complete a mission for a short time.

badges.earn_hint_hero: Spend time logged off within the Labyrinth of Fog to earn this Day Job badge.
badges.earn_hint_villain: Spend time logged off within the Labyrinth of Fog to earn this Day Job badge.
